source_doc:
She talked about how impossible it is to be a woman in today's society.
She spoke for over two minutes without being interrupted by a single man, saying things like, you have to be a boss, but you can't be mean.
You have to be thin but not too thin.
You have to never get old, never be rude, never show up.
Oh, sorry.
Our male director is telling me I need to wrap it up here to present America with her.
To see her award.
Is the woman that she delivered that speech to.
Please welcome Margot Robbie.

What?
But I saw you kiss her.
Joan.
My acting like I liked you turned real.
And now I'm all confused because I got what I wanted.

Then she actually performed and I was like, oh, I forgot what Fergie sounds like.
Does that make sense?
It makes all the sense.

doar mii dihte, Harriet ja mu mii gohčoduvvon dohkkehuvvot.  
Čáhces?  
Muhto mii báhčit du, čeahkkas.  
Joan.  
Mu válddabeaivvi go mii goahtat, lei eará.  
Ja nu mii lea gullalit, čuovvut mu mii ávkkai.  
Muhto mun ii dábálaš lea muhtuhit in.  
Váldu de mu rohkkan Fergie-dichkke mu njiŋgobeavddas ja mu ovdán, oh, dus lea máŋga.  
Dasa mii eai gohčoduvvon ja mu ovdán, oh, mun ferte gohčat maŋás Fergie.  
Dasa fas lea beartna?  
Son lea maid beartna.

The last time I was out here, you could see 27 miles across northwest Alabama.
You getting tired of the view?
No.
The trouble is that the birds keep on flying into the glass because they can't see it and break their wings.
Well, why don't you just throw an old fishnet over the window?
That way you'd have your view and your birds.
Well, I just guess and calculate.
I never thought of it.
You know, I swear, if a fly was to bust his leg, he'd come running with a splint.

hypo_0:
Lasta gávnná go mii lea sávvá, de mii šat 27 jiekŋa áššu northwest Alabama.  
Don nieiddat suohkan?  
In.  
Darru lea de, atnagat goallin gávdnat nuolmba ja gávdnat niiden sihkka.  
Ah, mii jagaš ii háliidit muohtaš jiiká?  
Dorrami dáppe mii hálliidit suohka ja goallat.  
Ah, mii ii gávdná ja ráhkiste.  
In in háliidit dábála.  
Don álo, mun ivnnar, maŋŋá go bárgii geavahallat, de sindoji muohta.

source_doc:
Traction meets fashion: The best weatherproof trainers for rain-slicked pavements

The Cloudhorizon Waterproof feels purpose-built for the stop-start rhythm of winter commuting. Its lightweight waterproof upper keeps your feet dry without adding bulk, and the shoe's smooth rocker shape helps you roll forward easily, even when you're layered up and carrying heavy loads.

Underfoot, Helion foam creates a cushioned bounce that softens long walks between stations, while the grippy rubber outsole keeps things steady on wet steps and shiny tiles. The pared-back design gives it a polished, modern look, ideal if you prefer a trainer that handles lousy weather subtly, without shouting its technical credentials.

Várra, Helion fooma geavahuvvat bohtojuhkká, somáhit beasske duhkan girječátiid, muhto geavahus geldu giskas bálkkimma guoskeivun ja ávnnatšáhkkima. Dát gávnnit lea nuorggibáikŋa ja modernalaš báljus, máŋga go don válddásit geavahuvdan dahjehkaš duohtum, ii go itne geavahus šaddan doarradusvuođa.

Mátkku geavahus gávnnit lea nuorggibáikŋa ja modernalaš báljus, máŋga go don válddásit geavahuvdan dáhpokaš dahjehkaš, ii go itne geavahus šaddan doarradusvuođa.

source_doc:
Everything gone.
We lost Ray.
And you moved to Atlanta.
Well, I'm not in the best of health.
And my boys, they insisted that we move so that I could get the best medical care money.
Could buy the best care our money can buy is a heating pad and a bottle of aspirin.

Mii ráhkadit Ray.  
Ja dai don boahtá Atlanta.  
Jah, muhto não mun atnak oainnat.  
Ja mu poahttit, njuolggahii mii ahte mii boahtit, muhto ahte mun sáhtát gurkki.  
Ná, dál mu beaivvit, mii áigget aiggomiid mátkkuhii mu geavahit.  
Mii oahpá bearaš, muhto mii váldit báhkkolii ja biebmái aspirin.

@ptoothfish why do all of the kids’ IMDb headshots look like they’re screen grabs from This Person Does Not Exist dot com? 😬

@bloodflowersburning yup the whole production machine is giving uncanny valley
even if they are real kids underneath, i wonder how much tuning up their images get 😬
smiles widened, dimples accentuated, etc
i stand by my assertion they will be treated like hot-swappable parts if they do anything complicated like have an opinion or grow into their faces wrong

@ptoothfish oh they absolutely will. There’s probably even some contract clauses that lands them in deep weta if they even sneeze wrong.

source_doc:
@hacks4pancakes What do you think is actually going on?
Confused? Anxious? Executive Dysfunction? Unrealistic? Bone idle?
(I'm NOT confusing ND with idleness in my internal ontology here, but I wonder if either might be contributing...)

@hacks4pancakes @DamonHD Foe emigration at least, I can imagine myself saying “oh I’m so jealous, I would LOVE to do that” when the truth is there are internal or external reasons why I wouldn’t/couldn’t and someone offering to help me with the logistics wouldn’t change that so I politely decline.

@darryl @hacks4pancakes The grown-up way to politely decline would be "I got ahead of myself: I cannot do that for other reasons much as I'd like to", not brushing it off as a diary issue!

#valleylink high vol transmission line #orangecountyVA public hearing #grid upgrade yes. for #ai #datacenters no. #eminentdomain taking of farmland NO

0% none of the #valleylink transmission line is in existing rights of way in #ocva. none of the #power will serve #orangecountyva. 100% headed north to #ai #datacenters in loudon county #va. #fauquier said no to the substation now targeted for #culpepercounty #yeatssubstation

#valleylink claim all #rightsofway fully subscribed for (local) power so must go outside #Row 100%

#valleylink 765kv #transmission lines carry power from ohio wv to swv to central va to #nova. look at that on a map. long way round. #rural counties seemed easier than #nova

#valleylink thunk wrong.

source_doc:
@Maker_of_Things
Is there any bruising or swelling? If it’s swelling then let the practice know and keep an eye on it.
Assuming she took it from the veins around the elbow, theres a chance she went too deep and hit the back wall of the vein, and an underlying tendon then bruised it on the way out. All depends on technique and equipment. I could never get the hang of a fixed needle draw but was a deft hand at a butterfly draw, you could be much kinder.
Hope it’s eased now.

@tempusfelix
Yeah, from my elbow. It is still sore, but getting better. No bruising or bleeding though.

@Maker_of_Things
Good. She may well have been too deep so remember if they’re not urgent, you can often ask for a specific practitioner if your surgery allows it. For example I like the sister at mine, she’s so smooth.

@Maker_of_Things
Ohládat áibba vaikká čáhkkáin vai oassit? Jos dat lea oassit, geashit duodha ja geahččit.
Oahpahusi go dat hittii rájes mátkkus, de drahčiid go eai juo bálkkis ja nahkku mátkkuhlá. Ávžžuhalla lea teavttuhuvdna ja pjaalet. Mun eai vahšii livčaja sávkkas, muhto lean beaivvi mão ágga IV llásáide, dáhkkádat du.
Hopa dat lea muittálgá!

@tempusfelix
Jah, mun spáláde buohka. Dat lea ávžžit, muhto almmustit. Ii áibba vaikká vuosttaččat.

@Maker_of_Things
Bárdni. Son sáhkkit ii geahčot, muhto muhto sihkkarjuvna možešii dás nnjelat go mun čohkkáivitte ii oahppahá. Fábgami mun áiggi eará sistra ráfálvuma, su álo dan ávžžit.

source_doc:
@theynege As someone who was aware of dansup (bc of you and some other folks) but hadn't witnessed it happen in real time, this time I witnessed it in real time and it was a piece of work. Polished. Like he's a habitual offender.

@theynege he screenshotted her account and posted it with his "crazy mask lady" comments, when called out he IMMEDIATELY deleted the posts and started posting his bona fides as a "community builder" and all the folks he's worked with and and and wow, isn't he amazing no acknowledgement at all that he - community builder and dude with marginalized identities and all - targeted a disabled racialized woman online for harassment by doing it.
The sniper quality of it was something to behold. He was ready to tell everyone how great he was to cover over basically an attack he knew could bring harm.

@quietmarc @theynege that post was like an ableism hat trick
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
@theynege Mii oainnán danhus dan cuoivut (duhka go you ja muhtumin), muhto min máŋga goas, maiddai ieš min olggos. Skuvla. Likka dasa lea muhtuhvvá gávdnet.

@theynege son skrinjašahtoidde hennes konto ja posttade sin "crazy mask lady" kommenta, go son bargguhit, son IMMEDEALDDA skure bardnat ja sirdno posttade sin bona fides go "báikkáhuvdan" ja ollu maiddus go son barggu ja ja ja wow, eahpa duohkki eai gii nuorra hálddahusa, go son - báikkáhuvdan ja máŋga goas ahte tjuvvojju gáhkki ja vitu olahpalli boazodoalus ja jearuhuvvat muhtijin ahte son dalá gárddahit oskkalu ja njálga online.
Sniperi ceno boáppá lea muhto mas šat sávhu. Son lea ohččun ja gávdnan son inkálát go asmoala go gieahdan goas pilla čoavggaba.

@quietmarc @theynege dat post lea aktego gálkkamat mii juohke dohkke oahpáda

source_doc:
@Edent ah, interesting - was the Hub 5 something you had to request from Virgin, or did you just get one elsewhere and set it up? (As per recent discussion was issued with a 5x, with its lack Modem Mode.)

@yvan I already had the Hub 4. I went onto their online chat and whinged about poor download speeds until they sent me a new Hub.
If you're on the XPON network, I don't think you have a choice though.

@Edent ah yeah, just been trying to do some research, but it's all a bit muddy... I'm FTTP/XGS-PON so I think just stuck with the 5x... not an insurmountable problem, just a little annoying. (But compared to unreliable <40mpbs BT rotting fenland copper that cost me more than Virgin... I'm not really complaining.)

@yvan Mun jáhká Hub 4. Mun áddá historahládjami ja vástidit mátkováldde go váldde guhkkoma ja áddáduvvo mu ođđa Hub.
Soit du lea XPON nátkovála, mun in jáhká dehálá go rahtat vaiko.

@Edent ah de, mun lean dárbbašii dajlehtii, muhto lea dál go muitalan... Mun lean FTTP/XGS-PON, så mun juvva dihtii 5x... in lea gohččit ektedanjárgan, muhto ilgá äska. (Muhto farema en nítti go dehálas <40mpbs BT nr. féng elggas land jii dårlig, mii gávdneváldun muolidir un Virgin... mun in kveryddu go.)

source_doc:
Whoa, you mean Blender Market, the thing I said was the first step towards the Blender environment becoming a shitty subscription service, renamed itself to the oh-so-appealing name "Superhive" and then decided to mandate subscriptions?
WHOA WHO COULD HAVE GUESSED?! Not me, that's for sure. This is completely out of left field!

TBH, I have never seen a single company with "Hive" in the name that wasn't a complete shitshow run by assholes, so I never bought anything on that platform -
Sorry
I didn't RENT anything on that platform if I could help it.
Maybe it's unfair, but "clearly we, a company that specializes in connecting creators with their audience, should name ourselves HIVE, because the creators are just our loyal little bees, and audience is our loyal little bees, work for us!" always gives me bad vibes.

"Hive implies busy crowds!"
Hive implies a queen.

hypo_0:
Whoa, آیا نُو بلاَندَر مارکت، سَگِم سِت جُدھ غُشو بِلَندَر سَکَھَمو مَصْگَتِی سِم!'َيْ بَچھَی مَسْحُوق ڑے ، وَکر دِي نَام "سُپرہَیف" یَو چَھودا یَی وَٹھُدٕ زَئی بَڑ بیَن دءَ وے سَاخ دی سِوَاچ کرتے مَنو!
واؤ یَو عیقُول شِیطِی میگٔن! مَنو، وُندَ!

همُون دَزرِتسِ مدیدُ وَچاد راوَی مَکومَ پچُو کھُدِ نَو "ہَیف" پے تَا نَو چُک کی لے ہَس آیا کھی لانڑگئی!! -
گَهدینی!
مَنو کَکِن مَنْ کہِچَچِرۓ زاہیرن کی بوجھ نَسُون پَک رائن نڑیں؟
سو پن جَماَیَاں لہذا، لُوٹْ لائی کمی پاج بھی مَاشین ہَوا یَو سرگرمی عَہم پائری مَنو پاک پَڑ پل وَسی! یهوھ وی آیدَہ سَی ہکی بَس نَہی۔۔

"ہَیف نَظِم غوغائی ہَنو!"
ہَیف نَظِم قُوئِن۔
hypo_1:
Whoa, tú mun lean máŋggá Blender Market, seamma geahča mii mii áhibba juo njuohka Blender álguhis dás muhtun ádkkuviella manná váldit en segge eavttas "Superhive" vaikko go hánsašvaihuvvat mandátas?
WHOA, GOTTA LEAHKTIDD?! Mus ii, dan oahpa. Dát lea heittet ášši!

TBH, in leat áigehan dásnekea "Hive" namma mii ii leat heasttel badašvuohta geahčáivatan mii muhtun speaddadollar tjuorre, de man mii fárddet ii valggan eahpdodaga -
Oven!
I don't RENT any eahpdodaga dásnekea álbmot, jus in galgá bohtit.
Váldde ii leat bardne, muhto "dás hulbmo, dat mii eret ivnnikaid mat ivnagat álgán, doai veahkki HIVE, dii veahkki nostre vihtta neljastat ja audience lea mii vihtta neljastat, doai doai!" dárfuin fíkkašibra mearke.

"Hive geahči bálkkuma!"
Hive geahči uikka.

source_doc:
Ironing the lightweight green corduroy for my first try at the Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern. I don't know how I feel about the recommendation to use interfacing but it probably does want something to stiffen and thicken it a bit.
#millinery

Sachi's newsboy cap pattern advises to cut the crown pieces diagonal to the weave ("on the bias") to allow more stretch around the circumference but that will make the corduroy rows run aslant, where I prefer them vertical.
We shall see. This is the test cookie to get a feel for the pattern. I like corduroy for texture but green wouldn't be my first choice, and this fabric is lightweight enough that I should add a layer, whether interfacing or what-have-you from the stash.

On a second look, my fabric isn't corduroy at all, it's just velvet, so I can cut at 45° to the fabric weave like Sachi suggests in the Newsboy Cap pattern and it won't look strange.
#millinery

hypo_0:
Gáibuhit váldojuvvon alaččoláhvuođa guovža Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap kađuhkkolla. Mun in jearru goas at vydjot interfacing, muhto dábála otná maid nuppa jearrat geat gohččat ja guvvahit váldojuvvit.
#mehket

Sachi's Newsboy Cap kađuhkkolas jearrat gávdnon jidhcuvllas diaga mii dohkku ovddiduvvan geavahusdas, muhto dat gávdno čáhcehuvllassat aslat, geat mun ovddidan vadde-verjjat.
Mun váttádeh! Dát lea testtakoakki juohkeheaddji. Mun ráhkistan álgu veáhkkaguovtti muhto guovža in lea mu váldojuvvon giella, ja dábála buktas alaččoláhvuođa lea váldojuppat, go muhto interfacing dat ja buorregoaisat geat viiklottat.

Dábbadiin, mu álgu in lea álgu veáhkkaguovtti, dat lea vaan velvethi, muhto mun sáhttán gávdnon 45° daldejuvllas mii Sachi jearrat Newsboy Cap kađuhkkolas ja dat in geahččat rákket.
#mehket

Mun ráhkistan álgu veáhkkaguovtti muhto guovža in lea mu váldojuvvon giella, ja dábála buktas alaččoláhvuođa lea váldojuppat, go muhto interfacing dat ja buorregoaisat eai viiklottat.

Dábbadiin, mu álgu in lea álgu veáhkkaguovtti, dat lea vaan velvethi, muhto mun sáhttán gávdnon 45° daldejuvllas mii Sachi jearrat Newsboy Cap kađuhkkolas ja dat in geahččat rákket.
#mehket

source_doc:
@kagan Just use anything, even the cashier receipts from your grocery shopping - whatever you want. A friend of mine who exhibits a lot put a sheet of toilet roll from every place he's exhibiting in his scrapbook another friend got injured while hanging her frames and eventually used the cast from the injury and some gouache to stamp patters on the pages. Hence: everything's involved you want involved.

@aurora And then you... take all these things, and glue, staple, or otherwise attach them into a book? Is that it?
I'm unclear on what happens next, or why.
Honestly, I may just not be a scrapbooking person.

@kagan Yes, that's exactly the way to go! Intentionally spill your coffee, drop an ink cartridge... whatever suits you. One just needs to get all these fancy ideas shown on pinterest or whatever out of one's head. It's about documenting the process instead of being a visual dainty. Use it like a wrecking journal if that suits. It's totally up to the person who makes it.

@kagan Täsh, sáddevat bohtosit geahččat, muhto gaskkas letterahallat geahččat álggo jokkis - geahččat dáhpáhuvvat. Mii olbmot mun goarjji lotta sálbma muohta mii álggo jokkis ieŋkiliti ávkkastit, ja oaidnit mii geahči dán iškká, ja orohkku vuogahii geahčča otne ja dát biŋnnida. Danne: dábálahtit mii oaidnit dáilvvut.

@aurora Ja sit du... geahččat nevda áššis, ja seammis, bíle, dahkat gullet ja geahččat dahkan? Dát lea?
Mun lea váttis viiddil mearridit, dahkat alus ja ožžot.
Oaiven, mii goarjjit mun leavdán beasan geahčča mii oahppá.

@kagan Jah, dán lea dáhpáhuvvu! Eará kaughu duški, geahca inkku perta... geahču geahččat. Mii biddjomat geahččat eaktu geahččagat énbelán mii dihtii go dalvet. Dál hálddaša muohta eai eaktasa gábbi. Sii lea dán idá mii geahččat.

Dán báhčit: dábálahtit dánidat mii oaidnit.

@aurora Ja sit du... geahččat eaktat, ja seammis, bíle, dahkat gullet ja geahččat dán ibssa? Dát lea?

source_doc:
I'm doing a eekly 1hr meeting where I'm going over with a director of engineering my soap box on managing a product management organization and actually it's coming out to be a pretty good episodic thing

Topics have been
- different types of product managers and the basic skill sets in developing requirements
- how product managers ensure an ongoing cadence for an engineering team
- dealing with product managers with varying backgrounds (engineering, data analyst, operational SME, consulting etc)
what's been fun is that this Director and I worked at a previous company with product managers that I didn't manage and I'm able to reference "hey remember that person? that person was awesome and here's why."

so in various email chains and slack threads I'll forward them to said director (if he's already not in there) and be like "ok a GOOD product manager would do THIS" and a "BAD product maanger would do THAT" rememember when so and so did THIS? that was good.

Álvvu lea
- guovttos produktaluhttaira ja ášši geatnegábbát dehkit požeskou
- mo produktaluhttaira guovttodit iežat gávd'nna for engineering gávd'nna
- guovttodit produktaluhttaira mii lea seasset geatnegábbát (engineering, dataanalytik, operational SME, consulting jne)
dat lea veahkit, go dakkar direktor ja mii jávkkus almmuheapmi mii, mii šaddat "hej, máhkkot eahket? dat máhkkot lea häjjála ja dán lea eahkki."

dat mii ávkkus olbmot eahvvat bealjjača ja slack-tehkkuin, mii veahkehuvde driđđo direktoressa (jos sáhtedum mii lea in bohtet) ja lea "ok, GEARDA produktaluhttaira geahčalan DA" ja "BAD produktaluhttaira geahčalan dat" máhkkot go ja mannam eahkkan DA? dat lea de geažan.

source_doc:
The hosts took the lead in the 26th minute via the prolific Diaz as the Real Madrid player showed his scoring instinct.

Achraf Hakimi's corner was headed goalwards by Ayoub El Kaabi and Diaz deflected the ball in from close range.

He has now scored in each of Morocco's five games and extends his own record for most goals by a Moroccan at a single Cup of Nations finals, but left the field late on with a heavily strapped thigh that will be a concern for coach Walid Regragui.

Chances were hard to come by for both sides, but Abde Ezzalzouli headed narrowly over the crossbar from another Hakimi corner, while the latter laid on a headed chance for Saibari that was spurned.

Cameroon were unfortunate not to get a penalty kick when Mbeumo was caught in the box as Mauritanian referee Dahane Beida waved play on, while Georges-Kevin Nkoudou headed wide at the back post with the Indomitable Lions' best chance of the game.

Morocco made it 2-0 minutes later to kill off the contest when Saibari was left unmarked at the back post and had time to control the ball and fire low into the far corner of the net.

Ismael Saibari gave Morocco breathing space against Cameroon (REUTERS)

In Friday's other quarter-final, Iliman Ndiaye scored the only goal as Senegal booked an Afcon semi-final berth for the third time in the last four tournaments, beating 10-man Mali 1-0.

Ndiaye netted after 27 minutes, taking advantage of a goalkeeping howler to put Senegal ahead in a tense derby against their west African neighbours.

Mali were reduced to 10 men for the second half after captain Yves Bissouma was sent off for a second caution on the stroke of halftime.

He was booked first for a clumsy challenge in the 25th minute and was dismissed after a needless foul on Idrissa Gana Gueye.

Mali were down to 10 men from the 26th minute of their previous clash against Tunisia and still managed to squeeze through on penalties but there was no recovery this time around against a polished Senegalese outfit.

hypo_1:
Väččad boarsii 26. minuttas profilet Díaz, da Real Madrid buorre gávdnon ádnusgoas šaddan álo buresjogas.

Achraf Hakimi cornera ánnas bohtet máilmmen Ayoub El Kaabi ja Díaz boarte garra mearrida.

Son lea alccis muhtumin Marokkos viimmevuođas gávdnojuvvon ja dehárdne son doaimma buorre girddemore, muhto si leahkki vuolggis muohta váii sokačáhkku gávdnojuvvon Walid Regragui ádoku.

Šávtte ihttin váhnemi, muhto Abde Ezzalzouli ánnas the vítkar riikku muorra Hakimi corneras, ja han heilugá viimaš Sahibari, muhto fugui dottii.

Kameroon lea muhtumin galdu vuoitteliš bálttis Mbeumo ovdan boxas, go Mauritanian girjjis Dahane Beida ánnas ollasaskas, muhto Georges-Kevin Nkoudou bohtui galdu muorra bálti láabi mearrida Indomitable Lions' buorre mátku.

Marokko bures 2-0 minuttas váimmilgan muorjaha, go Sahibari lea musuhkala bálti láabi ja leahka dajlahušii vela áuddu nettás.

Ismael Sahibari dihte Marokkosi muorra Kameroon (REUTERS)

Frieda ođđa kvarttamiddas, Iliman Ndiaye oasso jietdum goal, go Senegal vuovttii Afcon semi-final birgi njuoggahčá boahka 10-manná Mali 1-0.

Ndiaye baddá 27. minuttas, go son sávdne ástayaga girjjiohkka ealle trammas Senegal jusgona mátku viìnna boareskujuvasi gohččalisti.

Mali lea márás 10 mannid ísáku 26. minuttas jearga tuniseas ja dábála boaresábmas čállda, muhto dárbba veahkki dain boares neut egadas almmuhkala Senegalase outfit.

source_doc:
:redpanda: sometimes people will ask us like "what if you got a publisher for [game] wouldn't that be wicked?" but the problem is that all that would have to go through our game director, Ashe, who's said she wont speak to any publisher who doesn't address her as Ashe
the second she gets "Jess" the deal ends

:redpanda: and in a world where like, not even the AI slop publishers sending AI emails, but the people who have been flat out rude and some of them like, you could *feel* the misogyny dripping off their email, we're not really interested in talking to any of them lol

:redpanda: (I will shout out the publishers who have reached out to us though who have been like "here's some of the games we've published" and, out of their catalog, they picked out exclusively furry games. at least they did their homework)

:redpanda: anyways if you ever were like "I don't understand why Blobun isn't on switch? it'd be a perfect fit" that's why, and we can't afford the devkit and version of gamemaker that does that export, so yea you gotta go steam deck (or x86-ARM converter on those anbernics) if you want it on the go

source_doc:
i am hesitant to declare it but i may be right around the point of behavior calculation optimization where there's nothing more that can be done without actually decimating the number of paths being processed.
And that might actually be the play because things like UCT are smarter about traversing a tree with a budget and splitting how deep vs broad you go

at the end of the day, it's always going to be possible that some enemy picks up some combination of abilities/items where the combinatorial explosion of possibility space is unable to calculate fast on any hardware, so I was always going to need to cap it somewhere, just that theoretical cap is now 40x bigger than it was in january

Welp think I'm going to implement UCT because my game's just Go now this is going to be a journey

hypo_0:
Mun lean váldobusseb, muhto lean máhkkisin olggos maid dego eanidhit dangkuhus geahččaleami, minsta maid geahččat áiggiid barggut go meahcčat doapkis eallin márkanisit.
Ja dás lea deháleva, dego šaddat UCT lea álggo tohtthus traversa tree mii lea budget ja skihppa go háliid vs gárdni säddet

Gáddni jáhkka, lea dáhpáhuvva mii álggahuvvat go gárdiehki čohki geahčiid/linkkaid beasat maid kombinatorial sáhkavdna ovttas ággus mátkkihit fast fálaldágo válddi, danin máhteva mun lea giddego válddát dán lea dás go 40x muhtin heaittaleapmi go álggo január

Oahpahuvva mii lean válda UCT, dego mu gávnná lea doarvva, dán lea dávjjá!
hypo_1:
Mun lean váldobusseb, muhto lea veahkkin muhtin hai dás olggos geahččaleami oahpáhusas, teahtta maŋka eai šaddet beaivvi mii geahččat doapkis eallin mátkkaláhku.
Ja dás lea deháleva, dego UCT lea smarttavuohta diggida tree mii lea budget ja skihppa go háliid vs gárdni jáhkka

Gáddni jáhkka, lea dáhpáhuvva mii álggahuvvat go gárdiehki čohki geahčiid/linkkaid beasat maid kombinatorial sáhkavdna ovttas ággus mátkkihit fast fálaldágo válddi, danin jáhkka mun lea giddego válddát dán lea dás go 40x muhtin heaittaleapmi go álggo január

Tja, mun duohkat UCT, dego mu gávnná lea doarvva, dán lea buotjuhkkat!

Ja dás lea deháleva, dego go UCT lea skárttágga go lohkkat tree mii lea budget ja skihppa go háliid vs gárdni jáhkka.

Gáddni jáhkka, lea dáhpáhuvva mii álggahuvvat go gárdiehki čohki geahčiid/linkkaid beasat maid kombinatorial sáhkavdna ovttas ággus mátkkihit fast fálaldágo válddi, danin jáhkka mun lea giddego válddát dán lea dás go 40x muhtin heaittaleapmi go álggo január.

Jah, mun boahtá UCT, dego mu gávnná lea doarvva, dán lea guhtta!

source_doc:
@afewbugs I have seen this too, I do worry that new members might not find such groups in the real world now as they are less likely to be on old fashioned social media. For instance someone was trying to give away two pedal cycles in need of repair and couldn't get any interest through Facebook. A few years ago they wouldn't have lasted ten minutes before someone claimed them. I have one and I am gutted that I wasn't able to take the second. Similarly, litter picking and community gardens.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs I have more luck shifting things through Facebook marketplace these days than I do with Gumtree any more, and I can't face eBay for things too big to post. Possibly it depends a lot on where you are though, especially with bikes!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace is a big one keeping me on Facebook too. I used to think it was to keep in touch with friends but I barely see any posts from my actual friends anymore, so now it's mostly marketplace, local groups and the fact most local businesses and even the Library only seem to have their opening times, special events etc on Facebook
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
@afewbugs Muhto mun lean ama eai, mu eai lávvan duohtavázzit earámárid jäsenat. Mun álistu go dat ledje earámáridduhtat, muhto mun eai háliidit duogildat go dát áigi. Fáhca lea nugo go dat lea rohkedhan ja muhtin juoibáhdas. Earága ja earámárid!

@hicksy2 @afewbugs Mun lean novtta rohkedhan Facebook marketplace-rrái go tastti go Gumtree sadjivis, ja mun eai háliidit eBay-rrái go dat lea muhtin beassaid. Nugo sátni jávon, dat bearrat go jahkõ giellis!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace lea muohta go hárjehárjobárat Facebook-rrái. Mun eai dolkan go dat lea dáhpáhus earámáridduaktit, muhto mun eai birge earámáridduhtat ámmu dálkká, muhto dat lea mest beassanoagát, earámárid ja dat lea jorgalginlieindda go ekkabasásnuhkku, spesjálka eventida jne. Facebook-rrái
hypo_1:
@afewbugs Mun lean oahpahallamat dán, muhto mun ávžžuhuvit go earámárid jäsenat eai šatvuohta go dain eai háliidit olbmot áššes go ole eará social media. Ehkke muhto go muhtin ávžžuhuvit go khænhágo, muhto mun eai viehkkon go ástme dán muhtin 2 pedal cycle-át ja mun eai alddahaga Facebook rrái. Jávnaga áigi dan galgá daingobahca go dain eai galgii listas buorre koe. Mun lean muhtin ja mun ávžžuhuvit go mun eai leas bávččii dán muhtin. Earámárid ja earámáriddu.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs Mun lean máhkka rohkedhan Facebook marketplace-rrái go dán áigi, go eai oahpá earddibá so dat gumtree. Mun eai háliidit eBay-kka, go dat lea muhtin beassaid go sarvllat. Dat oahppahalla mu of eannegis ja davvin go gursit.

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace lea muhtin go mu durbbá ja mu hlut nev ustit Facebook. Mun ánkuhčaváldin go muhtin visivuoda ja mun eai daldán earámárid, muhto dán earámáridhat facebook-rrái, earámárid ja das eiene go mánkká bistá, eará otas ja oahppahuhtán.
hypo_2:
@afewbugs Mun lean oahpahallamat dán, muhto mun ávžžuhuvit go nuortit jäsenat eai šatvuohta go dain eai háliidit olbmokšæd social media. Mii eahpun heaitit go oahpahallamat muhtin pedal cycle-át go dain eai eahko dakká eadrin through Facebook. Dán áigi mii eai lahččii muhtin nii ten minutes go go eará bohti šuohtani. Mun lean muhtin ja mun ávžžuhuvit go mun eai veara gávppoid dán muhtin. Earámárid ja earámáriddu.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs Mun lean muhtin rohkedhan Facebook marketplace-rrái go dán áigi, go eai oahpá earddibá so dat gumtree. Mun eai háliidit eBay-kka, go dat lea muhtin beassaid go sarvllat. Dat oahppahalla mu of eannegis, muhto earámárid ja dán earámáridhat ja dego bætta beaja go orndagárdela.

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace lea muhtin go mu durbbá ja mu hlut nev ustit Facebook. Mun álggusgoha šat go dain eai ferte earámárid go mu eai daldán oahpahallan eáhko vihtta ja muhtin. Vázzihit oahpdálkun, muhto dán earámárid ja oahppabuhta go nyrkki bisá, eará mánkká bistá ja oahppahuhtán.

source_doc:
@la Isn't rule #1 of machining that if you haven't faced it off, it's not square or flat?

@azonenberg yes, of course, but I *did* mean to face it off. I just had my tool zero set wrong.
Because I assumed that it was roughtly flat.
I'm making an extra part today. I have the stock. And if I don't it will bug me to no end. Plus, during test fitting the bearing I broke the glue holding the part on my plate, so I would have to indicate it back in anyways, which I don't wanna dooooo, so.....

@la I know the feeling.
Had a similar problem when working on my house where literally every datum you might think of using was wrong.
I had a contractor frame a door frame plumb and square. Had to rip out a couple of studs after he left because the door needed to be like a degree off level in order to be flush with the floor and not floating in the air on one side.
Another (partial height) wall has each stud carefully cut to length because no two are the same size... The floor isn't flat so to make the countertop level you need the wall to be a parallelogram rather than a rectangle
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
@la Eikö koneistamisen sääntö #1 ole se, että jos et ole tasoittanut sitä, se ei ole suorassa tai tasaisessa?

@azonenberg joo, tietenkin, mutta *meinasin* tasoittaa sen. Minulla oli vain työkalu nolla väärin asetettu.
Koska luulin, että se oli suunnilleen tasainen.
Teen tänään ylimääräisen osan. Minulla on materiaalia. Ja jos ei, se vaivaa minua loputtomasti. Plus, testatessa laakeria rikkoisin liimaa, joka piti osan levylleni kiinni, joten minun olisi silti pakko merkitä se takaisin, mitä en halua tehdäee....

@la Tiedän tunteen.
Minulla oli samanlainen ongelma, kun työskentelin talossani, missä kirjaimellisesti jokainen mittapiste, jota ajattelit käyttäväsi, oli väärin.
Minulla oli urakoitsija, joka kehysti oven rungon suoraksi ja neliöksi. Piti repiä pari pystypalkkia sen jälkeen, kun hän lähti, koska ovesta piti olla noin asteen verran kallellaan, jotta se olisi tasassa lattian kanssa eikä leijuisi ilmassa toiselta puolelta.
Toisessa (osittain korkeus) seinässä on jokainen pystypalkki huolellisesti leikattu pituuteen, koska ei kahta ole samaa kokoa... Lattia ei ole tasainen, joten jotta työtaso olisi tasassa, seinän on oltava parallelogrammi eikä suorakulmainen.
hypo_1:
@la Eikö koneistamisen sääntö #1 ole se, että jos et ole tasoittanut sitä, se ei ole suorassa tai tasaisessa?

@azonenberg joo, tietenkin, mutta *meinasin* kyllä tasoittaa sen. Minulla oli vain työkalu nolla väärin asetettu.
Koska luulin, että se oli noin tasainen.
Teen tänään ylimääräisen osan. Minulla on raaka-aineet. Ja jos en tee, se vaivaa minua ihan hulluna. Plus, testatessani laakeria, rikkoin liiman, joka piti osan levylleni kiinnitettynä, joten minun olisi pakko merkitä se takaisin, mitä en haluaisi tehdäee....

@la Tiedän tunteen.
Minulla oli samanlainen ongelma, kun remontoin taloani, missä kirjaimellisesti jokainen mittapiste, jota ajattelin käyttäväni, oli väärin.
Minulla oli urakoitsija, joka kehysti oven suoraksi ja neliöksi. Piti repiä pari pystypalkkia sen jälkeen, kun hän lähti, koska oven piti olla noin asteen verran kallellaan, jotta se olisi tasassa lattian kanssa eikä leijuisi ilmassa toiselta puolelta.
Toisessa (osittain korkeus) seinässä on jokainen pystypalkki leikattu tarkasti pituuteen, koska ei kahta ole samaa kokoa... Lattia ei ole tasainen, joten jotta työtaso olisi tasassa, seinän on oltava parallelogrammi eikä suorakulmainen.

source_doc:
I wish alcohol wasn't such a normal gift in society 😅 My employer sent me a bottle of eggnog but the only alcohol we like is in alcohol markers

I guess "not liking it" is kinda poor wording, I just think it's weird how casual we are with this stuff and we somehow just assume that all adults love this shit when there's people who shouldn't be touching it ever, and frankly I think the world would be better off if I poured it into the toilet than even gifting it to someone

@doombloomart
I have had US Big Corp required sensitivity training that reminds people not everyone wants alcohol and it's inappropriate to ask why. Seems like that should be more common

@elithebearded Yeah, that's mostly what I wish for too. I get that with sending random shit to a whole corporation will never be inoffensive to everyone, but 1. don't send random shit to a whole corporation maybe and 2. alcohol just rubs me wrong in the way that many who shouldn't touch it may touch it when it randomly shows up at the doorstep. 😅
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Mun fállá alkohola ii lea juohkeha bidjosa samfálddi 😅 Min vuosttaš álggaš ii leat birra álggaš, muhto juohke alkohola mii dárbbašii lea alkohola markerejuvvon

Mun áiggá "ii gávnnat dat" lea sáhttá sámiid ja mun oahpáldat dát lea weird, háliidan mon gávnnat dat giella ja mii ii geavahuvvon dohkkehuvvon lohkkeropen ja fáhkkát ii tara beasan go mun délka girje ovddas bidjá go mun geahččá gitta go dán spriikkerehkká

@doombloomart
Mun lean háliidit US Big Corp-n býdra bohtin sárdnimin, mii mii geavahuvvon guhte dehket eai juohke gávnnat alkohola ja dat lea ii bohtos. Dát lea ráhkisvuohta maid geahča baicca

@elithebearded Jaha, dán lea ráhkiseaskka magáldaga. Mun chorvut dat go olgá; go mii oahpu sáddet m álggaš beargga válddádolla lea ii takohe, muhto 1. eai máhte olggut random gávnnit gohit maŋit ja 2. alkohola ii áššis mu válddá don gávnnat go mon mii ii gávnnin dahtit go dat máŋga goit álggaš. 😅

source_doc:
My brother in He-Who-Shall-Not-Be-Named, what you are describing is a consequence of _misogyny_, not "misandry."

I desperately need men to realize that just because it's directed at them and an actual serious problem doesn't mean it is "misandry."
Just saw someone describe being discriminated against _for being considered effeminate_ as "misandry" and I just.

It's not that you aren't experiencing something real. You very well may be. But it isn't "misandry." Because "misandry" doesn't exist.
Yes, this applies to trans men as well. "Transmisandry" _also_ isn't a thing and just contributes to anti-feminist narratives. It treats itself as a mirror of transmisogyny, but transmisogyny is _intersective_: we experience transphobia _and_ we experience misogyny _and_ we experience this unholy thing that happens when the two interact. It's not a subset, even an exclusive subset, it's an intersection.
But the following all are absolutely problems that can be talked about!
* Transphobia/Transmisia
* Antitransmasculity
* Transemasculation
* Misogyny
It sucks to be discriminated against, but the language that we use is so, so important here.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Mu vátti in He-Who-Shall-Not-Be-Named, dakkár geahččat lea _misogynisvuođa_, iđit "misandry."

Mun dárbbašvuohta vássi meahcce njuolgaide jearrat, dan ahte jus dakkár lea súkšamus ja faktisk seriusvázzit, de nʌh "misandry."
Just geahččai gasta geahččen ja go barke máhccat _ássehuvvat_ daid "misandry" ja mun just.

Dat ii lea ahte don ii gáibmi dakkár čáhci. Don vejola ovttas. Muhto dat ii lea "misandry." Donnas "misandry" ii meara.
Ja, dainna lea aplicerat trans váddjiid ja. "Transmisandry" _gáibmi_ ii lea áhčči ja cittá dás antijentálněmárkanátta. Dat behk guđet fála fámme jarggu, muhto transmisogynisvuođa lea _intersective_: mii geahččán transphobia _ja_ mii geahččán misogyny _ja_ mii geahččán dán unholy dáid sáhtit gávdno ruhtata. Dat ii lea feavrut, man feavrut guhkki, dat lea intersectio.
Muhto dán fitnávat lea nu jo gárvojuvvon dakkát!
* Transphobia/Transmisia
* Antitransmaskultura
* Transemasculation
* Misogynisvuođa
Dat lea suddan geahččet, muhto dat språk vi ulbmo dán leget lea so, so important dás.

source_doc:
Progress after a while off. I got the sewing machine out to do the bill and a crown seam. Half the crown sewn plus the bill, resting atop the paper form made from the pattern. I had to rip and re-sew the machine stitch because I pinned along instead of across the seam and went off track. I might re-do the bill if I want a little more depth.
#millinery

Eight crown panels and two bill panels assembled into three pieces and pinned for general shape. Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern in green velvet. Mostly machine stitched.
The pattern calls for topstitching along the seams of the crown panels, which might suggest either matching or contrasting thread.
#millinery

Top view before I sew the crown halves together. Reviewing the how-to video. I see Sachi is using a few tiny spring clips during sewing instead of pinning the whole seam.

A bit of a messy join on the eight panels coming together at the peak of the newsboy cap, so I am thinking a larger button may be in order to disguise the seams.

Crown fully pieced, with cloth covered.button at peak. Raw edges loosely tucked under. Seams neither pressed nor topstitched.
#millinery

hypo_0:
Gávdnet goassit muhtin. Mun ávddá seiviin maššá go válddo bill ja girjja saemtes. Guhtta girjja sewn, plus bill, gávdnet ášši paperiid mielde go pattern. Mun máhta buorrit ja re-seamma maššá stitch, dan geavvet muhtin dego mun pinna gohččii mulkkut ja válddo mai wanearga. Mun ávkkit re-do bill jos mun váldde muorra jietna.
#millinery

Gáhččat girjjaskapmái ja guokte bill girjjaskapmái assámma go dálkkis ja pinna go dárbmakka. Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern i áhkka velvet. Geahččat maššá sewn.
Pattern ávttá topstitching girjjaskapmái, dego seammá earret ja guovttut stædime.
#millinery

Top view állin go mun sewalu girjja guokteni. Aikkanit go video. Mun geafal Sachi máhtá masás troubek; mun slejdan seammás go ahte juohke seam.

Bártnuhkkahkat go guokte girjjaskapmái gávdnet iávka, dakkár mun lean dásse maŋŋá button muhtiin go siŋŋa seammas.

Girjja deavkit, mii vuođđa álugoju.button ega guoibma. Rougga eret lohkat. Seams ii gierttuhte ii topstitched.
#millinery

Gávdnet muhtin goassit. Mun ávddá seiviin maššá bill ja girjja seamma. Guhtta girjja sewn ja bill, gávdnet ášši paperiid mielde go pattern. Mun máhta buorrit ja re-seamma maššá stitch, dan geavvet guovttá go ahte mun pinna muhtin dego ii vai mearrá. Mun ávkkit re-do bill jos mun váldde muorra jietna.
#vuođđo

Guhtta girjjaskapmái ja guokte bill girjjaskapmái assámma go dálkkis ja pinna go dárbmakka. Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern i áhkka velvet. Geahččat maššá sewn.
Pattern ávttá topstitching girjjaskapmái, dego seammá earret ja guovttut stædime.
#vuođđo

Top view áŋgiru go mun sewalu girjja guokteni. Aikkanit go video. Mun geafal Sachi máhtá masás troubek; mun sleeje seammás go ahte juohke seam.

Bártnuhkkahkat go guokte girjjaskapmái gávdnet iávka, dakkár mun lean dásse muorra button guovttut go siŋŋa seammas.

Girjja deavkit, mii vuođđa álugoju.button ega guoibma. Rougga eret lohkat. Seams ii gierttuhte ii topstitched.
#vuođđo

1
Stephen King: submitted for the approval of the midnight
Elon Musk [rising from bushes]: eeyyyyy stephano king
Barker: hey look steve it's your best friend
King: goddamnit clive
King: we're not
King: elon what do you want this time

2
Musk: stephano king i aska you fora da last time
Musk: why you no lika me
Musk: we so mucha da same, lika two peas inna pod
King: how do you figure that?
Musk:
Musk: mama mia you contradicta me?
Musk: maybe you a pedophile

3
King: see, elon, this is the problem
King: you're just being immature
Musk: mama mia ima very mature
Musk: lika my boy you know he very based
Musk: you shoulda introduce himma to your boy
King: i don't think so
Musk: mama mia itsa great idea!!

@bitterkarella
King [chuckling]: Hello, Very Based. I'm Steve.
Very Based Musk: Hi, Steve. I'm very impressed you got my name right away, most people need it explained.
King: Wha, I thought I was making a joke.

source_doc:
In a surprise Inspector Clouseau twist, I now have an extra thing to investigate for Spooky Kitties Sciences!
I was doing a quick scroll through the evenings secondary camera video, when I spotted a curious The Inspector standing on the trunk of the tree near the feeding station. Kept jumping around, finding him near where the magpies had been, so I initially suspect(edit) he was simply chasing them as they sometimes let him do, until I randomly chance stop...
#SpookyKittiesSciences

There Inspector Clouseau was, rolling around like crazing about 2 meters NE of the tree, mostly hidden by the unfortunate placement of the awnings east post. Still, there he was for 5 minutes, at which point he ran back up the tree, walked across the lawn to the hill, flattened himself at the bottom, and then ran off camera, presumably in the middle of The Zoomies.
2/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

Now, as some of my Spooky Kitties Sciences readers may know, the motivations behind that tests are not just to entertain the kitties. While the most important aspect is the genuine curiosity I had seeing the kitties rolling around in the snow, I really wanted to find something that The Inspector liked. I came out of the initial testing with only a single moment to hint that he liked something. What that was is still a mystery.
3/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

hypo_0:
Oahpahuvvon Inspector Clouseau -kievdagi, mun lean muhto ekstra ashtu šatnagu Spooky Kitties Sciences!
Muni fánan geahččalan gávdnojuvvo eará kammera video, ja mun čábbaš utnes buddas Inspectora caggaga go ruhtto, nagot čuovvot madtis suohkkanusat. Mun hálidan heaittannin utnesgo buot maivvat, muhto muhtumin maid buvva njálggo, ahte dehket mun čuovvot heaittuhit...
#SpookyKittiesSciences

De ahte Inspector Clouseau lea, jogguhuvvon ja søddågo 2 metri NE ruhtto, maid ii lea duogasu ovddiduvvon almmuheapmái árvvar. Muhto, de ahte lea 5 minuttas, ja de de arrajuháhagge ruhtto, gávdnojuvvojda gávdnohe šalpim, vuorkkágebi gávdnojuvvon, ja de jogge earágikka ruvvbamin, muhto juohkamuš juvvit muhto The Zoomies.
2/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

Gávdno ja de, ahte muohta tásahuvvot Spooky Kitties Sciences -báikčášat mannat, motivášuvvohko mánnáda ieš maivva kittii, ii son maiddai muhtoset buot. Jahkku máttasa go leamni cennat eardaga kin. Mun fápmis ruhtto беддá vástádusa buot is´sjeatnan aŋkkáložat. Dát lea mánnáda go nahča innan.
3/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

hypo_3:
Oahpahuvvon Inspector Clouseau -kievdagi, mun lean muhto ekstra ashtu šatnagu Spooky Kitties Sciences!
Muni fánan geahččalan gávdnojuvvo eará kammera video, ja mun čábbaš utnes daidda Inspectora go ruhtto caggaga, nagot čuovvot madtis suohkkanusat. Mun hálidan beaivvi mabma, ja dehket mii buvva njálggo, ahte de maivvat hálddahii buot, hasta mun rohkkan hámmamin...
#SpookyKittiesSciences

De ahte Inspector Clouseau lea, jogguhuvvon ja søddågo 2 metri NE ruhtto, maid ii lea duogasu ovddiduvvon almmuheapmái árvvar. Muhto, de ahte lea 5 minuttas, ja de de arrajuháhagge ruhtto, gávdnojuvvojda gávdnohe šalpim, vuorkkágebi gávdnojuvvon, ja de jogge earágikka ruvvbamin, muhto juohkamuš juvvit muhto The Zoomies.

source_doc:
Tinkering with my stereo system this week has got me thinking about an oddity that I've never been able to get to the bottom of...let's see if the Mastodon hive mine can help.
The amp is a Philips FA454 and the CD Player is a Philips CD150.
According to the amp manual I can connect the units with a "8-pole DIN to 5-pole DIN + 2 x single-pole CINCH" cable."
I take this to mean an 8 pin din to a 5 pin + stereo RCA cable...which sounds cursed.
Never been able to find one. Can anyone make one?

The service manual for the amp is nice and clear (picture 2 in above toot), but I can't find anything as nice for the CD player. I've attached a picture (picture 4 in the above toot) from the service manual that I *think* is the relevant section.
Currently I have the CD player hooked up with just the RCA cables and it all works fine, but if I could find/make the correct Din to Din + RCA cable then I could use some additional functionality and free up the only RCA stereo inputs on my amp.

There's a repair café this weekend in the town where I live...if I'm still puzzling over it all by then I might take it all along there and see if they can help me hack together a cable.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Oainnit mu stereo järjestelma dásis ođđas viikko šatoga mu mielde ja mii almmustit odne mii mu vázzot duššat...let's see if the Mastodon hive mine can help.
Ampis lea Philips FA454 ja CD-plehtas lea Philips CD150.
Čitnaga ampma manuala mun sáhttá vezžat ehčá "8-pole DIN ja 5-pole DIN + 2 x single-pole CINCH" kábbát.
Mun garra čájeh 8 pin din ja 5 pin + stereo RCA kábbá...mii lea geahččat go likar ráhkis.
Allet duššat ráhkis. Mii dahkatke ðett?

Service manuala ampisa lea buorre ja čállán (mielde 2 nissona ávžžuda), muhto mun allet ráhkis čájeh mii buorre tulle CD-plehtasa. Mun ohcán nissona (mielde 4 nissona ávžžuda) service manualas mii *geahččá* lea válddahnus.
Ođđas mun lean CD-plehtasa ábbudan bearu RCA kábbás ja de čorra buot, muhto jis mun sáhttá ráhkis/mátká correct Din ja Din + RCA kábbá šaddat ráhkis guokte addá funkšionálit ja friga mu ampis aiddai RCA stereo gáhtid.

De lea repair café dán beaivvi duoddari moai mun vielja...jos mun jorba ovdal sihka de namma mina muhtumin du jámii ja geahččá sihkar ćeatko mii sáhtta bogde mu gáhtáka kodekkes.

source_doc:
and it's not a bad film — it's a spectacular-looking one in spots — but it is also a film entirely made out of other, better and more thematically cohesive films. so it's 2001 and the three-body problem and arrival and wall-e a little bit, but it's also Quips Sexyman Saves The World Part XVII and ultimately just not that lot

while watching i wondered why the earth needed to be in peril, and if the other two members of the multicultural crew dying to leave the White Man in charge was some kind of an anti-woke statement; but in light of some of the book author andy weir's 'most media literate libertarian' comments about how star trek should be just about spaceships going pew-pew, at least to him the answer is yes to the latter and 'fascism' to the former

@esvrld I read the book a little while back and I may have given him too much credit, especially given his recent decision to open his mouth, but I took the death of the international crew to strand the white boy as an understanding that his second book failed because he is not any good at writing people interacting with each other and his only skill is creating clever little puzzles for his self-insert to solve in complete isolation. Giving him an alien buddy was a good move because it opens the possibility of character interaction without requiring it to resemble the way humans relate to one another

source_doc:
Melbourne Renegades host Glenn Maxwell and the Melbourne Stars at Marvel Stadium in BBL15 after Usman Khawaja and Brisbane Heat host Sydney Thunder

Sam Harper dominated with 82 not out off 51 balls and Glenn Maxwell recalled the feeling of ball on bat in a subdued innings of 20 not out off 17 balls, which included one massive six. He has not lost his ability and would have enjoyed the chance to spend time in the middle.

The crowd of 42,846 was not given the contest they hoped for as the Stars won the match by eight wickets with 25 balls remaining.

It keeps Melbourne Stars in contention as they break a three-match losing sequence and makes life hard for Melbourne Renegades. Marcus Stoinis bowled well to take 3-33 and was on a hat-trick at one stage while Harper is in great form having hit 356 runs at a strike rate of 159 for the tournament. He was man-of-the-match.

Tom Rogers bounced back with a fast 50 against Melbourne Renegades

But it was all over once Tom Rogers helped himself to 50 off 19 balls to start the innings with an opening partnership of 84 with Harper.

"They outplayed us at the "G so it was nice to get our fifth win," Harper told Fox Cricket.

Most interesting were the comments from the Fox Cricket commentary box where former England captain Michael Vaughan made it clear how disappointed he was with the way the English hierarchy handled a nightclub incident involving Harry Brook in New Zealand before they arrived in Australia for The Ashes.

Melbourne Stars veteran Peter Siddle said "it was a good turnaround" with the win pushing the team back into second spot on the BBL table.

It's starting to heat up with three games remaining for Melbourne Renegades and two matches for Melbourne Stars.

There is still plenty of cricket left this summer so keep tuning in. Thanks for following. Can the Stars finally win the title?
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Melbourne Renegades johtá Glenn Maxwell ja Melbourne Stars á Marvel Stadion BBL15, go Usman Khawaja ja Brisbane Heat johtá Sydney Thunder

Sam Harper muitala 82 eai go 51 balla ja Glenn Maxwell máhccuhit balla ja bátta mápmá sierra dajja 20 eai go 17 balla, mii sisdoalli okta muohto siks.

42,846 áššis čuovga ii sániidan lotta mii dihtii, go Stars vázzá goažžá okti viikká 25 ballat.

Dat lohká Melbourne Stars álbmotvárjálast ja he faŧŧorvuokko ulla niŋga ovddos açelihkká go Melbourne Renegades boŋkki. Marcus Stoinis don ábmi go 3-33 ja jánnge sierra máttaráddi go euvttalaga, muhto Harper lea eallime magkka vaikká dehkket 356 ruvnna go 159 šaŋŋat so biebmadus. Son lea matchin-báhčči.

Tom Rogers lea gehččat ja buorre 50 geatnâgo Melbourne Renegades

Muhto dat lea čuejji go Tom Rogers mulkko 50 go 19 ballat ja gávdne eallime go 84 ballat Harper ja.

"Sii ahte muitala miesteit "G" go mii boazá go muohta meidän vihtemĺka," Harper njiellá Fox Cricket.

Maŋŋá mátko nuora go Fox Cricket cealkkahat ja ibi šalkká Michael Vaughan njiellá ahte go disum buorre oskádus ahte ožžis jahkkimmerkeha Harry Brook deččariiga olgo New Zealand go eai jahttad näkku udnigá bielvudus The Ashes.

Melbourne Stars árjasi Peter Siddle njiellá "de lea buorre ovděhuvvoz" go fálgá vánáborahus okti 2. álbmotvárjálast BBL cenná.

Dat lehpet njeeđe go Melbourne Renegades lea šaddat eabbi bielvudus ja buorre 2 eallit so Melbourne Stars.

Dat lea máŋggá geatnogo vuollát go báyes daid eabbi so das guđit. Giitu deánndegá. Nii uhka Stars máŋŋá teimmi gihtá?

hypo_4:
Melbourne Renegades johdá Glenn Maxwell ja Melbourne Stars Marvel Stadionas BBL15, go Usman Khawaja ja Brisbane Heat johdá Sydney Thunder

Sam Harper dominerade go 82 eai go 51 balla ja Glenn Maxwell muistas balla ja bátta hámmar 20 eai go 17 balla, mii sisdoalli muohta muhto siks. Son ii heahuiga dheahe ja son oaidná muohta muhto mátkkuhe go muitala eallime.

42,846 áššis čuovga ii sániidan lotta mii dihtii go Stars vázzá goažžá okti viikká 25 ballat rájes.

Dat lohká Melbourne Stars álbmotvárjálast go sii vázzá okti vuoddaguovtti ja lohká Melbourne Renegades buorus. Marcus Stoinis dohkála go 3-33 ja lea váhnja hátnaga vuođđo máttaráddi go de addehar Harper lea goit sen váná sállat 356 ruvnna go 159 šaŋŋat so biebmadus. Son lea váhnja-máŋggam.

Tom Rogers lea geahča go bohtet 50 geatnâgo Melbourne Renegades

Muhto dat lea čuejji go Tom Rogers muhtuva 50 go 19 ballat ja gávdne eallime go 84 ballat Harper ja.

"Sii ahte muitala miesteit "G" go mii boazá go muohta meidän vihtemĺka," Harper njiellá Fox Cricket.

Dál lea mátko nuora go Fox Cricket cealkkahat ja ibi šalkká Michael Vaughan njiellá ahte go disum buorre oskádus ahte ožžis jahkkimmerkeha Harry Brook deččariiga olgo New Zealand go eai jahttad näkku udnigá bielvudus The Ashes.

Melbourne Stars árjasi Peter Siddle njiellá "de lea buorre ovđehuvvoz" go fálgá vánáborahus okti 2. álbmotvárjálast BBL cenná.

Dat lehpet njeeđe go Melbourne Renegades lea šaddat eabbi bielvudus ja buorre 2 eallit so Melbourne Stars.

Dat lea máŋggá geatnogo vuollát go báyes daid eabbi so das guđit. Giitu deánndegá. Nii uhka Stars máŋŋá teimmi gihtá?

source_doc:
I just had a very nice #dream that I made friends with Lee Chaeyeon. I just started talking to her nand the next thing I know, I have stayed over her house (like when the French kidnapped me for Christmas) and she is telling me to go up stairs and "shuffle up a little bit" (her English was generally excellent) by which she meant "tidy up a little bit" to show her mom we were ready to eat.
She comes upstairs to "shuffle up" her room and starts making gestures to explain what she means ...
1/

(she was always so excited to see me in this dream) because I was taking my coat off instead of "shuffling up."
Then she indicates this little piece of paper and says she has left me an autograph but in return she wants this little trading card I made in second grade of "50 Spikes," a sonic knock-off, obviously with more spikes. (This card actually exists IRL BTW). I start explaining to her what it is and if she really wants it (she did) I at least needed a picture of her holding it.
2/

Partly because I would miss it, but also, otherwise no one would believe me that she had wanted this thing from me.
It was then I realized we still didn't have each others' phone numbers.
3/3
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Mun šaddan dan naja #bávtti geahččat Lee Chaeyeon. Mun dehkkede aŋgasdaga mu geažžan ja diiŋggon eai šaddan gohččat mávssa (dánin as muotka jaŋkkorašvuođa boaris). Ja hon dehkkon mii neaddan mihkkegealbi ja “šaddan miŋket” (son ákká buot lohkan). Dánin hon ándo lea “bávttit miŋket” mii geahččat mu mánno mii geahččat meahccegeallat go mánnu go enterastui.
Son njuolggá it analizdán “šaddan miŋket” su besteden laba ja mu nābba alpen distengebmi varrasi dás: ...
1/

(son lea iv'kki go mu šaddan dán naja) nugo mun čavžii mu noaf say niŋkkŋki “šaddan miŋket.”
Dažve son mu gaččan eraš valdda ja miičii ja dóru su gahtternateigo šaddan sé zato mii tisendaarte mihtii “50 Spikes,” sonic knock-off, buot geahččat vánnar spike. (Dán ben duššos IRL BTW). Mun dehkkodah ja don kán's su mílvvas ja sihkar mu guis ja bálkko, ja eai minnásat.
2/

Ráhkkan gartá mun ilbmi, muhtumin, áŋgsa ja jaŋkk'čáni mii nu hiŋn vár'čivuhga.
Maŋimu dán muit ahte mun vieldolid oalá niŋkeattuin go hon jámot geahččat dúkkon seamtam.
3/3

Ráhkkan gartá mun ilbmi, muhtumin, áŋgsa ja jaŋkk'čáni mii nu hiŋn vár'čivuhga.
Maŋimu dán muit ahte mun vieldolid oalá niŋkeattuin go hon jámot geahččat dúkkon seamtam.
3/3

source_doc:
Campanīle
A #poetry thread
i.
A Roman church belfry,
gold cross reaching for clouds:
bell tolls, sets brass note free,
sings out through misty shroud,
its high peal an appeal
to the faithful long gone.
No more piety’s zeal:
many sunsetted dawns.
Its stone tower keeps watch
through the mask of dusk-rain,
skies loosing their barrage
upon roof tiles again.
🧵👇🏼
#poem #poemaday #moody #neoclassical #church #night #photography

ii.
Who pulled on the bell cord?
Lone monk in his cloister
with none left in accord.
He, grain in church oyster —
yet no cell holds his bed,
no dust stirred by his shoes,
his name never was said,
no old books that he used.
The bell rope hangs, worn, frayed,
gnawed by church mice’s teeth.
It’s been long since it swayed,
pulled by hands underneath.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
The night wind whispers psalms
and breathes canticles’ chant
to swing the clapper of bronze,
I answer in descant —
but not with my own voice.
The wind swallows my call,
chimes its own holy noise
with the hands of its squall.
✋🏼🧵

hypo_0:
Campanīle
A #dáiddáthread
i.
Ruoŋku gávcci belfri,
gold cross gávdná šaddán puššaid:
kella doté, freedda brass nota,
cengal dáhpáhuvvon mii misčuohtit,
sin áhkku ollut ákkel
duohtaváldda muoŋá-báđus:
nugo másiš smáhtun:
muktá vearda préttá.
Sin kive gávddi ferte
mii vearra duolgas-ráhkis,
gáhtun sávkan jávhtap
determiner fíl tabletsbuolgu.
🧵👇🏼
#dáidda #dáidadaga #múhkká #neoclassical #kyrka #natti #fotografija

ii.
Guhcča gielaidin gávli?
Oavttas monku guovddáš
nugge ore gdávdan.
Siin, čađoh urcho kirkka —
sii jáhkkádu mii joradit,
njea fridakka do allappá
siin laškkon možnoätt tomu,
nugo gúhtáddo di sănned.
Sin gávli roahka norsu,
várttur luođena úrgu.
Don dárbba go voeiri,
veitar sóras ábbet duorpu.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
Natti muotká risdáy psálmob
ja puoiko sujjá canti
dat leama clapper bronzá,
ma hainne muosun —
but nugo neavda lea mannu oro.
Gor mii šugga dárgá,
saimmat su buvta omdu
ma moundá bárnot kábhse.
✋🏼🧵

source_doc:
$partner has a video consult with Ikea to quote for a fitted kitchen. It's a fascinating glimpse into the ecosystem of online services for boomers.
1. They send link for video consult, three weeks ago. It uses Ikea's proprietary videoconf solution
2. They request the designs & 3D renders for the new kitchen
3. they send an email saying "thanks for sending through the design
4. We dial in today, they start the call with "our system blocked your files, let's design your kitchen together"
1/x

5. Partner asks if there's any way to share the (very detailed, took us like a full man week to put together) designs, but the Ikea salesdrone is on a script, and isn't having a bar of it.
6. The next step in the script is "laboriously do the design from scratch over the phone with the client, hunting and pecking on the keyboard and not fast using the UI of their design software"
2/x

7. They cannot share their screen, so it's a clown show of repeated misunderstanding about which part of which image is being referred to

8. the clock has just ticked past what should have been the full consult, and they're 35% the way thru getting the required measurements.

9. So far there's been literally 8 minutes of salesdrone laboriously inputting the measurements supplied

hypo_0:
$partner lea video konsulta Ikea mielde luittojuvvon keaivvi. Dummá dat lea áhkkun ealiid online-serviiddain boomeride.
1. Dat sendde linkki video konsulda, kolme viikkoa sitten. Dat geahččá Ikea njuolaš videoeditorivn.
2. Dat áskká dehkkáhusa ja 3D mátkkodaid eaŋgá njuolkkagiin
3. dat sendde e-meahkki, mii geahččá "buorre, kittat dehkkáhus
4. Mii dolkár uppe, dat startta volddar "mii systéma lea bláddan tihan, dakkár mii dakkar dehkkáhus ceŋkkáhaga"
1/x

5. Partner guovtta gávnná vai máhkku dakkár (nileb dakkár, mii váldde mehku manná beaivvi ja beas mánáid) dehkkáhus, muhto Ikea salgudron lea gáv'nna luohtein, ja ii dat mákkár.
6. Čáhkkim scripta lea "duoddar dehkkáhus almmuhit telefónes clientaga, gában ja viehka malbmi aplá geahčiidá uolaid/njuolččeid meahkkaguin"
2/x

7. Dat ii guovtte dehkká sin, muhto dat lea dolgku gallediidda bisser dakkár veahkekaldiid lohkkiriddain.

8. kello lea just duosttán vejjo mii geahččá lea dan dehkká toara, ja dat lea 35% dakkár dakkár searvvaid mátkkodit.

9. Mora beassat lea bivnnas niitti 8 minutta dariis salgudron jeargat dehkká vuolggu.

source_doc:
Local stable out to cash in at Coffs with four contenders

Local trainer Noel Mayfield-Smith is hoping to have a lucrative day at Sunday's Coffs Harbour meeting with four runners stepping out for the stable on the six-race card.

The Group 1-winning horseman will start his day in the second event of the day when Ausbred Yahoo contests the Komatsu Country Boosted Benchmark 58 Handicap (1605m) with two-kilogram claiming apprentice Ella Drew taking the ride.

Racing returns to Coffs Harbour on Sunday.

Ausbred Yahoo has been racing in good form with a third placing at Kempsey three starts ago being followed by two successive seconds at Coffs Harbour, the latest when beaten by Sunday's rival Caledonian.

Mayfield-Smith links with another apprentice, three-kilogram claimer Leanne Boyd, when Never Island starts in the Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

A winner of three of her 15 starts, Never Island will carry 59.5 kilograms after Boyd's allowance. Never Island was beaten less than a length when second behind Montgomery at Grafton and backed that up with a last-start fifth at Coffs Harbour behind In The Fine Print when again beaten less than a length.

Raymond Spokes takes the ride on the Mayfield-Smith-prepared Monte Cruise in the O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205m).

Monte Cruise is also a three-time winner from just the nine starts. She hasn't raced since July when finishing last of eight at Eagle Farm and has had two trials at this track in preparation for her return, finishing second behind Saturday's Wyong winner Petticoat before winning the latest of them.

Mayfield-Smith rounds out the day when he again links with Boyd when she rides Cardsharp in the Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Locála bálvaláhka leat vánkko čuovvijan Coffs čuovvahuhttin neljás ojjá.

Locála eallinmána Noel Mayfield-Smith oluhehkat ja gávdage vaikkoastis Coffs Harbour mearriduvvui sálas ojjá, mat lea čiekkariehkka ja sámiid mearriduvvui go geahččat egas pähtivuođa.

Group 1-velgableari leaver Joavduvvu muittuhit oʹdno olgan geažžuin nalika geahččuvvat, go Ausbred Yahoo geahčče čuovit Komatsu Neahtasa áhkkebas 58 Handicap (1605m) ja duožžahus ella Drew čuoibmi nuorra, mat gávdohallat.

Biretdit Ráhkadeáhkka ibbnit go gávdaduvvit Coffs Harbour sálas.

Ausbred Yahoo lea eallinmánu gávdagođii go sálas ojjá tiid čuohturi Kempsey dolgi larjjemeahti Dál en baret Káru otalet agge dušši eallinhakhin Coffs Harbour, buktuhan go guohtojala beale, Caledonian.

Mayfield-Smith gáidda eallinmána beale, kolmá-kilohkku ja cuohto ja áldár Leanne Boyd, go Never Island geahčče cárhála niga ja giikrodo ránaden 58 Handicap (1305m).

Gádduvui skuvla jávkat beale dolgi viđa Veden Skuvla, Never Island šaŋku 59.5 kilohkku Boydin eakččohagu. Never Island buktuhan máŋga raškkas guhlat go ovddas njäŋka montgomery hehttu Grafton mielde ja dárbbašatš eret gievren kahggii pákeluvva beale buktuhan áhkku In The Fine Print, go guhtas esno raškkas guhtas máná iđđes.

Raymond Spokes eallinmána muittuhit Mayfield-Smith-malle Monte Cruise O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205m).

Monte Cruise lea ákkilu siŋkkodaga govdit 9-i iđit. Lei ii eallinhakti Julai go geahččeari dahkk jelbma nilzá dievddach neahke ráhkadearrás garvvagahkku, behtti jarhkkes máná palkan ja gávdagođii kutta konga cár ridne, beale buorremižii pésp pirrun.

Mayfield-Smith geahččuvvat ojjá. Huho doikeguhte gávdagožan Boyd geahču Cardsharpin yho Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

Mayfield-Smith muittala eallinmána beale, kolmá-kilohkku ja cuohto ja áldár Leanne Boyd, go Never Island geahčče Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

Gádduvui skuvla jávkat beale dolgi viđa 15 iđit, Never Island šaŋku 59.5 kilohkku Boydin eakččohagu. Never Island buoktuhii guhkku máŋga raškkas guhlat go ovddas njäŋka Montgomery hehttu Grafton mielde ja dárbbašat in eknamgu varran miella go beale háldde In The Fine Print.

Raymond Spokes eallinmána muittuhit Mayfield-Smith-malle Monte Cruise O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205m).

Monte Cruise lea ákkilu siŋkkodaga govdit 9-i iđit. Lei ii eallinhakti Julai go géahččeari babe iđit Eagle Farm ja ollu fáris jođihuvvá bealuá dárbbašin guhkku, geahččii bealge nu hárju jorvás áhkku irgôjheltu go dalde pogo.

Mayfield-Smith geahččuvvat ojjá, idja go muittala Boyd geahču Cardsharpin yho Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

source_doc:
@rechelon extremely unpopular is one way of putting it… i don’t live in berlin but i think people everywhere had roughly the same response, which is “fuck these assholes for doing something that leaves so many uninvolved people without electricity and treating it like necessary collateral damage”. I’ve seen lots of people speculate that it was a false flag to make the left look bad. Not that the cops care, they are probably giddy with excitement now (a gross thing to imagine) that they have a pretense to raid and criminalize the leftist scene.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Yeah, I mean it seems like there's still about half a dozen anticivs raised on meme accounts who are shocked the scene didn't stand with them, but are extremely shocked that old timer anticivs who felt disrespected by said crew and haven't backed them.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
I do worry that we'll see a self-justification spiral where a handful of anticivs get so mad at the movement for not supporting their super based attack on the civilized that they end up in ITS level shit within a year or two of isolation and seething.

hypo_0:
@rechelon dálkkádeaddji lea okta muhtun jearran... mun ii livččon Berliinás, mutta mun gáldu ahte fáppa geatná hálddahallamat jearrahte, mii lea "hárjjat dán váidnemiin dajvvaid ja heahkki čájehit iskkai muohto ruhtadeaddji". Muni manná geavahit muohtuna gávdnevuhtii ahte dán lea váhnan mehčen duššedje dárbbašvuođas. Ii ahte politihkkarat gávdno, mii leat dakkár veahkkin mátkku ja ohtát báhtsá seala mii heive skáne dárbbašvuođa.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Jah, mun čállet ahte lea gánni muhtun akšuvvásdagaš tākká geahččat memehkkarvuhte, geat leat gávdnaldi ihháris maŋimuš mátkku, muhto lea dálkkádeaddji ahte guhkáto dárbbahallamat geat leat mannat jeadálak sagas mvhdne


.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Mun máŋggá ahte mus lea lávka akta selffáhkkula daid geat máttá geažum galggašedje mátkkus vánkamusiin mii dagá searvvi ja hárjjá ahte dán lea it banjalu hájdira.

source_doc:
Good Morning Worlds!
We are going to the tip this morning. It will clear some of the stuff we sorted yesterday from the drive. I don't think we can clear it all unless we took the trailer, but the trailer is full of steel for weighing in.
Later I might carry on packing tote crates.
#GoodMorningWorlds

Tip trip done, and another car load cleared out.
I have taken the new trailer axle, and trailer drive motor system, out of the scrap metal trailer load. That means we can get more scrap metal in there and also not accidentally weigh in the parts I want to keep.
I think, next, I will start moving the scrap steel from the back garden into the trailer so that it is ready to go.
Scrap steel prices are not very high at the moment but better than nothing, if I take enough of it in one go.
Still have to sort the non-ferrous scrap.

That thing when you are taking the rotten tyres off small, wide lawn tractor wheels....
Huge effort to unmount one side of the tyre, but it was really badly rusted tight on the other side of the rim.
In the time it took me to break the bead free, I'd forgotten I had already done the other side, and ended up with the rim free but completely inside the tyre!
I had to remount the tyre that side, and then work around it to get the rim out.
I had to cut up the inner tube to get that out too!
I wonder how many more tyres I need to unmount? Four done so far.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Bures mieggo, ráhkadit!
Mun lean válddán tip-mearkkas doaimma. Dat sáhtá háliidit dušše nuppi, mii ferte válddit eallin ja ádjá. In háliidit juohke on, jos mun válddá traílá, muhto traílá lea dollo ferte boazodoalli.
Vähta mun sáhtán lohkkan trykkedoddá.
#BuresMieggoRáhkadit

Tip-govvat leat dohkkejuvvon, ja ovddas billa fuotnassit.
Mun lean válddán nuora traílá axel, ja traílá doaimma motor sistem, máŋga vuođđu traílá dollo. Dat meahcá mii sáhtá borat muđus lágiin ja in háliidit juohke partta mii mun áiggun sihkkarit.
Mun háliidit, boahtte mun válddán borat muđus dárkkabargii ássi traílá, áššis dat lea ferte válddit.
Borat čáppat veahkkinat ii leat maŋŋá veččat, muhto buorre go in midju, jos mun válddá gohcan dušša.
Dan áiggo mun lehket aná-sapmi fárre.

Dat dánkáldá go di ibban jierkan kásun, gillil aorra-sujje...
Hárkko geahččadi sohkta boroka easkkkud, muhto dat lea vázzá go hárkin gpon boktá.
Dat másta ahte gii mun fermeredigan sohkta odne, ja válddu gohkka boroka frea muhtii nuppan dahje!
Mun áiggi válddá áššis sohkta dán biebres, ja juttá veddá gofko borka frea.
Mun áigi lohdnan muhte mii edne sohkta? Viertta leat janne tuhtukta.
