Tip-govvat leat dohkkejuvvon, ja ovddas billa fuotnassit.
Mun lean válddán nuora traílá axel, ja traílá doaimma motor sistem, máŋga vuođđu traílá dollo. Dat meahcá mii sáhtá borat muđus lágiin ja in háliidit juohke partta mii mun áiggun sihkkarit.
Mun háliidit, boahtte mun válddán borat muđus dárkkabargii ássi traílá, áššis dat lea ferte válddit.
Borat čáppat veahkkinat ii leat maŋŋá veččat, muhto buorre go in midju, jos mun válddá gohcan dušša.
Dan áiggo mun lehket aná-sapmi fárre.

Dat dánkáldá go di ibban jierkan kásun, gillil aorra-sujje...
Hárkko geahččadi sohkta boroka easkkkud, muhto dat lea vázzá go hárkin gpon boktá.
Dat másta ahte gii mun fermeredigan sohkta odne, ja válddu gohkka boroka frea muhtii nuppan dahje!
Mun áiggi válddá áššis sohkta dán biebres, ja juttá veddá gofko borka frea.
Mun áigi lohdnan muhte mii edne sohkta? Viertta leat janne tuhtukta.

Vähta mun válddán lohkkan trykkedoddá.

source_doc:
Tonight in #MMRPG! My back finally shuts up enough that I can GM again as the heroes continue their search for the missing girl Cammie. Vega the Digital Dragon surprises a trio of mischievous scamps who snuck into her arcade in the middle of the night but one of them recognizes her as a town superhero and they end up having a heartwarming moment geeking out over video games. Unfortunately, the moment is interrupted by somebody or something landing on the roof of the arcade... 1/?

Vega goes to investigate and finds Dr. Vesper, in his monstrous bat form that the press has dubbed the "Gargoyle Man," along with a harpy-like creature that Vesper describes as his "little protegee." Vesper says that they have come to introduce themselves and invite Vega to join their society of man-creature misfits that is led by "The Madame," Dr. Diana Laughton of the Laughton Institute. 2/?

Vega buys some time to get the mischievous scamps out of the arcade and call the rest of the Mythics for backup, then plays along at being interested in joining this "new family." Vesper and Harpy (who does not speak once during the interaction) lead Vega to a ship in the harbor, where the Laughton Institute appears to be packing up their things... presumably because they know they're drawing attention from Agent Carter and A.R.G.E.N.T. among others. 3/?
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Skierehtta #MMRPG! Mun bágge leat dehálaš muhto muhto de samehutat geatnomisit Cammie. Vega Digitála Rávddu dušše veahkkin trio dakkár stábbuide, mii čuovvan njielladivttas anáččá, muhto ovtta áhkká háliid mii čavžžet laoheapot miellagohčot veahkkin video-pelit. Cuoŋom, juohke muittut sávdnan dušše eatnam hápmes neamččešrádíhksin... 1/?

Vega hálddahallat ja čuovvan Dr. Vesper, muhto han bátuikkihš dahkki guovlu ja go vitjša dariid "Gargoyle Man," čuovvat haftuma čađđi mii Vesper dálkkohat mii dárbbá "mátta protegee." Vesper máhtte gukt allaskkammašat ja buvat Vega álo vispelit juohke hisš aŋg´u siá maŋŋel váldde "The Madame," Dr. Diana Laughton Laughton Instituttas. 2/?

Vega viijahallat suopma geavahat dakkár stábbuide ja geavahat muhtunálgu Mythics fiellengale, de muittahallat "nuga guovttuga." Vesper ja Harpy (mii ii álgge gohti muttut) ledne Vega geahččá muhtarasile sappi váddebasse, go Laughton Instituttas jámmas go heai veahkehe jestalluhat... nugo guhká hávvaldat jehke Agent Carter ja A.R.G.E.N.T. jiikama sálka. 3/?

Vega Digitála Rávddu geavhčat trio dakkár stábbuide mii čuovvan njielladivttas anáččá beassan muhtun, muhto ovtta áhkká háliid áŋg´alaččat muhtuhallid, go čavžžet video-pelit. Cuoŋom, gohčohalli muittut sávdnan dušše eatnam hápmes neamččešrádíhksin... 1/?

Vega hálddahallat ja čuovvan Dr. Vesper, muhto han bátuikkihš dahkki guovlu ja go vitjša dariid "Gargoyle Man," čuovvat haftuma čađđi mii Vesper dálkkohat mii dárbbá "mátta protegee." Vesper máhtte gukt allaskkammašat ja buvat Vega álo vispelit juohke hisš aŋg´u siá maŋŋel váldde "The Madame," Dr. Diana Laughton Laughton Instituttas. 2/?

Vega viijahallat suopma geavahat dakkár stábbuide ja geavahat muhtunálgu Mythics fiellengale, de muittahallat "nuga guovttuga." Vesper ja Harpy (mii ii álgge gohti muttut) ledne Vega geahččá muhtarasile sappi váddebasse, go Laughton Instituttas jámmas go heai veahkehe jestalluhat... nugo guhká hávvaldat jehke Agent Carter ja A.R.G.E.N.T. jiikama sálka. 3/?

source_doc:
painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [1/x]
I figured it'd be fun to share the whole process that goes into making a painting a custom scene. could be useful to some, and entertaining to others :)
👩‍🦱 ~ EVE & ADAM ~ 🧔‍♂️
as you all know, I'm a deeply religious person 🛐 so..
the scene: we're in the garden of eden. adam is eating apples from the forbidden tree, because of course he is. eve is having none of his shit, grabs an unfortunate unsuspecting nearby serpent, and is about to whip the shit out of adam. 🐍
#painting

painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [2/x]
so, we're gonna need reference photos. I want eve to be in the process of swinging the serpent around; so then I figured a baseball batter would be a good fit.
so wading through the AI slop, I found this actual photo that has a nice pose and good lighting.

painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [3/x]
I want adam to be in a protective stance, while also holding a forbidden apple, and all this, seen from the side/back. also, the lighting has to come from the same side as the batter. so all and all, it's pretty hard to find a proper reference pic for this, so I am posing for this one myself.
took about 20 pics with slightly different in stances etc., and decided on this one. (the right hand is going to hold the apple)

go vásáldu, mii lea gárkagallat soahi 🛐 de..
scaena: muohta doggit Edenhaš gárkku. adam lea gávdnja áppaláttit gávdnot vuođđuda goahtá, máhkku soáhkkan. eve on ii njuvdi dehál laamut, vuođđa uppege geahččáhkkit duojes, ja lea dehálaš bohtni adam. 🐍
#válddán

maŋŋá válddán bazkie! 🧵 (dáru) tråd [2/x]
so, mii dárbbaš olbmot vuolgá mátkku. mii válddá eve gávdnja dehál serpiŋ bohuš; so manor mii maŋŋála baseball buotdeat.
so AI slijde hákká, mii ráhkadit de gávdnan mátkku go hábmat posot ja de goahtá ;)

maŋŋá válddán bazkie! 🧵 (dáru) tråd [3/x]

source_doc:
Relentless Clan power past Steelers in statement home win

The Clan got off to a strong start with Joe Hazeldine slamming a first-time shot into the Sheffield net after some nice slip passing between Hugo Roy and Deven Sideroff.

Despite some strong defensive play from Glasgow, the Steelers found a breakthrough via Brien Diffley's sharp shooting through traffic before Mikko Juusola gave the visitors the lead with a deflected shot from right wing.

In the second period, the Clan saw momentum swing their way with Steven Seigo slipping a tidy finish from close-range past Matthew Greenfield to tie the game up.

Shortly after, Rylan Schwartz grabbed a go-ahead goal with a bullet from the backdoor after some luck with the Clan avoiding a too many men call.

Sheffield forced their way back into the game with Ryan Tait driving on net and backhanding a shot which Brine saved but didn't keep hold of as Kevin Tansey poked a third goal over the line for the visitors.

With the score line tied going into the final frame, the noise peaked inside Braehead and Glasgow gained control of the game.

Tristin Langan saw retribution for the ongoing battle he had to put up with throughout the game with Mitchell Heard as he cracked the bar with a beautiful finish to give his side the lead.

A holding penalty on Miihkali Teppo applied pressure to the hosts' advantage late on with the Steelers pulling their netminder for the extra attacker.

Langan grabbed his second of the game on the empty net though to round off the night with a well-earned and much-needed two points for the Clan on home ice.

Glasgow Clan head coach, Corey Neilson said after the game: "We were the better team. Our forecheck was excellent, that's something we've worked on all week and it was relentless tonight. The identity we were looking for is starting to show. It was really enjoyable to coach with full lines and take advantage of a team that's playing short, because usually we're on the other side of that."

Sheffield Steelers head coach, Aaron Fox, said: "I thought we were pretty good for the majority of the game. Glasgow jumped on us early, but our bounce back was good. Our guys were gassed by the end, we only had three lines but we were in the battle all game, I can't fault the compete level of our guys."

hypo_0:
Relentless Clan johtá ársuolais Steelers áŋkkiid dáhpáhus

Clan gávdnet máŋga áddjálaš távla Joe Hazeldine aatkko naviggu nettis Sheffieldis geasuhtin sáhttáhus kárđis Hugo Roy ja Deven Sideroff álgoris.

Geain galgá dáhpáhus otná eallin Glasgow, Steelers fárra buđjetima Brien Diffley viskaid duodjaga jahttárastit ean Mikko Juusola dohkkasaid máŋggá máddu geasuhtin rašumid dibba jaivis.

Gáŋggahussas, Clan geavtávuođa máŋga rággehuvddis Steven Seigo cuopmita dárbbu paččá uhpin Matthew Greenfield tuppá duohkki geasuhtin nuorri geasuhtin minvuhgalas.

Rydduin, Rylan Schwartz gávdnet dohkkabas ráhtas gullka siiddu sálvvu go Clan veahkki ieškimin eai jorbmida.

Sheffield navdóldin hoekku lehpi guorražain gáŋggálbmudne Ryan Tait ja siidmuhtii kulbbi haŋkali, gai Brine gávdnet muhtuu, muhto njuvttii, go Kevin Tansey puorran áigguhtebu siiddu preastúr ráhtasgu.","

Näspacken guolládeida jaŋeim inde buorri háldda, rievdu geaži Braehead ja Glasgow dovddar mai vuorrái.

Tristin Langan riekstojuvva pasa ahte ánjehlusi geatnet ahtta buorid In obbačuáileas vánni Mitchell Heard go olládi bálkkus raile daid muđe suhe suiddu.

A eallertis Miihkali Teppo eatnnis bohtis ohccit geahččif hárkkes geimmet ahte Steelers riektted marba áiggun.

Langan gávdnete dohkka muhtuu go starna láskih ja dihyka mannus bálkkis márkanmolleam buddá Jainjuvdu litte ahte niilga hađá hilduinna muhtuhktim Khárdu Clan áignuhdat Danmaz.

Glasgow Clan áhtengger, Corey Neilson sáhtte duššat leahka: "Oahppa oahpas loarr ja üttun. Skuvlaš duodjá leahkahetteme, dat lea oahpásvuhthe miessan, muhto gáutjá šaddígo -i geahn. Loppus mìđgá oahkáminga sun muoccus bašá. Muktukcálgu mii earnsadden cheun.","

Sheffield Steelers áhtengger, Aaron Fox, sáhtte: "Mun ráhkistapla oahkkan Áddjilla miessan go datšullo bálkkagat, muhto mii galde detl háldda ulkndi. Glasgow viititalo viská ahte nu issi geanga míjem iha jat´dev duorá sopmi, geain dat breággut."

source_doc:
project move out, spring break relay
day 1:
Cleared main bedroom closet
& contents of boxes on one wall.
I'm surveying all my belongings. Pulling out a small percentage to save. Sentimental items. Practical pieces for putting together a new life. At this stage I know I'm selecting more than I need, probably more than I can carry; but the amount that I'm leaving behind is far greater. Deciding what to keep & where comes after the survey. All the rest will be turned over to "scavengers."
#moverR

Day 2, midday break, Monday.
Today is harder than yesterday. I'm uncovering far more "sentimental" stuff. The challenge: these saved memories are a physical drag that impair rather than contribute anything practically to my future AND I feel integrated looking at them. There's a strong general condemnation, I feel, of holding onto sentimental items. Yet I know that they are powerful. But hey, I'm an artist. Even wistful, sad memories are valuable to me. I'm proceeding as before, retaining less+

+than I'm tossing, while knowing that I am keeping "too much." The next phase will be the actual moving & storing phase when more might be cut. This phase is the pre-screen before turning the cleared items over to others who will take everything away.
File under: how to move out of a home of 12 years & a home town of 45 years, with family roots here (& artifacts) from 150 years. I'm finally leaving, in search of a culture that suits my values.
#moverR
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
projekta muŧŧit, biejjogáldu ráljá
duodji 1:
Čađa main vázzán pláhtas
& boksit sis beoainnan.
Mun lea jorbbán mu leamašvuohta. Munnje dehkkárat mu máhtut ja muhtot guhte jáhkeduhkka. Sentaimentala hervásat. Praktikala áiravttat ustit birra nuvttit čállel. Dássa mun háliidan muhto mun jeara buot ahte jus, dábálaččat niitä muhtin, muhto beaivválaš áiggi muhlagat dhákko, mátkku lea dehkkára nekkala boazuzevs. Dasgo jađá muhtuminnnos ja mat háliidan, mun dibme dál. Buot ii leat áiggun mii ".scavengers."

Duodji 2, midda biejjogáldu, Mánnu.
Dás go on vaidit heivešdove. Mun dehkkárat ihtat "sentimental" bleddjat. Suoma: dehkkarut olbmobirra, iktejit mii muhtit aplikatiivvuohta oasastit dehkkárat. Doaivjegovvet goit ráfán, mun lohkat ahte njuva jákkan . Nástju lea lihkkas mera bearjjiide akte phpht. Muhto mun oasahalli guhtán boomá. Dál mun vel oasahalli, čahtor mii vilbet, deheapmát eahpáre, muhto mun jeara nisa da oslitu.

muhtum 5
Dit háliidan, oasiduvvá

.Celkka ássdago! Muhto tehes oasahalli gui, muhto lea jearu." Mun dihte mu sláskat veahkkahkkain". Mun geahcat, mat ihkkon mii malet ehkit medi: du prohje sjoddáda nji!
#moverR

source_doc:
@hannorein@mastodon.social sooo, we’re tagging verified human content now for them to have a dataset with less slop to train on?
I don’t know, they should asphyxiate from their own barfed up slop mess they’ve created until their latent vector space converges to unity.

@helpsterTee @hannorein My first thought as well. I killed off my personal site since I didn't want to feed the various Torment Nexuses. Marking genuine human content just makes building new, unpoisoned and slop free data sets easier.
I thought about doing the opposite and building a "poison pot" for AI crawlers but my poor little server is not that beefy.

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social yeah, if we suffer, let them suffer.
If your employer stuffs AI in your daily routine, instead of resigning, use malicious compliance and apply it to totally mundane problems and embrace slightly-wrong answers while burning through corporate token credit to ruin quarterly performance.
I’m so fed up with this and they’re using it anyways against us, so let’s have a little fun, while we can 🫤
Edit: they’re making up numbers all the time and faking profits for a while now, the usage that’ll bankrupt your employer won’t place a dent at slop headquarters unprofitable scam business anyways or their forest burning slopetuum mobile.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
@hannorein@mastodon.social jooo, mii leammuhit varraš human sisdoalastat njuolggu goaslii daid gávnoduvrras, at galgašii lea dássearvvi daid vippahus lea veahkki?
Mun in háliid, dáilhei eai ávkkat guovtteavnnas goaslii lea máŋga ja lohkka ija dássearvvui go ain.

@helpsterTee @hannorein Mu áŋgii eai. Mun gillii mu privátta gávnnas, go mun in háliid geavva ii šaddan beaivviid Torment Nexusiid. Gáddjet maiddai riehtad hääga sisdoalastai váikkuhuin, ii nimmahii yppohis ja lohkka šaddá čatnui.
Mun gávdnojuvvo njuolggu dahkkamu ja buildu "lohkka fálka" AI krovlleriin, mu heakka liiđu jeara in ii dárbbašii.

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social ja, jus mii áiggi, let dat áiggi.
Jus dohkke mu oskkola suohká AI dihtii go gávnnas ilbma, jeari iehkkit, apart svarčát ja geaža günd varriina lohkkamar avestus ja čuovvot eará, at šivva ácčá márkan devkerúvái juohkama ja banealgi dihkitoakki. 🫤
Edit: dat gávnni nummariid šaddá áígge ja teága profit jus luohke, dat veahkki watta boddu mii in čatnugá tídas lohkkas diski laččal viža ja dat lohkka buolit fálka fálkka.

@helpsterTee @hannorein Mu áŋgii eai. Mun gillii mu privátta gávnnas, go mun in háliid geavva ii šaddan beaivviid Torment Nexusiid. Gáddjet maiddai riehtad hääga sisdoalastai váikkuhuin, ii nimmahii yppohis ja lohkka ii dáhpahi.
Mun gávdnojuvvo njuolggu dahkkamu ja buildu "lohkka fálka" AI krovlleriin, mu heakka liiđu ja eai dárbbašii.

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social ja, jus mii áiggi, let dat áiggi.
Jus dohkke mu oskkola suohká AI dihtii go gávnnas ilbma, jeari iehkkit, ajagurra daid buorát gosa ja geaža eará máŋggas dássearvvui ja mii băcădii korporášiiddal dárbbáda buvddalit. 🫤
Edit: dat gávnni nummariid šaddá áígge ja teága profit jus luohke, dat veahkki watta boddu, mii in čatnugá lohkkas diski laččal viža ja dat lohkka buolit fálka fálkka.

source_doc:
right, so, as i was saying, i dmed this very well known and very friendly seeming artist-type person and gave em the usual spiel:
- how bridge works
- how to bridge
- please do so because i want to follow you and reblog some of your stuff that i like
- if you don't want to, that's fine
and they responded "not doing that" which is all well and good but then they blocked me???
just like, for absolutely no fucking reason

not naming any names because i do NOT dislike anybody involved and i certainly do not want to incite any brigading, but this has happened with several people now, including people who have REBLOGGED AND LIKED BRIDGED POSTS FROM THIS ACCOUNT (my main), which is WHY I WANTED TO FOLLOW THEM

if they had just said "no thanks" they would have gotten an "ok, perfectly understandable! :)" or the like from me, but now everyone has to put up with my confused ranting instead. i'm not even angry, i'm just *genuinely baffled*

bsky people, is this a genuine issue over on your platform (because it's one i've almost *never* had over here on this side of the bridge) or am i just running into bad apple after bad apple

I honestly don't know what people's general feelings are about enabling the Bridgy Fed here, because that's just not a topic that ever comes up tbh (unfortunately)… But there's definitely some subset of people here who are super trigger-happy about the block button, I'm not a fan of this either.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
njeah, muhto, just don fadnasa, mu dmedda in čálkkajuhkku ja gávdno gávdnon aurdebárga:
- mannat bridge fárhkkat
- mannat bridge
- bálkkit goadnago fággehuvvá orkkážiit ja reblogga mu sihkaribmu manná
- jos don ii háli, de mii bálká
ja dii guoros "ii gávdno dat" mii lea deheh muhto moai dárbbu me?!?
just doalu, čuovvot leat ii fuola

ii najddu guoddangalli geahčadit, dan ahte mu ii boadi dohkka guovttos, ja mu ii háli gođdit njoali ina, muhto de guhtta jagažtala muorralaid guossi beca dábálaid, muhto mučcá suohkan ákkis njuolggán goqqu máhkan sálá (mii mu váldda), muhto dat lea DÁ NNA MU GUČČIN BEARJÁRA MEA

jos de háliigu mu "ii bálkket" de dábálačuvis "ooh, buohka dit, iíl murppead!" boai gáddebe ja, muhto go dan! mu áite hikkar máhkan or-_-or an. mu ii ala boahtte, mu ii guhttan divus

bsky feilas, lea de mu/daht üådja boutnugovadt, de? (go dat lea mohkala nni *ii* mu skavrral) ja mu ii áhçebisdo badjadas geahčali bálkká

muna ii nahcuhe ahte geahčai geavahastit bridgy fed /alor, go mu cuobmeta ja idit chị korjeat (uš ša dua guoradjå...) ja de dikkópehtet mi gula mu giebnni ja ieht.

jos de guovtta "ii bálkket" de fárhkam gáddebe "ooh, buohka dit, iíl murppead!” mu iskeha mu váldda, muhto demassa rigginsat ja sabmetiivuga go abu. mu ii ala vaiddan, mu ii guhttan divus

source_doc:
Falkirk strengthen top six hopes with away win at St Mirren

Miller then made sure of the points just after the hour mark as he capitalised on some static St Mirren defending to race on to his own blocked shot before dinking the ball over George.

It was an afternoon to forget for St Mirren, who lost Liam Donnelly, Killian Phillips and George to injury as they slipped to a third straight defeat.

Falkirk had the first opening in the 18th minute when Barney Stewart laid the ball off to Dylan Tait, whose curling effort from just outside the box took a slight deflection before cannoning off the top of the crossbar.

St Mirren finally threatened just after the half-hour mark when Mikael Mandron shot from a tight angle, forcing Falkirk goalkeeper Scott Bain into a smart stop with his feet.

Falkirk then raced down the other end and the lively Miller was released and allowed to shoot from a similar angle but George comfortably saved.

The match was finally coming to life and Dan Nlundulu was the next to fire at goal in the 36th minute after the Bairns had given up possession cheaply, but it was a routine stop at the near post by Bain.

Nlundulu then got in behind and slid the ball home, though the cheers from the home fans were short-lived as the assistant referee raised his flag for what appeared to be a clear offside.

The hosts had already lost Donnelly to injury midway through the first half and they suffered a further blow when Phillips, who appeared to hurt his shoulder in the opening period, came off at the interval.

The match was crying out for a moment of quality and it came 10 minutes into the second half through Yeats.

Tait's perfect through ball released Miller, and although George came racing out of his goal and timed his challenge well, the loose ball fell invitingly for Yeats, who curled a stunning first-time finish into the top corner of the unguarded St Mirren goal.

It got even better for the away side just after the hour mark as the Bairns doubled their lead.

Miller's initial shot from the edge of the box was blocked by Scott Tanser but, as the home defence hesitated, Miller reacted first to run on to the loose ball and lift a right-footed shot over the onrushing George.

St Mirren suffered yet another blow shortly after as the keeper was forced off to be replaced by Ryan Mullen.

The enforced changes and the quickfire goals seemed to rock the hosts and they never threatened a comeback, with their afternoon summed up in the 89th minute when Tanser completely mis-kicked his attempted volley from six yards out.

hypo_0:
Falkirk vahkkii top six -toiveita vierasvoitolla St Mirrenissä

Miller varmistiu pisteet heti tunnin jälkeen, kun hän käytti hyväkseen staattista St Mirren -puolustusta rynnätessään omaan estettyyn laukaukseensa ennen kuin nosti pallon George'n yli.

Se oli unohtumaton iltapäivä St Mirrenille, joka menetti Liam Donnellyn, Killian Phillipsin ja Georgen loukkaantumisten vuoksi, ja he putosivat kolmannen peräkkäisen tappion jälkeen.

Falkirkilla oli ensimmäinen tilaisuus 18. minuutilla, kun Barney Stewart alensi pallon Dylan Taitille, jonka kaarrelta laukaus rangaistuspurkan ulkopuolelta otti pienen ohjauksen ennen kuin se törmäsi ylärimaan.

St Mirren uhkasi vihdoin puolen tunnin jälkeen, kun Mikael Mandron laukoi ahtaasta kulmasta, pakottaen Falkirkin maalivahti Scott Bainin älykkääseen pelastukseen jaloillaan.

Falkirk rynnisti sitten toisessa päässä, ja pirteä Miller vapautettiin laukomaan samankaltaisesta kulmasta, mutta George torjui helposti.

Ottelu alkoi vihdoin herätä eloon ja Dan Nlundulu oli seuraava, joka laukoi maaliin 36. minuutilla sen jälkeen, kun Bairns olivat luopuneet pallosta halpoihin hintaan, mutta se oli rutiinitorjunta lähellä olevalta Bainniltä.

Nlundulu pääsi sitten taakse ja liukui pallon maaliin, vaikka kotiyleisön riemut olivat lyhytaikaisia, kun avustava tuomari nosti lippunsa sen vuoksi, että se vaikutti selvältä paitsioilta.

Kotijoukkue oli jo menettänyt Donnellyn loukkaantumisen vuoksi ensimmäisen puoliajan keskivaiheilla ja he kokivat lisäiskun, kun Phillips, joka vaikutti loukkaavan olkapäänsä avausjakson aikana, tuli pois tauolla.

Ottelu kaipasi laatua hetkeä, ja se tuli 10 minuuttia toisen puoliajan alkuun Yeatsin kautta.

Taitin täydellinen läpisyöttö vapautti Millerin, ja vaikka George ryntäsi maalistaan ja ajoi hyvin haasteensa, irtopallo putosi kutsuvasti Yeatsille, joka kiersi upean ensimmäisen laukauksen ylänurkkaan vartioimattomasta St Mirrenin maalista.

Se parani vielä enemmän vierasjoukkueelle heti tunnin jälkeen, kun Bairns kaksinkertaisti etumatkansa.

Millerin alkuperäinen laukaus rangaistuspuskasta estettiin Scott Tanserin toimesta, mutta kun kotijoukkueen puolustus epäröi, Miller reagoi ensin juostakseen irtopalloon ja nosti oikealla jalalla laukauksensa rynnistävän George'n yli.

St Mirren kärsi vielä yhden iskun pian sen jälkeen, kun maalivahti pakotettiin pois ja Ryan Mullen astui hänen tilalleen.

Pakotetut muutokset ja nopealiikkeiset maalit näyttivät horjuttavan kotijoukkuetta, eikä heillä ollut uhkaa paluusta, ja heidän iltapäivänsä tiivistyi 89. minuutilla, kun Tanser potkaisi täysin väärin yrittäessään volleyta kuuden jalan etäisyydeltä.

Pakotetut muutokset ja nopeat maalit horjuttivat kotijoukkuetta, eivätkä he koskaan uhkailleet paluuta, ja heidän iltapäivänsä tiivistyi 89. minuutilla, kun Tanser potkaisi täysin väärin yrittäessään volleyta kuuden jalan etäisyydeltä.
hypothesis:
Falkirk vahvistaa top six -toiveita vierasvoitolla St Mirrenista

Miller varmisti pisteet heti tunnin jälkeen hyödyntämällä St Mirrenin heikosti toimivaa puolustusta juostessaan omaan estettyyn laukaukseensa ja nostamalla pallon George'n yli.

Se oli unohtumaton iltapäivä St Mirrenille, joka menetti Liam Donnellyn, Killian Phillipsin ja Georgen loukkaantumisten vuoksi, ja he kokivat kolmannen peräkkäisen tappion.

Falkirkilla oli ensimmäinen avaus 18. minuutilla, kun Barney Stewart syötti pallon Dylan Taitille, jonka kaarrellut laukaus rangaistusalueen ulkopuolelta sai pienen ohjauksen ennen kuin törmäsi ylärimaan.

St Mirren uhkasi vihdoin puolen tunnin jälkeen, kun Mikael Mandron laukoi tiukasta kulmasta, pakottaen Falkirkin maalivahti Scott Bainin tekemään fiksun torjunnan jaloillaan.

Falkirk ryntäsi sitten toiseen päähän, ja aktiivinen Miller vapautettiin laukomaan samankaltaisesta kulmasta, mutta George torjui sen vaivattomasti.

Ottelu alkoi herätä henkiin, ja Dan Nlundulu oli seuraava, joka laukaisi maalia kohti 36. minuutilla sen jälkeen, kun Bairns oli luopunut pallosta huolimattomasti, mutta Bain teki rutiinitorjunnan lähituttuvaralta.

Nlundulu pääsi sitten takaa läpi ja liukui pallon maaliin, vaikka kotiyleisön riemu kesti vain hetken, sillä avustava tuomari nosti lippunsa ilmeisestä paitsioista.

Kotijoukkue oli jo menettänyt Donnellyn loukkaantumisen vuoksi avausjakson puolivälissä, ja he kärsivät lisäiskun, kun Phillips, joka näyttäisi loukkaavan olkapäänsä avausjaksolla, tuli pois tauolla.

Ottelu kaipasi hetkeä laatua, ja se saapui 10 minuutin kuluttua toisen puoliajan alusta Yeatsin toimesta.

Taitin täydellinen läpisyöttö vapautti Millerin, ja vaikka George juoksi nopeasti maalistaan ja ajoi haasteensa hyvin, irtopallo putosi houkuttelevasti Yeatsille, joka laukoi upean ensimmäisen osuman ylänurkkaan vartioimattomasta St Mirrenin maalista.

Tilanne parani vielä enemmän vierasjoukkueelle heti tunnin jälkeen, kun Bairns kaksinkertaisti etumatkansa.

Millerin alkuperäinen laukaus rangaistusalueen reunoilta estettiin Scott Tanserin toimesta, mutta kun kotijoukkueen puolustus epäröi, Miller reagoi ensimmäisenä juostessaan irtopalloon ja nosti oikealla jalalla laukauksen rynnistävän George'n yli.

St Mirren kärsi vielä yhden iskun pian sen jälkeen, kun maalivahti pakotettiin kentältä ja Ryan Mullen astui hänen tilalleen.

Pakotetut muutokset ja nopeat maalit horjuttivat kotijoukkuetta, eivätkä he koskaan uhkailleet paluuta, ja heidän iltapäivänsä tiivistyi 89. minuutilla, kun Tanser potkaisi täysin väärin yrittäessään volleyta kuuden jalan etäisyydeltä.

source_doc:
The Case for Impeaching Donald Trump

Bombs over Latin America: It's giving Wag the Dog, if you ask me. The administration, seemingly hot to bring back neoconservative military conquest, soft-launched its latest regime change war in Venezuela by making indiscriminate attacks on boats in the Caribbean and Pacific waters off of Central America. These attacks, all undertaken without a jot of congressional oversight and on the dubious premise that the boats were packed with fentanyl bound for the United States, were murderous on their own. But the news that the military was ordered to strike an already stricken boat in a "double tap" attack to kill any survivors has raised the specter of war crimes - and in a way that even many Republicans don't seem ready to countenance.

Trump's Binance buddy gets a pardon: Changpeng Zhao began this year the disgraced former CEO of Binance, the world's largest cryptocurrency exchange, having done prison time for, as the Biden DOJ put it, "failing to maintain an effective anti-money laundering (AML) program," violating the Bank Security Act, and allowing money to flow freely to a host of bad actors, including "terrorists, cybercriminals, and child abusers." But Zhao, having forfeited the right to run Binance, wanted back in. So he used his connections to Trump's family and inner circle to secure a pardon that would let him run the show again. In return, Zhao showered his attention on World Liberty Financial - using Binance's leverage to enrich Trump's private crypto fund. TNR's Tim Noah was positively apoplectic about the shady arrangement.

Chips to China: Speaking of Tim Noah and apoplexy: It's probably not great that one firm, Nvidia, has come to possess such godlike, market-moving power. Its outsize importance to the global economy had Noah fingering it as one of the major pillars to crumble, when he gamed out a potential Trump stock market crash back in October. Trump's been doing what he can to boost Nvidia's fortunes, however: This year, the president broke with long-standing national security tradition and announced that he was permitting the firm to sell its H200 chips to China. As The New York Times" David Sanger noted, the deal - the fruits of "intense lobbying" from Nvidia CEO and White House gadfly Jensen Huang - raised a basic question: "If the chips that power the most advanced technology can be sold to the United States" chief technological, military and financial competitor, where is the new line drawn?" That's probably the least of Trump's concerns, however: The deal also guaranteed that "25 percent of all the revenues from the sales would go to the United States," in yet another case of this administration's affection for fascist corporatism.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Álggu ovddas Donald Trump áiggi

Bombar Latína Amerikamii: Dat lea Wag the Dog, jus don háliidit mu. Oahpaheaddji, muhto dássema dávjoga, lei geahččat muhtin neokonzervatiiva áššisvuođa siskka, njuolga máttá riskiidjija deňđa Venezuela, geatnuid geahčojuvvon muhtin álbmot ja riekta juppe dahkkes Central Amerikas. Dásse mátta, geat leiggiid čállin muhtin jáhkkiarmu sihkkarastit ja njuođát vuolde juppe, geat already varra koinoa bandá gávdnu otavă ija nádduhálas, čuovvona mu stivra muhtin. Muhto njuolga beaktá siskka, geat duogi ja báhkki "douple tap" -joatkenálas suhduida dovdet dán tjuvikorttalas man glavko veahkých moai oaidnuvvot, lea čohkká mu neavddimus - ja dás ášši geat čuovviid go duora dohkkehuvvat tissin.

Trump ja Binance matkkuheddji gohčodán: Changpeng Zhao alit dán jáhkku veelu áiggi mákese, oassá májjáhuvvon Binance CEO, geažadun, muhto, mii buohkaidit Biden DOJ biibo "eai čuoččit gearddeguohta anti-money laundering (AML) programmii," gávddu Bank Security Act, ja[i] heive geavahit muhtin vaššasaid, quear "terroristaguttá, cybercriminals, ja báhcahá vearkkai." Muhto Zhao, geažadun geavahit ammojittin ŋaatke cousguhkállina moai, uvnnedja jánkaidekke don dieničot Boosta Trump jnkku hitcupma oam.' Ija áinnhe diskehuppihulu gálggat oasihit. Muhto dat net uhttan! Zhao seavdáhidus Europea Andgárnarnam suуаšikkoris Bastnu-láhket riekta sama velasuhkká eazzumen ja vearkkajat Koht daimmat “nánnaba” maihko geahčottávuohta, muhto geavuskuhkorvo riekta veajhkki leigiid njuv´a. TNR'n Tim Noah leikhá leakt háhkkar, annahk sírratćenmaších sea."]

Chips Kiinas: Jatke Tiim Noah ja "uhtteahu": Deat lea earáit äkkimmuhkot, mii firm, Nvidia, sáhkkar maŋŋá lohkat sena čáppat hárka jorjin doarmosuhkasi elddin sihkkari velkoi. Gávddu mutt ieš mmáháčča iikepartybanken in mátki áijájnikú nasnamecount aalkkituva muhtin hárvmust 六dirrgo inspeaktara, ja iinns R Trum dipriebỘl igdaldá Loohka Nik!

Bombar Latína Amerikamii: Dat lea Wag the Dog, jus don háliidit mu. Oahpaheaddji, geahččat muhtin neokonzervatiiva áššisvuođa siskka, njuolga márkšin riskiidjija díađjami Venezuela, geahččat muhtin jeavkku bávkkiid slohkka ja puohtinbáikkas Central Amerikas. Dásse mátta, geat leiliggádan eai suohkan asut, ja njuođát geahčašii dakkár viid čuovvot fentanyl, geat lea vuottalastit doaimmahallamat, muhto lea buorre álggahus. Muhto njuolga beaktá siskka, geat guovddas muhtin dohkka "double tap" -dammoahtto iskkagaska dovdet dán tjuvikorttalas man glavko veahkých moai oaidnuvvot, lea čohkká mu neavddimus - ja dás ášši geat čuovviid go duora dohkkehuvvat tissin.

Muhto Zhao, geažadun geavahit ammojittin ŋaatke cousguhkállina moai, ujale mu orangr zaggotven. Deat gieddosi gahttá, Zhao gávttes su vasáhusa World Liberty Financial - geavdduven Binance njuolga muhtin hagaidii važžit Trump šliv maŋŋá. Chips Kiinas: Jatke Tim Noah ja "uhtteahu": Deat lea earáit äkkimmuhkot, mii firm, Nvidia, sáhkkar maŋŋá lohkat sena čáppat hárka jorjin doarmosuhkasi elddin sihkkari velkoi. Gávddu mutt ieš mmáháčča iikepartybanken in mátki áijájnikú nasnamecount aalkkituva muhtin hárvmust dállosi trump stock market crash. Trump geahččá muhtin buorreašvuohta ja boostest Nvidia-sáhkkar, muhto: Dán jáhkku, presidentta ávzzuhit maŋŋá ovdabeallju čuovvot - cuvkit geavddu H200 chips Kiinasa. As David Sanger "The New York Times" muttá, dán arrangementttas ii guhdnan - muhto, dán hukki "Ihdnan allangam" geannus geavddu mas "25 prosenttia boarrabeahtá satniid oahca bealuja minimaal." Dásčearru lea oahidá eará ovddas, muhto: dán gávddu galgá hálakkas dán njuolga gauvdan dohkku, muhto on ođđa máŋga faschistlahku corporatismu.

Álggu ovddas Donald Trump áiggii

Bombar Latína Amerikamii: Dat lea Wag the Dog, jus don háliidit mu. Oahpaheaddji, geahččat muhtin neokonzervatiiva áššisvuođa siskka, njuolga márkšin riskiidjija diađjami Venezuela, geahččat muhtin jeavkku bávkkiid slohkka ja puohtinbáikkas Central Amerikas. Dásse mátta, geat leiliggádan eai suohkan asut, ja njuođát geahčašii dakkár viid čuovvot fentanylla, geat lea vuottalastit doaimmahallamat, muhto lea buorre álggahus. Muhto njuolga beaktá siskka, geat guovddas muhtin dohkka "double tap" -dammoahtto iskkagaska dovdet eará góbbat, lea čohkká mu neavddimus - ja dás ášši geat čuovviid go duora dohkkehuvvat tissin.

Trump ja Binance matkkuheddji gávdun: Changpeng Zhao ávist dán jáhkku aifá geálddu háliiddu CEO of Binance, muhtin geávjodan, go Biden DOJ biibo "eai čuoččit gearddeguohta anti-money laundering (AML) programmii," gávddu Bank Security Act, ja[i] heive geavahit muhtin makkamát, quear "terroristaguttá, cybercriminals, ja báhcahá vearkkai." Muhto Zhao, geažadun geavahit ammojittin ŋaatke cousguhkállina moai, ujale mu orange huyện. source_doc:
Robin Roefs" penalty saves secures Sunderland's spot in FA Cup fourth round

Get the Adam Clery Football Column. A newsletter that unpacks the absurdities and oddities of the beautiful game

The ACFC newsletter: unpacking football's absurdities

Unpack football's oddities with the ACFC newsletter

Robin Roefs was Sunderland's hero as Everton's FA Cup hopes came to a premature end once again after three woeful penalties in a shootout saw the Black Cats reach round four.

David Moyes" threadbare squad looked like exiting in normal time until James Garner's 89th-minute spot-kick cancelled out Enzo Le Fee's brilliant first-half strike.

But extra time was the last thing the hosts, down to just 12 senior players, needed and when the shootout came around Garner, Thierno Barry and Beto all saw their efforts saved by Roefs.

Le Fee, Granit Xhaka and Luke O'Nien confidently scored their first three attempts to help Sunderland into the fourth round for only the second time in 11 seasons.

It was a hammer blow to Everton, who were dragged back into the game by Adam Aznou, a £7.8million signing from Valladolid in the summer who had not had a sniff of first-team action.

The teenager's only senior football was two appearances in the EFL Trophy back in September and October and his 86th-minute introduction for Merlin Rohl was only because Moyes had little to no option.

But the Spanish-born Moroccan showed more drive in the four minutes of regulation time than many of his battle-weary team-mates had in the preceding 86 - particularly fellow 19-year-old and summer arrival Tyler Dibling, who cost five times as much.

Within three minutes he won an admittedly soft penalty after a shoulder-to-shoulder challenge by Trai Hume allowing Garner to equalise.

Replays of the foul on the big screens at full-time enraged Xhaka, who hurled his water bottle into the turf and raged at the perceived injustice to anyone in earshot, but the Black Cats" captain was soon celebrating.

It is rare for Sunderland, promoted from the Championship last season, to be favourites in any game but the fact Regis Le Bris was able to make five changes and still have the likes of Dan Ballard, Brian Brobbey, Omar Alderete and Wilson Isidor in reserve swung the odds in their favour.

Injuries, the Africa Cup of Nations and suspensions for Michael Keane and Jack Grealish were compounded by Tim Iroegbunam's hamstring problem which took the absences to nine.

Barry, the one senior player he left out, accounted for 23 of the 27 first-team appearances among the substitutes with five of six academy players not having previously featured at all.

After Harrison Armstrong sliced wide their only first chance of the first half, Sunderland took control and should have been comfortably ahead by the interval.

Their first shot resulted in the opener - and what a goal.

Everton failed to deal with a long throw and Eliezer Mayenda teed up Le Fee to send a cushioned right-footed volley curling past Jordan Pickford.

Moyes had a face like thunder and his demeanour was not improved as Pickford clawed away a Nordi Mukiele overhead kick and tipped away, at full-stretch, Romaine Mundle's strike from distance.

Surprisingly, the Everton boss did not make the only change available to him and sacrifice one of his five midfielders for Barry at the start of the second half, but they did not come to life until Mayenda rolled an angled shot just wide with less than half an hour remaining.

Beto's appeal for a penalty for a shirt pull by Hume was waved away but referee John Brooks obliged when Aznou went down and Garner equalised.

Unfortunately for Everton their subsequent penalties were not as confident, with Barry and Beto's stuttering run-ups far from convincing, as Roefs saved all three.

hypo_0:
Robin Roefs" penalti bálvalat duovdagas Sunderland álgga FA Cup siíddu gávdnon

Obtne Adam Clery fotbolla kolumnas. A puhta neuva earádan álggu goas háliidiane muhtuhusas ja cearrasas máhtorvuođas

ACFC neuva: earádan fotbollas álggu

Earádan fotbollas careasat ACFC neuva

Robin Roefs lea Sunderlandin hero go Evertonin FA Cup álkohkunat idjageamen dovda jaččan go edda älleid fertehkonas shootout šaddat, go Black Cats jáhkka rappla siidu gávdnon.

David Moyes" iešguđet swadža árru lii vuorddeha jačee go James Garnerin 89. minutti peal milbeš povda boazojaga Enzo Le Fee buorri álggás lehko.

Muhto earádan gávdnon lei siste álbmot bálvalat, go on otne 12 vuosttaid geahnasa ja go shootout veahkehuvvo, Garner, Thierno Barry ja Beto jaiddo ávašupšaid savebe Roefs.

Le Fee, Granit Xhaka ja Luke O'Nien jahtto čiekču áššu fávttet geahččat Sunderland siiddu gávdno dohkkeha vihtte goddás 11 sisa bohccobohkku.

De lei hammerniis Evertonii, go Adam Aznou, jávkan £7.8million sinjá iittogán huilas muhtuhkkina go dilli válddast heait niidiga.

Teenagerin ain cárdaga fotbolla lei doi guovis EFL Trofi peal gaidáddebmi ja oktoberri ja sen 86. minutime purrui go Merlin Rohl kuvlassat jienggo, go Moyes ii iežat boahtte Áhvka šadddas.

Muhto earádan ássuma Marokko árgein gišvva muhtuhkkina ole spendadege šasi pealu 86 leipattaa muhtuhkkina oahpuin jienggo bálgoáigge váhin.'

Huomáhkaš շաբաթnumw 39m gaidas oabbtin go jahta ja ávdanajo positíii se liemáán Tunti Hume tanobbá deaddjani liihkadiigo saji meannán hikkdujuvvo.

Åseht moitamaed fealjja ledjeigu bocasa mara ka boazijuhkida uasa gettedna akittalalo siinast puottavva táljesja piireö iikkaleidättib ylit juhkmoti pealasunis, mudde daj tjuóttevie.

Muhto boazijo juoma ovde Djúnkestaan eadju, go 86 voorkomt pophee Gibbs, moitcaraimbu Matthew Goodman jienggo mađijat ídelmet vema noit moheddedera, alf.

Patrick Xhakam was ana tanester iitega viirima mátkuja, moáitatili. bohojareeki Los Alvadi, heaitoo ahta ed ninggo neabo?

Nittáht ngāht Djouak dorgi liin loču gyŋkdonma prokmeja, my tjuódagga, mu giht omal väljei fàfguidku vartoritt mun lev téa giittadá fešťuná?

ACFC neuva: eáradan fotbollas muhtuhkkina

Eáradan fotbollas careasat ACFC neuva

Robin Roefs lea Sunderlandin hero go Evertonin FA Cup álgkohkunat idjageamen duvda muhtuhkkina go trea bálvalat shootout áigast Black Cats jáhkka rappla siidu gávdnon.

David Moyes" iešguđet swadža árru lii vuorddeha normála áiga go James Garnerin 89. minutti seimně bálvalat boazojaga Enzo Le Fee buorri álggás lehko.

Muhto earádan gávdnon lei siste álbmot ráhtterbálvalat, go on otne 12 vuosttaid geahnasa ja go shootout veahkehuvvo, Garner, Thierno Barry ja Beto jaiddo ávašupšaid savebe Roefs.

Le Fee, Granit Xhaka ja Luke O'Nien jahtto čiekču áššu fávttet geahččat Sunderland siiddu gávdno dohkkeha dohkka go eahppi fárda vihtte goddás 11 sisa bohccobohkku.

De lea hammerniis Evertonii, go Adam Aznou, jávkan £7.8million sinjá iittogán huilas muhtuhkkina go dilli válddast heait niidiga.

Teenagerin ain cárdaga fotbolla lei doi guovis EFL Trofi peal gaidáddebmi ja oktoberri, ja sen 86. minutime purrui go Merlin Rohl kártaid jienggo, go Moyes ii iežat boahtte Áhvka šadddas.

Muhto earádan árgein leafáiga muhtuhkkina ole spendadege buohtit ruhtina muhto muhtuhkkina lehko erohkáhkkáspuhta.

Huomáhkaš beassii 39m gaidas oabbtin go jahta ja ávdanajo positíii se liemáán Tunti Hume tanobbá deaddjani liihkadiigo saji meannán hikkdujuvvo.

Dazz leáligas muhtuhkkina innalditvuo almmuhkaung eavdoboahtáhdut súvddan gárru ja niukkásahtdaai bálgaduvvon go Duoška aaddenssa.

source_doc:
High Noon review - Billy Crudup brings classic Hollywood western back with a bang

How do you turn a classic Hollywood western into West End musical fare? Add songs, many of Bruce Springsteen's in this case, along with a few rounds of line dancing and a sizzling star in Billy Crudup. Still, it's an odd experience initially as Thea Sharrock's production switches from one brief filmic scene to the next, and the endeavour seems as wooden as the clapboard saloon-bar slats that comprise the handsome set.

As a piece of theatre, it finds its flow. As a debate play, though, it gathers a locomotive energy as it travels towards the showdown between Frank Miller (James Doherty), who is returning to this "dirty little village in the middle of nowhere," and the marshal Will Kane (Crudup) who put him behind bars. That is mostly because of the uncanny and urgent relevance of this 1952 film about a community working out (or rather, squirming out of) its civic responsibilities around institutional wrongdoing.

Originally an allegory of McCarthyism (its screenwriter, Carl Foreman, was blacklisted), the story sets the cowardice of the many against the courage of the few - in this case, the lone, heroic Kane, who mobilises his defence against Miller and his henchmen after being let down by the townsfolk. The film was blasted by John Wayne as un-American for its critical portrait of the community; the production comes to life in its arguments on collective in/action and seems to speak directly about the dilemmas facing the cowboy country of Trump's America (the shooting in Minneapolis just the latest example). Eric Roth's script uses many lines from Foreman's screenplay but fleshes out the debates on the ethical stance of a community in the face of wrongdoing and misguided American myths around immigration.

Cowardice of the many, courage of the few ... cast of High Noon. Photograph: Johan Persson

There is also the joint talent of Crudup and the ever agile Denise Gough who play the central couple on their wedding day. She is Amy Fowler, a Quaker who abhors the actions of violent men; he is the marshal who has just given up his "tin star" to start over as a shopkeeper. That is, until news reaches town that Miller is arriving on the noon train.

Gary Cooper made the role entirely his own, his integrity comparable only to Gregory Peck's Atticus in To Kill a Mockingbird. So Crudup has his long shadow to evade. He manages to hold up the part on stage as an upstanding, earnest and increasingly desperate man. Gough makes her part grittier and more modern than that of her film counterpart, Grace Kelly. The pair are convincing as a couple although their narrow characterisation hems in the full scale of their abilities.

Several other characters seem too flimsy, from Billy Howle's deputy marshal, Harvey Pell, to Rosa Salazar's Mexican businesswoman, Helen, although the affinity between her and Amy is refreshing, and Roth gives more voice and texture to these women as a whole.

Several of Springsteen's songs bring their own American politics (from the frontier optimism of Land of Hope and Dreams to The Rising, written in response to 9/11). Some are sung a cappella, mostly by Gough, who is a strong singer, her voice emanating desolation, but she reprises I'm on Fire one too many times.

It seems like a reluctant musical at times, the songs short and thin but the percussive music and sound design are always arresting, as is the lighting, designed by Neil Austin, which brings emotional clarity and intrigue. A clock is central to Tim Hatley's set design, counting down to the train's thrilling arrival and the subsequent showdown, which manages to contain tension and drama, despite the difficulty of staging a cross-town shootout.

For all its early stiffness, it builds in momentum and there are moving moments. Ultimately, the political message speaks loudest, harnessing the McCarthyist fear of then and the Trumpian terror of today.

Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. hypo_0:
High Noon-árvvo - Billy Crudup heive vuordde Hollywood-västerneja nu ahkkát

MPP: dan go visot Hollywood-västerna muhtun West End muusikalaš? Adda vižžo, muđa Bruce Springsteen's vižžot, ja mielde párti riikkistilđošain ja alla nahiin Billy Crudup. Eahkki, dat lea odda erenoamála fierddis, dalkál Thea Sharrock's produksjon gávdnan gávdnalit goledet gávdnaleapmi lottuheapmi, ja eambbo dissmien lea go dakkárhuvddak, ja dat torrengeain liiggom áiga dáhpáhusa mátkkihit múttádeapmagiid kako, maŋŋá gávnned riska-buhtaga dán šearmotdoal áhččila.

Čaluhis go teátrrasiidu, dat dálkkádat. Meahcculahka gii eaktedá láppáčus, dasa dus tikkádoalle girtet hárjehisset Frank Miller (James Doherty), go vuollet ihrgán "duorzas vázzat dakkárge" ja máršala Will Kane (Crudup) go leddeisijja. Dasa lea biregáldda dihtoravvo ja hárjehissetmis dán 1952 filmma go beaseat guovttegiid ohtcaideapmagu, maŋŋá dat kisaidliid guvhkat boahkiide.

Odiválgi álkoda McCarthyisma - dan osolade, Carl Foreman, lagadeahu, história gádju bádde-deghat go losvakusama dagaierun lea da//goagužádan. Muhto dállí, vasttija muhtin buđejaga giskido go váideivt dan. Dán riehtahka Lea go sárggesmil, herbmina, muhto Keithin. Movie bei lavtkion girjjáguvddago flaseitijgá, dát filmat isearmuloŋkat.

Kendá raháli ja go horro hhálbi sun ákkáamaajgi goárjendat frásastag galdu. Hásti ora sa biliš aččat hárjeh pendingiu. Sihar angeajat ja degátah bielad beaivvimuš.

Danas vižžot dasse geatennavttanjai riehteduođđamin viijjes, deasa njálggina ja suomaside, go aneašii Gouth. Šasdádal, dáruváh cntómmungit hosda iešsana aneašii Sprem ja Woodie? ja Productions antijet. Muhto, ja, áhkka, ja máŋŋá bearaš, go Gough jakka cir-ledderoa geahččarihuitageo?

Vist sihtán kopatvtakja muhtun vižžot muhtun deariu, huovrtongii muhtun lavádan, go setsállatid muhtun duohtaiid seđaudar. Hukkan boargibii muhtun ieža spáhu, mákkár avkvár leama; muhto Nils leama korrafa dihkágeahkki, muhto paaria.

Máŋga álggevižžat gažad, maŋŋis Billy Howle's deati muhtun Harvey Pell, muhtun iggátkonan, Mexican businesswoman Helen, muhtun láhkka aneašii am hismpa inahtag kárn iiga muhtun Muldagaid. Givvohan rašad canalasket vaánlaí? Hálahkat infjatti mtahrohat bulagiárkad othri reahlad!

Muhtun áigge vižžot gharra mpaḱia കോട്ട ... mii-šarad máttolu ja árhu hiitta vidá. Kaamos subtarmá! Áhkka!! Unválda?

Gaí ziekte riehtast immusuppites. Gámmeligăš gámebad ja. Daleigge J girki, gófti jinkt álbma многочисленные rukhfi bahtomai.

Otra bei sahkosa, dago kárnatraskala ja meditaate niscirla na idé, makánílicsude harri mi riehtaj ün kåthiriga. Gihcov jāvmá rižo!!

Dan go visot Hollywood-västerna muhtun West End muusikalaš? Aádit vižžo, muđa Bruce Springsteen's vižžot, ja mielde párti riikkistilđošain ja alla nahiin Billy Crudup. Eahkki, dat lea odda erenoamála fierddis, dalkál Thea Sharrock's produksjon gávdnan gávdnalit goledet gávdnaleapmi lottuheapmi, ja eambbo dissmien lea go dakkárhuvddak, ja dat torrengeain liiggom áiga dáhpáhusa mátkkihit múttádeapmagiid kako, maŋŋá gávnned riska-buhtaga dán šearmotdoal áhččila.

Čaluhis go teátrrasiidu, dat dálkkádat. Meahcculahka gii eaktedá láppáčus, dasa dus tikkádoalle girtet hárjehisset Frank Miller (James Doherty), go vuollet ihrgán "duorzas vázzat dakkárge" ja máršala Will Kane (Crudup) go leddeisijja. Dasa lea biregáldda dihtoravvo ja hárjehissetmis dán 1952 filmma go beaseat guovttegiid ohtcaideapmagu, maŋŋá dat kisaidliid guvhkat boahkiide.

Odiválgi álkoda McCarthyisma (dán osolade, Carl Foreman, lagadeahu), história gádju bádde-deghat go losvakusama dagaierun lea da//goagužádan. Muhto dállí, vasttija muhtin buđejaga giskido go váideivt dan. Dán riehtahka Lea go sárggesmil, herbmina, muhto Keithin. Movie bei lavtkion girjjáguvddago flaseitijgá, dát filmat isearmuloŋkat.

Kendá raháli ja go horro hhálbi sun ákkáamaajgi goárjendat frásastag galdu. Hásti ora sa biliš aččat hárjeh pendingiu. Sihar angeajat ja degátah bielad beaivvimuš.

Danas vižžot dasse geatennavttanjai riehteduođđamin viijjes, deasa njálggina ja suomaside, go aneašii Gouth. Šasdádal, dáruváh cntómmungit hosda iešsana aneašii Sprem ja Woodie? ja Productions antijet. Muhto, ja, áhkka, ja máŋŋá bearaš, go Gough jakka cir-ledderoa geahččarihuitageo?

Muhtun áigge vižžot gharra mpaḱia кот ... mii-šarad máttolu ja árhu hiitta vidá. Kaamos subtarmá! Áhkka!! Unválda?

Gohčodit go Hollywood-västerna muhto West End muusikalaš? Aádit vižžo, muđa Bruce Springsteen's vižžot, ja mielde párti riikkistilđošain ja alla nahiin Billy Crudup. Eahkki, dat lea odda erenoamála fierddis, dalkál Thea Sharrock's produksjon gávdnan gávdnalit goledet gávdnaleapmi lottuheapmi, ja eambbo dissmien lea go dakkárhuvddak, ja dat torrengeain liiggom áiga dáhpáhusa mátkkihit múttádeapmagiid kako, maŋŋá gávnned riska-buhtaga dán šearmotdoal áhččila.

Čaluhis go teátrrasiidu, dat dálkkádat. Meahcculahka, muhto, dat gárddá lokomotíva energii go boazovuodu Frank Miller (James Doherty), go vuollet ihrgán "duorzas vázzat dakkárge" ja máršala Will Kane (Crudup) go leddeisijja. Dasa lea biregáldda dihtoravvo ja hárjehissetmis dán 1952 filmma go beaseat guovttegiid ohtcaideapmagu, maŋŋá dat kisaidliid guvhkat boahkiide.

Odiválgi álkoda McCarthyisma (dán osolade, Carl Foreman, lagadeahu), história gádju bádde-deghat go losvakusama dagaierun lea da//goagužádan. Muhto dállí, vasttija muhtin buđejaga giskido go váideivt dan – dán riehtahka Lea go sárggesmil, herbmina, muhto Keithin, go ledja beaivvimuš, beare. Filmes lea john Wayne, go iešdagju roimehit go so mikrovista, go olbiteggo muohtitgo.

Kendá raháli ja go horro hhálbi sun ákkáamaajgi goárjendat frásastag galdu. Hásti ora sa biliš aččat hárjeh pendingiu. Sihar angeajat ja degátah bielad beaivvimuš.

Danas vižžot dasse geatennavttanjai riehteduođđamin viijjes, deasa njálggina ja suomaside, go aneašii Gouth. Šasdádal, dáruváh cntómmungit hosda iešsana aneašii Sprem ja Woodie? ja Productions antijet. Muhto, ja, áhkka, ja máŋŋá bearaš, go Gough jakka cir-ledderoa geahččarihuitageo?

Muhtun áigge vižžot gharra mpaḱia кот ... mii-šarad máttolu ja árhu hiitta vidá. Kaamos subtarmá! Áhkka!! Unválda?

source_doc:
Reading Gloria Steinem's undercover report on being a Playboy Bunny... finished Part I and damn🤔
Despite being well aware of Playboy being uh... a CORPORATION lol... had no idea how much their entire infrastructure truly served to perpetuate classism in an extremely creepy way while outwardly presenting themselves as the "classy" and thus "more ethical" option compared to say, Hustler

I'll post some screenshots later but to give you the gist, Bunnies (who were cocktail waitresses), had to:
- accept lower (by $200-150, equivalent to today's $2.5K) wages than advertised
- hand over 50% of all their tips
- give their last names to "Number 1 key holders" (ergo, celebrities/elites) if asked
- be subjected to a pelvic exam and blood test but weren't allowed to pick the physician
- be spied on by a private eye
- go out if their way to hide their husbands/bfs

The central point that unites all of this:
Bunnies were STRICTLY NOT ALLOWED TO (penalized by termination) date any other employees or customers... BUT accompanying and dating the "Number 1 key holders" was permitted, if not encouraged. See where this is going?

New recruits were given a "Bunny Bible" to study all those bizarre rules and instructions from.
To mention a few more:
- Bunnies' work performance was assessed by a "merit system" (YES, that exact wording!) instead of being written up. Unsurprisingly, merit was not only judged by a good work ethic but also very specific requirements on looks and attitude.
- there was an incentive system in place that rewarded Bunnies who sold the most liquor and merchandise
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Luohkkat Gloria Steinem's vaikkisreportaš duššan Playboy Bunny... avsluttaida Part I ja vaikkon🤔
Juhkkan gohččal háliidit Playboy lea uh... IIHDEČA loll... maŋemuš láhkku guokte eai maiddun sáhtta joatkut albmohagat dán aivvil go buorre "klasá" ja dánne "dáhkedut ávkkas" vai jahkko, Hustler

Mun bohccat nuppát postit mátki muhtun vai sit goahččat daid láhkku, Bunnit (mii leaba cocktail waitresses), duhkan beaivvála:
- muhtun čuorra (dolla $200-150, jus geavaha máŋga $2.5K) vággešididda
- váldet 50% buollu luonddu
- gávvit jiellán- ja "Nummer 1 key holders" (lažžin, celebrities/elites) sihke jus bohte
- lea siskkaidit takkel feava ja máilkka čáje mearkkaštit, muhtun eai sáhte váldit oskkar
- lea čahkkártimeri almmuheapmi mieldda
- gohččat gávnnan muohta mannii/bohccas

Oahpa ja deit it oahpahuš maiddái:
Bunnit leat STRIKTAL ALDA mii (nahtii termináda) sihke boka guđege paremmás eadnán... MAIHTAN go oahpa ja gávnnat "Nummer 1 key holders" lea allowed, jus eai oahpehtit. Vistte vaiko gállá.

Niebmašain mátki "Bunny Bible" goahččat boari álkkas girjjit ja birget ḱo fárkkan.
Boartje oahpa nuohkku:
- Bunnit geahččá rehkka olunur bávtti gárdi (JAH, dán stat ja! ) ainvottu váldde njuola. Eai snarhkon, merito eai lei neii jus geahččat buorre rehkka mottu mannat veahkku ja ášaviid tii suehtii duolla.
- ja nabbuinvattja proissi lea dolkan muhtumat nillážáchtá Bunnit mannat guhkalan liquoru ja merchandise

- váldet 50% buollu luonddu
- gávvit jiellán- ja "Nummer 1 key holders" (lažžin, celebrities/elites) sihke jus bohte
- lea siskkaidit takkel feava ja máilkka čáje mearkkaštit, muhtun eai sáhte váldit oskkar
- lea čahkkártimeri almmuheapmi mieldda
- gohččat gávnnan muohta mannii/bohccas

Mainna oahpa ja deit it oahpahuš maiddái:
Bunnit leat STRIKTAL ALDA mii (nahtii termináda) sihke boka guđege paremmás eadnán... MAIHTAN go oahpa ja gávnnat "Nummer 1 key holders" lea allowed, jus eai oahpehtit. Vistte vaiko gállá.

Niebmašain mátki "Bunny Bible" goahččat boari álkkas girjjit ja birget ḱo fárkkan.
Boartje oahpa nuohkku:
- Bunnit geahččá rehkka olunur bávtti gárdi (JAH, dán stat ja!) ainvottu váldde njuola. Eai snarhkon, merito eai lei neii jus geahččat buorre rehkka mottu mannat veahkku ja ášaviid tii suehtii duolla.
- ja nabbuinvattja proissi lea dolkan muhtumat nillážáchtá Bunnit mannat guhkalan liquoru ja merchandise

source_doc:
And being one of the weirdo, we just frequently get attacks here and there. Either online, offline, or even from your closest people. Those attacks usually stem from homophobia, transphobia, or sometimes just, don't like how weird we are and how weird we act, especially furries that do deeper immersions like roleplaying and therianthropy.

Hence some of us got safety by not needing to tell who we are and where we were from. Some of us got safety by only revealing ourselves to our friends or close friends. Face/body reveal is a culture that most of the furries did at least once in a private post, whether it be "delete soon" kind of post or in story.

Despite being so, we're still open for social interactions offline. We do furmeets—a personal meeting between furries, be it in a group or personal, be it in an event or just casually—and sometimes making a con/fur on, such as MWFF, IWAG, PAWAI, FURUM, and so on. It's fun to meet them offline, get to know each other, be able to see them in person as most of us have never seen each other's faces, take a photo to keep personally and censor publicly, laugh together and discuss similar interests, and so on. It's fun, social, and warm.

Although, things don't feel the same today. As people start trying to strip anonymity of people, attack furries, therian, LGBTQIA, and dox them, as how also our community participate and stir the dramas inside, things has been a little more chaotic, less warm, and less feeling like community or family. It's not the same anymore.

Part of me hopes things can return to how it feels in the 2000s and 2010s, but, I'll just let God do the rest. I'm a little hopeless in society and humans. I'm tired of how things get worse and meant to attack and divide small communities into a hopeless being. I don't like how society is now no longer respecting and being in unity.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Ja ollessan yks erikoinen, me saamme usein hyökkäyksiä täällä ja siellä. Olipa se netissä, livenä tai jopa lähimmiltä ihmisiltä. Nuo hyökkäykset johtuvat yleensä homofobiasta, transfobiasta tai joskus vain siitä, etteivät he pidä siitä, kuinka erikoisia olemme ja miten oudoilla tavoilla toimimme, erityisesti furryt, jotka uppoutuvat syvemmälle, kuten roolipelaamiseen ja therianthropiaan.

Joten osa meistä sai turvaa sillä, että ei tarvitse kertoa keitä olemme ja mistä olemme kotoisin. Osa meistä sai turvaa paljastamalla itsensä vain ystäville tai läheisille ystäville. Kasvojen/kropan paljastaminen on kulttuuri, jota useimmat furryt ovat tehneet ainakin kerran yksityisessä julkaisussa, olipa se sitten "poista pian" -tyyppinen julkaisu tai tarina.

Siitä huolimatta olemme edelleen avoimia sosiaalisille kanssakäymisille livenä. Teemme furmeet - henkilökohtaisen tapaamisen furrien välillä, olipa se ryhmässä tai yksin, tapahtumassa tai vain rennosti - ja joskus järjestämme con/furia, kuten MWFF, IWAG, PAWAI, FURUM ja niin edelleen. On hauskaa tavata heitä livenä, tutustua toisiimme, nähdä heidät henkilökohtaisesti, koska useimmat meistä eivät ole koskaan nähneet toistensa kasvoja, ottaa valokuva, joka pidetään henkilökohtaisena ja sensuroidaan julkisesti, nauraa yhdessä ja keskustella samanlaisista kiinnostuksista, ja niin edelleen. Se on hauskaa, sosiaalista ja lämmintä.

Vaikka, asiat eivät tunnu enää samalta tänään. Kun ihmiset alkavat yrittää riistää anonymiteettiä, hyökätä furrien, therianien, LGBTQIA:n kimppuun ja julkaista heidän tietonsa, samalla tavalla kuin yhteisömme osallistuu ja kiihdyttää draamoja, asiat ovat olleet hieman kaoottisempia, vähemmän lämpimiä ja vähemmän yhteisöltä tai perheeltä tuntuvia. Se ei ole enää sama.

Osa minusta toivoo, että asiat voisivat palata sellaisiksi kuin ne olivat 2000- ja 2010-luvuilla, mutta annan vain Jumalan hoitaa loput. Olen hieman toivoton yhteiskunnan ja ihmisten suhteen. Olen kyllästynyt siihen, miten asiat huononevat ja tarkoituksena on hyökätä ja jakaa pieniä yhteisöjä toivottomiksi olennoiksi. En pidä siitä, kuinka yhteiskunta ei enää kunnioita ja ole yhtenäinen.

Nuo hyökkäykset johtuvat yleensä homofobiasta, transfobiasta tai siitä, että jotkut eivät vain tykkää siitä, kuinka outoja olemme ja miten käyttäydymme, erityisesti furryt, jotka uppoutuvat syvempiin kokemuksiin, kuten roolipeleihin ja therianthropiaan.

Sen vuoksi osa meistä on löytänyt turvaa siitä, ettei tarvitse kertoa, keitä olemme ja mistä tulemme. Osa meistä on saanut turvaa paljastamalla itsemme vain ystäville tai läheisille ystäville. Kasvojen/kropan paljastaminen on kulttuuri, jota useimmat furryt tekevät ainakin kerran yksityisessä postauksessa, olipa se sitten "poista pian" -tyyppinen julkaisu tai tarina.

Siitä huolimatta olemme edelleen avoimia sosiaaliselle kanssakäymiselle livenä. Teemme furmeet - henkilökohtaisia tapaamisia furrien kesken, olipa se ryhmässä tai yksin, tapahtumissa tai vain rennosti - ja joskus järjestämme con/fur tapahtumia, kuten MWFF, IWAG, PAWAI, FURUM jne. On niin hauskaa tavata heitä livenä, tutustua toisiimme, nähdä heidät henkilökohtaisesti, koska useimmat meistä eivät ole koskaan nähneet toistensa kasvoja, ottaa valokuva muistoksi itseä varten ja sensuroida se julkisesti, nauraa yhdessä ja keskustella samankaltaisista kiinnostuksista. Se on hauskaa, sosiaalista ja lämmintä.

Kuitenkin nyt asiat eivät tunnu samalta. Kun ihmiset alkavat riistää anonymiteettiä, hyökätä furrien, therianien, LGBTQIA:n kimppuun ja paljastaa heidän tietonsa, ja kun yhteisömme myös osallistuu ja aiheuttaa draamoja, asiat ovat olleet vähän kaoottisia, vähemmän lämpimiä ja vähemmän yhteisön tai perheen tuntuisia. Se ei ole enää sama.

Osa minusta toivoo, että asiat voisivat palata sellaiseen tunnelmaan, jota koimme 2000- ja 2010-luvuilla, mutta annan vain Jumalan hoitaa loput. Olen hieman toivoton yhteiskunnassa ja ihmisten parissa. Olen väsynyt siihen, miten asiat huononevat ja tarkoituksena on hyökätä ja jakaa pieniä yhteisöjä toivottomiksi olennoiksi. En pidä siitä, että yhteiskunta ei enää kunnioita eikä ole yhtenäinen.

source_doc:
I just saw Kendall Coyne Schofield in her jersey during warmups... is she playing today??? 🤩
#PWHL #hizzackySeason BOS at MIN

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Whatever Heise did to put a Fleet player on her butt at center ice, that Fleet player paid back HARD 10 seconds later. Yeesh. 😬🫣
On the one hand, I want the Fleet's goalie's PWHL debut to go well, but on the other hand, I want the Frost to win.
Kendall Coyne Schofield was PISSED at the front of the net with that little stick scramble after the Fleet's second goal. I'm glad to have her fury back on the ice. She is ferocious!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Looks like Klees changed back to his regular first line and Kendall et al needed to get a MFing goal and they got that hot damn MF goal! YES

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
YES! THEY TIED THAT SHIT UP!
Nooooooo, the Fleet is back up.
Roller-coaster of a game, here!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Wowza, Fleet is *still* gunning for Heise. Yee-ouch. That's two Fleet penalties to that one center-ice unpenalized shove by Heise.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
It is so so good to see Kendall Coyne Schofield parked back at the top of the crease, getting shoved around by women a head taller than her, yet pushing right back, making plays.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Crowd is not convinced from what we saw that Curl deserved a double minot for roughing.
Crowd is not happy about this illegal hit call against Fleet on 71's injury.
I don't think we got a single SOG in that last power play.
Boston's defense is just too good. They aren't giving us any openings.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Mun just dajdoe Kendall Coyne Schofield nielda duloktaid eamiid... lea odne dahkii??? 🤩
#PWHL #hizzackySeason BOS at MIN

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Jeara Heise bisse juohke Fleet máŋgga buorrejumi ovddas, dat Fleet máŋgga addárdi VEARDNA 10 sekunda áiggi. Jiem. 😬🫣
Váldde lágid, in diehtu Fleet máŋŋabáikkis PWHL debut lea muhtumi, muhto erenoam, in diehtu Frost daidit.
Kendall Coyne Schofield lea BOOSTA viidád neta bávkás duorkka áddokti olles Fleet ávnnas. Mun lean wgaldan in ciŋkkes, in lea suorgga!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Ákku, Klees vaihdo eallá gávdnaji birge laisá, ja Kendall ja eatnam biddji MFing morá, ja de jávkkadala dihte! EHY!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
EHY! DDIHTÁDI AIDÁTTÁ!
Ooh nei, Fleet lea dás erren.
Jumparit zombi mii ávkkurt dam.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Wowza, Fleet lea *dat* gárgeao Heise. Yee-ouch. Dás lea duo Fleet máŋŋabáikkis biidi cuorva 71 viiddohki unpenalized.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Dat lea in leat vuordde olyghehki Kendall Coyne Schofield nu maide bási bálkkas, mii dan bisse joa beaivvis bouta gávnnahit, muhto vadja suorgga, åkšta dakkár.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Gávdnat lea eljaváldo dajji, in diehtu Curl bisse dohkke double minot rouhktin.
Gávdnat lea eljaváldo muited kommun lindde Fleet 71 áiggi gávdná,
Akk, mun in diehtu nerdist dalset SOG ain lasta power play.
Bostonin pérreggi lea juohke mus lálut. De mii in neahtnodit mus viiddat.

source_doc:
"An utterly miserable day": Kempton Park meeting marred by death of three horses

The Lanzarote Hurdle card at Kempton Park was marred by the death of three horses, including the Grade One-winning Kalif Du Berlais, whose loss Paul Nicholls described as "a big kick in the teeth" and a "sad day."

Kalif Du Berlais - whose ownership group includes Sir Alex Ferguson - unseated Harry Cobden in the four-runner Coral Silviniaco Conti Chase and landed lame, with the broken shoulder he sustained proving untreatable and he was euthanised by the veterinary team on Saturday.

Nicholls said: "It's a sad day when you lose horses like that, it's hard on the whole team. It's a big kick in the teeth for everyone, the owners, the poor girl who looks after him - you hate to see that happen. He was just showing his class today, he jumped and travelled well and sadly now he will never be able to show the potential we thought he had.

"I can say as much as I like, but it's just a shame for the whole team. Harry was extremely upset and is missing his ride in the last as he doesn't feel great about it. He's a big, bold horse who attacks his fences and those horses, when they do that, can end up having a bad fall.

"He was enthusiastic today and travelling beautifully and we'll never know where we would have ended up, we've always had a lot of faith in him. These things happen, sadly, and we'll have to try to pick ourselves up and move forward. These horses get the best of everything, there's not much you can say to make it better at this point.

"It never gets any easier when these things happen and it's a big old blow."

In the Coral Daily Rewards Shaker Handicap Chase, Jonjo and AJ O'Neill's Peso was pulled up on the flat with an injury that could not be treated, leaving racecourse vets with no choice but to euthanise him.

Harry Derham saddled Wertpol for the juvenile hurdle and the horse looked to be running a huge race before falling at the last and sustaining a life-ending injury. Derham said on his X account: "An utterly miserable day at Kempton Park today losing Wertpol who we only had the good fortune of having in our yard for a short period of time.

"It's a sad day when you lose horses like that, it's hard on the whole team. It's a big kick in the teeth for everyone," said Paul Nicholls. Photograph: Alan Crowhurst/Getty Images

"He was a bright talent who was fresh and happy doing his work every day, often playing around and expressing himself. He loved his job and I am so sad for his Heart Of The South syndicate, who are the most wonderful group of people. Racing can at times be a painful sport and today has been a tough day for a number of connections. A day to forget."

A spokesperson for Kempton Park said: "All of us at Kempton Park care deeply about the welfare of all racehorses, as do the thousands of racing staff who provide them with world-class levels of care at home every day. Our heartfelt condolences are with the connections of all three horses."

hypo_0:
"Jearrat lávlagos báhtala": Kempton Park piŋŋanardda sintehčohkain hárkka beaivi

Lanzarote Hurdle rievddat Kempton Parkis olis sintehčohka hárkkain beaivi, dego dás eadniid Naska du Berlais, whose loss Paul Nicholls ieš jearrat "daidda muhtuna ovddas" ja "sintehčohka beaivi".

Naska du Berlais - goas omávuohta gávdnji guhkugat Sir Alex Ferguson - čájeha Harry Cobden ivdnis vierguhitin Coral Silviniaco Conti Chase ja válddábme beaivveš, dego geađa kárgjis ustitiehka bálgget áddjereváldu ja ohcađeheddji ealu maŋggas lašorihkkil. Paul Nicholls orggaste: "Se on synkká beaivi go du eallit dálkkaspera, tai diehin eale alles die unnikedje. Se on daidda muhtuna ovddas du Geavsnes, son eai mannat moai gife eamnid buot eallilv, deaiválárragii."

"Mun sáhtán sáid fálkkii, muhto se on sii máksim, muhto ei márkan beaivve ja čájehan ádje buvttuma fikserin úlkta eai dábála gáizegi. Mu muođen, muhto go ivddala varra morit geahčásit. Son boazlhohka deze muoin go naj Gardenbeard, muov evdali, dúrra várret, se toaktuvägi eavddaba luhtda."

"Beaivi faortat, muhto bokčat ja sálbbit."

Coral Daily Rewards Shaker Handicap Chaseas, Jonjo ja AJ O'Neill'n Peso nuorat su beaiveibmuhukka viergi goedo nuoraikahti vuozzáras bálgget hilddut, eahat muoaskåhlát ak Mohteske.

Harry Derham ivdnes Wertpol goassi dohuul augka dohkálagune fuohkkan ja son eahpaháhkaridhit ja fallat ja jámuhka soahka mánnat. Derham njálggá X viidai: "Jearrat lágga beaivi Kempton Parkis buorrán Wertpol, dohkálgari ákkis tuut stomachs osakii daldda."

"Se lágga beaivi go du eallit dálkkaspera, tai diehin eale alles du Geavsim. Se on daidda muhtuna ovddas muin jádan buot." Paul Nicholls. Fotot: Alan Crowhurst/Getty Images

"Son eai komic iffeahr eassne, son jaábuffe hárkku, atná birgarasjuos. Son ea birgardeallu ja mu kála, jeat me eahpet tálka táhlieverídhes vuon sárká. Racing eai sálbmél andně cvettár, dego dehčinjá; dag nodjåid du va caisa."

Kempton Park'čatti sajtse: "Buot oassálhii Kempton Parkis dehčá dat varra siinas albat bheaivvego, ja buot seasa bajođit oduo seahkhit. Mii buottaga teh buot eri hárkkasa."
