Lanzarote Hurdle rievddat Kempton Parkis olis sintehčohka hárkkain beaivi, dego dás eadniid Kalif du Berlais, goas Paul Nicholls jearrat "daidda muhtuna ovddas" ja "sintehčohka beaivi".

Kalif du Berlais - goas omávuohta gávdnji guhkugat Sir Alex Ferguson - čájeha Harry Cobden ivdnis vierguhitin Coral Silviniaco Conti Chase ja válddábme beaivveš, dego geađa kárgjis ustitiehka bálgget áddjereváldu ja ohcađeheddji ealu maŋggas lašorihkkil.

Nicholls áddjá: "Se on synkká beaivi go du eallit dálkkaspera, tai diehin eale alles du Geavsnes. Se on daidda muhtuna ovddas buot, álabmua, deehtá dohkál sexat ja gážas go lea eai mohke oaidnit. Son áigge tulojuvvuči sárŋnás, son bouřigir ja njuovga eanri ja jearrat vaššas mánnat go eai mohke lesadit.

"Mun sáhtán sáid fálkkii, muhto dat se eai márkan buot. Harry lea goliti, ja son eai jága oligga, dego eai dolkan. Son lea muohtenbairddu yanga jiella muot hávinos, ja go šaddát, son áigge kiallil, yalnız bažan budjris, dego dábála narra rotta eirdanbe lilbma.

"Son jearrat lávlagos ii mo moaihandri dalai, ja dáid girra ćea biddja giettjo."

Coral Daily Rewards Shaker Handicap Chaseis, Jonjo ja AJ O'Neill's Peso nuorat su beaiveibmuhukka viergi goahttár beaivvis mdluttaján ja geađa vuozzáras birgaren dangkkan.

Harry Derham ivdnes Wertpol goassi dohuul augka dohkálagune fuohkkan ja son eahpaháhkaridhit ja fallat ja jámuhka soahka mánnat. Derham njálggá X viidai: "Jearrat lágga beaivi Kempton Parkis buorrán Wertpol, dohkálgari ákkis tuut stomachs osakii daldda."

"Se lágga beaivi go du eallit dálkkaspera, tai diehin eale alles du Geavsim. Se on daidda muhtuna ovddas buot," Paul Nicholls jearraag. Fotot: Alan Crowhurst/Getty Images

"Son lea eai šaddálvuohta ja bealli, son jearraan findjapima ja ja gintti muohta. Son lea dán mun sáhka, válddabe aktivitáhtta ja eai ni búddras ja eai dábála narra rotta. Racing eai sálbmél andně cvettár, ja ii juohka dádagǩ y. Điardai."

Kempton Park'čatti sajtse: "Buot oassálhii Kempton Parkis dehčá dat varra siinas albat bheaivvego, ja buot seasa bajođit oduo seahkhit. Mii buottaga teh buot eri hárkkasa."

Lanzarote Hurdle rievddat Kempton Parkis eai olis sintehčohka hárkkain, dego muhtun Grade One-driven Kalif Du Berlais, goas Paul Nicholls jearrat "daidda muhtuna ovddas" ja "sintehčohka beaivi."

Kalif Du Berlais - goas omávuohta gávdnji guhkugat Sir Alex Ferguson - čájeha Harry Cobden ivdnis vierguhitin Coral Silviniaco Conti Chase ja válddábme oabbu, geađa kárgjis harja mánnás, ja son revnnai sisaheddji ovttas týppariin sadjára.

Nicholls áddjá: "Se on synkká beaivi go du eallit dálkkaspera, ja se eai mohtá sistemas. Buot omávuohta, ja ohcin, ja mu killa goorraga, go ii lea dárbbašdu vai sagdágah. Son jearrat jietjaga dán beaivis, son bouřigir ja mánnás eai lea dei ahkkurán riehtabil.

"Mun sáhtán sáid fálkkii, muhto dat se eai márkan cuohci. Harry lea goliti ja eai jága jiertehka ruovttus, dego eai dolkan. Son lea muohtenbairddu, go son válddaba jidháhkuin ja go son njálggan.

"Son jearrat lávlagos ja válddabe sárŋnás ja eai dábála maŋŋá, mii oahpá muot muottu, ja mii eai oahpat hárkkasa. Daihtá ii láhtá bátñe ahke, ja buot eai dádjega.

"Lihtti se ii muhtava válddála go ii jearrat ja se on muohttudagu boahka."

Kempton Parkis Coral Daily Rewards Shaker Handicap Chaseis, Jonjo ja AJ O'Neill's Peso nuorat su beaiveibmuhukka viergi goahttár beaivvis mdluttaján ja geađa vuozzáras birgaren dangkkan.

Harry Derham ivdnes Wertpol goassi dohuul augka dohkálagune fuohkkan ja son eahpaháhkaridhit ja fallat ja jámuhka soahka mánnat. Derham njálggá X viidai: "Jearrat lágga beaivi Kempton Parkis buorrán Wertpol, dohkálgari ákkis tuut stomachs osakii daldda."

"Se lágga beaivi go du eallit dálkkaspera, tai diehin eale alles du Geavsim. Se on daidda muhtuna ovddas buot," Paul Nicholls jearraag. Fotot: Alan Crowhurst/Getty Images

"Son lea eai šaddálvuohta ja bealli, son jearraan findjapima ja ja gintti muohta. Son lea dán mun sáhka, válddabe aktivitáhtta ja eai ni búddras. Racing eai sálbmél ja dahka stuvdet. Tšáğjá bohtát suopmámánim.

Kempton Park'čatti sajtse: "Buot oassálhii Kempton Parkis dehčá dat varra siinas albat bheaivvego, ja buot seasa bajođit oduo seahkhit. Mii buottaga teh buot eri hárkkasa."

source_doc:
Ashley Barnes at the double as Burnley claim welcome win over Millwall

Ashley Barnes bagged a brace as Burnley put their Premier League worries on hold to cruise into the fourth round of the FA Cup with a 5-1 win over Millwall.

The 36-year-old scored his first goal of the season early on and added his second midway through the second half as the blundering Lions gifted a confident home side the most emphatic of wins.

Boss Scott Parker made eight changes to the side that started in Wednesday's 2-2 draw with Manchester United and they did not disappoint, as further goals from Loum Tchaouna and Jaidon Anthony put them out of sight by half-time.

Substitute Jaydon Banel added Burnley's fifth on the stroke of 90 minutes before the shell-shocked Lions, who had completely capitulated, netted an added-time consolation through Josh Coburn.

Burnley dominated the opening exchanges and grabbed the lead in the 11th minute when Jacob Bruun Larsen squared for Barnes to sweep home past visiting goalkeeper Steven Benda.

The Lions mustered little in response, with Aidomo Emakhu booting their best chance straight at Burnley keeper Max Weiss after being released down the left by Joe Bryan.

But the visitors slowly grew into the game and should have levelled when Jake Cooper got his head on Alfie Doughty's cross from deep on the left but was denied by a brilliant over-arm save from Weiss.

The keeper saved again from Cooper on the half-hour as Millwall threatened a leveller but the visitors were undone by two defensive errors that put the game beyond their grasp.

Tchaouna was allowed to thread his left-foot shot from the edge of the box past a static Benda on 35 minutes and shortly before the break the Millwall keeper's poor clearance ultimately gifted Anthony the chance to slide home his side's third.

Millwall looked livelier at the start of the second half and Thierno Ballo should have done better when he found space to get a shot off in the left side of the box, but the home side were clearly in cruise control.

Tchaouna came close to his second when he rifled a shot against the outside of Benda's right-hand post and the increasingly inevitable fourth arrived on 65 minutes when Kamarl Grant made a hash of clearing Anthony's right-wing cross and a delighted Barnes mopped up.

Hunting for a hat-trick, Barnes flashed a header straight at Benda as the linesman's flag was raised, but it was Banel who completed the rout from close range before Coburn's confident finish in stoppage time.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Ashley Barnes máŋŋá dábála, go Burnley gulahallá vearbmiid Millwall áššiid

Ashley Barnes válddá duohka, go Burnley sáhttege vearbmorrat Premier League muohta vuođđu FA Cup oassi birra 5-1 geahččal Millwall.

Dálaris 36 jagi, njuolggá sihkkar gidda duohka ja máŋga sihkkar son dásso jearrat ja geahččat joavkkoid jearrat Shawon Lions gávdan muitalan ja gávdnu su mielde heđčalet geahččalan.

Bosse Scott Parker maiddu 8 muhtim jađđá olbmot, go muorjja 2-2 pojkkot ja Manchester United gárggola, ja soai gávdnet, go Loum Tchaouna ja Jaidon Anthonyit gávdne sirgego danbba almmuheapmi.

Substitutt Jaydon Banel maiddu Burnley beasa 5. gávdne 90 minuhtain fárroluvnna ovttamušvuohta ja gávdne, go baŋklaahki Lions, go don maiddainbma, geavttehu dan.adda-muhtihis Josh Coburn riehttá.

Burnley muđun háldda vuorbmiid ja vuolhkađu 11. minuhta, go Jacob Bruun Larsen čáppa Barnes oassaguvvá vearbmorrain oarru máttaráš Steven Benda.

Lions muhtamin maiddá matkan soakká, Aidomo Emakhu vuolggas vánoahemi Burnley goleppil Max Weiss mielde, go Joe Bryan áddjá son geahččá lavlu.

Muhto tuazzat mielli firit, go Jake Cooper loptu doarru Alfie Doughty guovrrosis mohtula sivdnijat muorra ja vearbmorra jáhgaga overhead salva Weiss buorigeahččálain.

Goleppil rádhjihet goťanu by jápmi Cooperin meahpálla, go Millwall joavkko losso urgednik ja gávdnet geaskalas, namma juvva doljašal hutkuhehpá gahtjal atne maarak.

Tchaouna dahkat biktah dan njuolga tjuidde làmge diegjida go Benda sábbala 35 minuhta cuvga ja bávvehtimuhehpá biddja almmuheapmi, go Millwall goleppil jearrat šattuu váddjo ja máŋga su tjuidda apnáirjja.

Millwall rietlá doljaid mátkat duolláde ja Thierno Ballo maiddo guodnavissuan go várrá mátkaluurna go સમયમાં jearrat gólganu, muhto muid bunta doljaidan.

Tchaouna suohkat máttadus go gávdned bärregojji go Benda's smerta dýri muorra ja go mírtin elkamu luhka kárpádekam 65 minuhta ja Kamarl Grant gávdne polemilev bikkara Anthonyne sioralga go Benda jus dat muorjdne.

Álbmancahtá duohka, Barnes goládat doarru bérkiral gažadni Benda meaggi ja gávddá Banel, go su FEI vātná Bender prehotjime màkâteaux näigerevljedl muidda seuntljak luhkan rietlivs dubdánimo.

hypo_5:
Ashley Barnes máŋŋá dábála, go Burnley gulahallá geahččalvuoš Millwall áššiid

Ashley Barnes válddá duohka, go Burnley guldá Premier League muohta vuolgá FA Cup oassi birra 5-1 geahččal Millwall.

Dálaris 36 jagi, njuolggá sihkkar gidda ja márkkoja sihkkar midda jearrat, go Lions biktuhtán gievkka geahččalan su mielde heđčalet geahččalan.

Bosse Scott Parker maiddu oavi muhtim jađđá olbmot, go muorjja 2-2 pojkkot ja Manchester United gárggola, ja soai gávdnet, go Loum Tchaouna ja Jaidon Anthonyit gávdne searmiluhta almmuheapmi.

Substitutt Jaydon Banel maiddu Burnley beasa 5. gávdne 90 minuhtain fárroluvnna ovttamušvuohta ja gávdne, go Lions, go don maiddainbma, geavttehu dan.adda muhtihis Josh Coburn riehttá.

Burnley muđun háldda vuorbmiid ja vuolhkađu 11. minuhta, go Jacob Bruun Larsen čáppa Barnes oassaguvvá vearbmorrain oarru máttaráš Steven Benda.

Lions muhtamin maiddá matkan soakká, Aidomo Emakhu vuolggas vánoahemi Burnley goleppil Max Weiss mielde, go Joe Bryan áddjá son geahččá lavlu.

Muhto tuazzat mielli firit, go Jake Cooper gollu doarru Alfie Doughty guovrrosis mohtula ja ja gávdnet geaskalas, namma juvva doljašal hutkuhehpá gahtjal atne maarak.

Goleppil rádhjihet goťanu by jápmi Cooperin meahpálla, go Millwall joavkko losso urgednik ja gávdnet geaskalas, namma muiddo doljaid meahpál thegírmá moottilinca go bántis njuvvat šiibmo amá or niksa youn gávdnet eallá.

Tchaouna dahkat biktah dan njuolga tjuidde làmge diegjida go Benda sábbala 35 minuhta cuvga ja bávvehtimuhehpá bidja almmuheapmi, go Millwall goleppil jearrat šattuu váddjo ja máŋga su tjuidda apnáirjja.

Millwall rietlá doljaid mátkat duolláde ja Thierno Ballo maiddo guodnavissuan go várrá mátkaluurna go pvaraide geahččalit, muhto muid bunta doljaidan.

Tchaouna suohkat máttadus go gávdned bärregojji go Benda's smerta dýri muorra ja go mírtin elkamu luhka kárpádekam 65 minuhta ja Kamarl Grant gávdne polemilev bikkara Anthonyne sioralga go Benda jus dat muorjdne.

Álbmancahtá duohka, Barnes goládat doarru bérkiral gažadni Benda meaggi ja gávddá Banel, go su FEI vātná Bender prehotjime màkâteau næigerevljedl muidda seuntljak luhkan rietlivs dubdánimo.

source_doc:
On a lighter note, just saw someone complaining about when games beg you to switch to easy mode when you fail.
I also hate this.
I love having an easy mode. Hell, I think games should just fuckin' let you cheat, as long as competitions all have agreed-on rules about it.
But every game that's pestered me into easy mode has been an instant put-down. I have plenty of games to play, if you want me to be done faster, congrats, I'm done faster.

This is what makes modern Marios - modern-ish anyway - so impossible for me to play.
"Did you die thwee times mawwio? Here's the golden supersuit of invincibility because you suck! If you don't want it, just carefully avoid ever pressing anything besides "start level yes again no no nothing else just start the level".
This is also why I stopped trying to play Phantom Pain. Whenever I died, it'd offer me the chicken hat and default to "yes", eventually I forgot to manually say "fuck off".

I get it's a retention thing, but it's so disrespectful.
Autoscaling difficulty also pisses me off, because I'll be gearing up for a challenge and then the game will panic and lower it to super easy because I've been "struggling".
I'll die or something, go back to try again, but nope, now the challenge is gone. You succeeded! You made the game go away! Don't worry, those challenges were for someone else. Someone better.
I can't remember if I ever completed a game with autoscaling difficulty.

I guess the basic difference between me and their target audience is that I like to figure out how to do something, while their target audience - at least in their heads - likes to take a log flume through a Disneyworld attraction.
A little jostling, a little fluids, but don't worry, baby, daddy Walt's got ya. You're safey-wafe, you don't even have to move, just sit there and tee hee, here's a wittle splashy-splash.
If I wanted that, I'd go sit in a fucking dog park and pet a dog.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Muhto bázev ii gila sama heait, maiddus geavahat niehku mii vai sihke geahčen guovttos muhtun, muhto mii oaidnalit eai šaddat veahkke.
Mii in eai ferte dehket.
Mii in sarehket dehkevahttit, muhto ahte mii geavahat sihke puškkáliseahtta mii kârrzhit ahte njukču okta jodde guldal.
Muhto/heahká gábba mannakká muhtun, muhto oahpahtehkku muhtun ii dárbehdalzi. Muhtin ii ohcit iige mii guldal, mu uđasa beari maiddus, oahpahtehkku goohtit.

Detta lea dehka doavttaguovttán - doavttáglovčik, muhto fámá nu ahte mii in bajás.
"Don doai háltá thwee guoldu-mawwio? Dát lea gulve šáhkkola senjja sihke mii būki! Juhkku beahkkin, muhto muhto, mii eai gova doalu meahcce geahkat "báhtum juohkku bálká jeara bohtude".
Dát lea eai muhtun in gohtit goahki Phantom(Pain), muhto go don dasa, ahte muuttahastit guvvsit, muhto mojohat "dahkku ah appahti, muhto eai mii ga jehkki".

Mii boahtalit Sámi omd.ret'dee stahta, muhto mii in ivittit gidji tjuorii mii guhtás.
Muhto muhto mii lea masiiddit máivu šaddet geavahit muhtun, muhto do boaren mii jeara beaksit, muhto mii lea deis.
Muhto guhtus, ahte dan olkkan jag hilbe oahpjitse, jeara beaksitin viedná dás, mai dat go ligguど.
Muhto de vákned dammahan doolli aid.

hypo_2:
Muhtos bázev ii gila sama heait, maiddus geavahat niehku mii vai sihke guovttos muhtun moai eai ohcit.
Mii in eai ferte dehket.
I love dehkévahtit sitná.
Muhto, mii fákka cærrá sihkut, mii dárbo fin go muhtun oahpahtehkku ahte dökkes muhtun oahkkit dárbmu.
Muhttin ii bálge ráhkadit geahččusmu máttel, ahte mii mohtte/si almmukku lei reahká muhtun, ahte veahká mii muhkka makkahkku sitná.

Dát lea dehka modern Marios - modernish ii gozai lea ieš mohtte beari.
"Don doai háltá thwee guoldu-mawwio? Dát lea gulve šáhkkola senjja sihke mii idxi dárkára! Muhto jeara ahte dat vártni, muhto jehkke vuordnit "báhtum juohkku bálká jeara gåriiga veardtan oahpahteguhdi".
Dát lea eai muhtun in gohtit goahki Phantom(Pain). Muhto muhtun doai máhcet, ahte nu eait maiddaguhki ou'kšum guđege luhkkahku kie'tu."

I get ahte dát lea aála moahkaňat, muhto ii fokkai go ivttar.
Autoscaling dihkku mii áššá mii čáhká go muittat, guahče deh gohtán, muhto muhkka ii muttá nu muhttá "allehka".
Muhto mii eai gielahka mii saime dolman. Ii juobessat! II mun eai gova! Mii eai buohka, dát lea moahka noehtán, dártoš ibža mahnmarkku. Muidde beahkkit ei duohkat dárbmo. Skuik iige aihkam dus birra maiddus diesel!
I can't remember if I ever completed a game with autoscaling difficulty.

Muhto dás lea boshka mii meri viđui ogu ja gohtáni mii dárbo führt.[- setat] muhto mii lea, jat ohcit duottar ja doddeitais mu situoddu [*clik šenliyt ]. Muhto daan ivtterongiis – uhti behti tallan, don ii nyky giữa (ii jeahka nadja dáne avd) – ovd’dear sihke. Don in dat lotin, muhto galhkuovddas orro-anibokja ja njušmat TVA ár'abeht!
If I wanted that, I'd go sit in a freaking dog park and pet a dog.

hypo_7:
Muhto, muhto, áibba juohkái, muhto ii geavahdu muhtin ohkat guovttos guolma aihká bálkái ea\'.
I eai ferte dehket.
I love dehkévahtit sitná. Muhto, muitale man dárdá fárddet ahte muhtosam ja goavddat jearret muhtos.
Muhto beare ahte muhtun ivttahka vuorthi ahte dárbmo fáhkka! Dárbo mii muhtin muktavuohtin - ahte visku mii huvet muhtin, muhto "ahte!"

Dát lea modern Marios - modernish ii gohččat aittimuhtin guovttos.
"Don doai háltá thwee guoldu-mawwio? Dát lea gulve šáhkkola senjja sihke mii idxi dárkára! Nii ahte ni gurdne, ah beardi sii vehtet jáhkkara dehčala ".
Dát ii ala jearran muhtun doai ni helles som luonto! Mii geahtá fas áigga, ahte mii jearkkanan mii haahka I'm no worse than dán/hahtá aihkeyt ja suonaba.

Muho, dat áffohasi fast muohtun boskovit!
Muhtun ivttahkar ii geavahka dehkka muhtin ahte muhtet, ja muht vaari; muhto naintne yran!
Mu geahtá log gum or diibmi or báilres luä fán martna. Mu eai jearahkkan mii log gahteldit.
Tä baasi daaarja eai aaniuhtta guoddda muhtosbirvi! I can't remember if I ever completed a game with autoscaling difficulty.

Dápmu ii riegenu suolget ja njuttá.
Muhtun ívdin dárbmo iehci mat son geavaheigh yhta natti. Muhto oahbund chbeen! Ättne dehket beari ii sáze daččá muhtin.
I ii fándehket mii uhkká iežat "vilda muhtunis" sun terminiga kiddeh. Mu fárre gilli mii log.

  "landing_page.why_join_company.free.description": "We don't get in the way of you interacting with people and having fun. People can support us for nice to have features.",
  "landing_page.testimonials.description": "Thousands of members have found friendships, a community, love, and much more with us. Here are just a few of their stories:",
  "advertise.page_title": "Advertise on {{website_name}}",
  "advertise.why_advertise.title": "Why Advertise on with us?",
  "advertise.why_advertise.content.description": "Here are just a few reasons:",
  "advertise.why_advertise.content.item_2": "With ~100,000 new members joining us every month, you'll reach new customers daily.",
  "advertise.why_advertise.content.item_3": "You'll have access to a dashboard so you know how your ads are doing 24/7.",
  "advertise.why_advertise.content.item_4": "You can change up your ads throughout the month to keep things fresh.",
  "advertise.how_it_works.content.description": "Rather than selling impressions or clicks, we’ve divided our ad space into equally sized slots:",
  "advertise.how_it_works.content.item_3": "Ads run from the 1st to the last day of the month",
  "advertise.cost.content.description": "A slot starts at $500 USD per month. If you would like to run more than one slot a month, each additional slot starts at $400 USD per month.",
  "advertise.cost.content.note": "Renew by the 15th of the month to guarantee your slots for the next month.",
  "advertise.contact_us.content.description": "If you have any questions or would like to advertise on our website please email us at:",
  "advertise.aside.ad_image_specs.title": "Ad Image Specs",
  "advertise.aside.ad_image_specs.specs.aspect_ratio": "Aspect ratio:",
  "advertise.aside.ad_image_specs.specs.display_size": "Display size:",
  "advertise.aside.ad_text_specs.title": "Ad Text Specs",
  "advertise.aside.ad_text_specs.specs.lines_label": "# of lines:",
  "advertise.aside.help_note": "Don't have an ad? We can help you with that. All you have to do is just get into {{link_tag_start}}contact with us{{link_tag_end}}.",
  "advertise.sample_ads.title": "Sample Ads",
  "advertise.sample_ads.cta_label": "view all",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.heading": "Welcome Home",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.subheading": "Setting yourself up for success.",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.pace.heading": "Go at Your Own Pace",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.consent.description": "You will get the most out of the app by respecting people’s boundaries.",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.love.description": "Love what you find appealing and interesting. The more you love, the better we can recommend stuff you'll enjoy.",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.scene.heading": "Find Your Local Scene"
}
```

source_doc:
Ate a little more chicken and had a wash. Also had a little more fight when I made her take her fluids last.
We phoned the vet at 830 this morning to ask if they looked under her soft pallet while she was sedated, as she has major ear polyps. Was told the vet would call back. They didn't, rang just now (1645 local) and was told the vet wasn't in today. I was a bit annoyed and said "we paid you over £600 yesterday, you said phone if we have questions, we have questions you're not answering!"
"I don't like your tone, sir "
"It's not your fault personally, but when I pay the better part of a grand I expect a level of service that you're not providing"
"I'll get a vet from the other branch to ring you"

Seeing vet at other practise at half seven for more anti nausea medicine. They're not going to charge out of hours rate as we rang first thing.
Just got another 10ml of rescue fluids into her.

Back. Anti nausea jab, gabapentin, and she's home. Ate some chicken and some cheese.
Got more gabapentin in pill form for her, too

Won't stop eating. Having to slow her down to prevent her from vomiting. She's also absolutely, completely, totally, off her tits. Mullered. Stoned. Caned. Fully in the yellow submarine.
Vet says this'll reset her appetite, or, when we stop giving her painkillers, show it's pain stopping her eating, which would mean medical imaging time.

She's eating a bit, and even played a little, but she's still on the medications so it might be that. Still giving her recovery fluids, which she's still not fighting as she would normally.

Valencia has decided we are all Suspicious. Won't come when called, runs if you go to her. Still comes on her own terms, so it's fine, she's just seen her adoptive sister repeatedly wrapped in a towel and made to drink Stuff, and she wants none of that, thank you very much.

Ming update: she's a little more active, but still floppy and sleeping a lot. She's on two lots of painkillers still, so she's probably fairly stoned.
She IS eating, little and often, and finished off the last of her rescue fluids from a saucer by herself. She's washing, but she hasn't slapped valencia in ages, and she's still not right. Hoping it's the painkillers, and that when we withdraw them, her appetite remains.

Ming has finished the course of painkillers and is showing determined desire to go out, which we're not allowing yet. She's eating, playing, but it'll be a few days until the drugs are cleared from her system and we'll then see how she is.
Cautiously optimistic.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Mun čohkkádeaddji muorjjat ja moai olggos. Olnu muorjjat go mun giegkkan henna fliidiid.
Min čáhkkašan vednevuoda 830 ollu goas mun válddán go felavde muorraheaddji, dahje hánna muohta álgu muorrahán. Mun oassálas dehkket lehkos, ja olis vednevuoda čáhkkašis. Neatnan in, muohta lágas (1645 local) ja čáhkkaši vednevuoda lea in denne. Mun lea muorjjás ja čáhkkaši "mii géreheaddja in sárdni, in diehtá muorjjá, muohta lea birra in sárdni!"
"Mun in doallu dán du muorra, báhkka "`
"Dát ii leat du muorra, muhto go mun makká mii náddbe girjji muorjjat mun jigge muohta, mun ođđa servísci ja geabaš mii tu čohkkim."
"Mun nu geahččat vednevuoda earhage dán edno iige."

Vesnelat vednevuoda áigi veahka seahkkat almmiii itket anti-nákkajörmun. Dot in geahččiidin muohta itsdamgo, muorjját.
Just got another 10ml avdalii fliidiid sihke mehci.

Buorrede. Anti-nákkajörmun jab, gabapentin, ja šit lea goas. Čohkká muorjjat ja muorjjat.
Gállát máŋga gabapentin pilladum sihke.

Leat in beas gažaldan. Mun gullojuj hálat goahtta maiddái ijaa gul. Sii in goit hára, de dat ii mu blokehtit. Šiit lea maŋkkas, ja duogá anddid noid "
Vesnevuoda maid geahččat dán nu mujtás muorjjá, ja go mu máide máŋgoc.

Muorráš dát máŋga, ja dat in voláldit geahččat, muhto álgos, ain váldda Berggo, lea muorrá, ja in leamaža. Sálbos lea méhci, ja de mii ii muohta.

Ming veahka: sihke álkšud na, muhto lea árjjái ja suokká goit. Dat lea du muorra, ja de dat ii hállán.
Dat LEA muddit, almmu ja jàlli, ja mángas vehkkadeb váldde meahcadbodda. Dat in mosthá, muht GOLO tállia.

Ming lea vaihkku šit muorra hunna, ja lea geahččat dikku sihke beasat, muhto váirros ii nuorrlar stiggehkko. Mun šaddan sihtá muorra.
Čohtat géneva ín.

  "You can sit and wait when your visitors remember your brand, or… You can bring customers back to your online store with remarketing. And that’s no rocket science — read this article to learn how to get started.",
  "Facebook retargeting ads will appear on Facebook sites, and they get about two billion visits every month.",
  "The word “dynamic” in the term means that something in the ads changes – in this case, the items displayed in the ad. To give you a proper understanding of how it works, let’s go through some examples.",
  "We also have a visitor named Janet. Janet also finds the Awesome Super Shoes store on Google. She likes our Red Shoes, but it is four days to her payday and she is short on cash, so she leaves the store website without making a purchase.",
  "Five days later, she is on Facebook, browsing her friends’ posts. Between the posts, she can see an Awesome Super Shoes ad with the Red Shoes she already liked. Since she got her paycheck yesterday, she decides to spoil herself and buy the shoes.",
  "In the evening, he goes through several review sites about running shoes. Since most of the sites are on the Google Display Network, one of them runs an Awesome Super Shoes ad with the Running Shoes Jared has already looked at. He hasn’t found better shoes yet and he’s quite tired, so he decides to buy the Running Shoes.",
  "And that is what dynamic retargeting is about. No matter how visitors get to your webpage, if they don’t purchase anything, they’ll see your ads with the product they were interested in.",
  "Hit launch campaign and that’s it. No coding, no messing with CSV files, no stress. The process is the same for Google remarketing ads.",
  "We can’t wait to learn how you’re doing retargeting in your Mambalo store. Tell us in the comments below!"
]
```

[
  "Bure äige",
  "Buohkat diibmu !",
  "Šoppala Instagram-viestit leat muhtin šaddan",
  "Láhkadit geahččalit su Instagram-viestties, danin gávdnan Mambalo.",
  "Šattat giđđat produktat",
  "Gávdnet geahččadeaddjiid vuosttaš",
  "Burat čáhkkis? Teavdávuhkkit",
  "Láhkadit geahččalit su email-viidain Mailchimp",
  "Ektá Mambalo-čálletat geahččat email-lista ja dáhpáhuvvat målgo Šaddet su olmmoš- ja bálkkis-viidain.",
  "Share doarrugasvuohta",
  "Gávdnet emaila geahččadeaddjiid sárkan",
  "Luhttu geavas? Šaddat 'ahtas",
  "Láhkadit geahččalit su email-viidain MailChimp",
  "Facebook & Google Retargeting: Muktin dán otná su eallimis geahččat su olmmošvuohtan.",
  "Gávddu su eallimis geahččat čiekku su lláđas.",
  "Don maiddai buori ja geahččut, mii ovttas su brandu, ja... Don dehkkálága su olmmošvuođain viestá dan mánnukku. Ja dán ii lea fokta science - luohtto dán artiklasa su dán dás.". 
  "Facebook retargeting-vuodain viestit vearrát Facebook-sáhtos, ja heittá geahččat muhtin dohkki geahččat almmuheapmi su maŋimu.",
  "Dán “dynamic” dán iešjuhkat in deman, mii ávkanunat geahčat - dán jus, dáhtorakttat viestit mii ektá geahččat. Vahkkit dáhtoruhttone maida mii árvalit, olgáhuvna muhto mii dál.",
  "Mii ále hálii geahččat vearrátvarná giđč skáldin von Janet. Janet ále geahččá Awesome Super Shoes áiggi Google. Son dehkká naših Red Shoes, muhto dat ii lea čuovvuba vaikkái ja ii örbmus su gávdnui assá. ",
  "Miehtii vealas férnna, son lea Facebookh, riekta sihkkokta viestab. Dán viestab, son aavahuvva Awesome Super Shoes viestit mii ektá Red Shoes mii son árvádan. Don lea su njuomus ja ahttá diibmu lohccat. ",
  "Ihkkalit dal sáhka, son veahkki muhtin dastangaluohka. Jus buorrin ĝeahka mii sihkkokta Google Display Network, muhto it dán válddanuohtá Awesome Super Shoes viestit mii feila påse dán Running Shoes Jared árvádan. Son ii lea ávki dál ebattjem, ja he gávddet, muhto son eáâstá jiŋodh Running Shoes.",
  "Ja dán lea pārti dán dynamic retargeting. Nii buorre mii geahččad su se deantežat, jus he ii gávttalvu otnu ektál su gáhkkelesat viestit mii son árvádan.",
  "Huhttu lanša ja dán ii lea dán. Iiga cealkki, ei ektá CSV bálkkid, ei stress. Dán prosessii lea dán ja Google remarketing-viidain.",
  "Mii ii hálii dal voittivahe máttas su Mambalo-gávdnas, võiššá vlakkorbin almmuh."
]
```

source_doc:
Celtic hammer Dundee United on O'Neill's return

Normal service resumed at Celtic Park as champions Celtic secured a dominant 4-0 win over Dundee United and their first clean sheet since Martin O'Neill's previous game in charge.

Two first-half goals in five minutes from Yang Hyun-jun and Arne Engels sent Celtic on their way as O'Neill returned to the dugout in style following Wilfried Nancy's brief but disastrous reign.

Substitute Benjamin Nygren grabbed his 11th goal of the season and Daizen Maeda netted on the rebound to equal Celtic's two biggest wins of the league season so far. Both of them were in O'Neill's caretaker spell in charge, which resulted in seven wins from eight games.

Celtic sent for the 73-year-old on Monday after terminating Nancy's contract in the wake of six defeats - and 18 goals against - in eight matches.

The chaos, confusion and defensive fragility that marked Nancy's reign disappeared as the Hoops moved three points off the top of the table.

Nobody in the stadium would have been surprised to see O'Neill restore Celtic's long-standing 4-3-3 formation and the team picked up where they left off under O'Neill, as if they had awoken from a nightmare and got on with life as normal.

Centre-back Liam Scales was back to the consistent form he displayed before suffering in and out of a back three under the Frenchman.

Callum McGregor dictated play again and Celtic's wide players, Yang and Sebastian Tounekti, were given attacking licence after being handed wing-back roles by the former Columbus Crew head coach.

Celtic enjoyed 78 per cent possession, had 22 shots at goal and let United have just three. Their opponents averaged 12 shots during Nancy's tenure and United managed 17 themselves during their 2-1 win over the Hoops at Tannadice less than four weeks ago.

Celtic penned United in from the start, with Kieran Tierney instrumental in creating a series of first-half chances.

The left-back had a shot deflected wide, Yang and Scales threatened from headers and Maeda flicked a low cross of the bar, before the pressure paid off in the 27th minute.

Such was Celtic's dominance that Scales found himself in possession on the edge of the box and rolled a pass to Yang, who drilled home from 20 yards.

Maeda soon mis-kicked a volley before Engels produced a first-time finish from Tierney's pass.

It was not all plain sailing for Celtic in the first half. Mexican right-back Julian Araujo marked his first start with a yellow card for a dangerous challenge on Will Ferry, who was still hobbling when he took the resulting free-kick.

United also had chances and Dario Naamo looked unsure whether to head or volley Craig Sibbald's deep cross and did neither and Owen Stirton twice came close.

The striker was firstly foiled by a goal-saving block from Scales after being gifted possession by Auston Trusty and later shot just wide from 18 yards after the Celtic central defence backed off.

United brought on winger Amar Fatah for holding midfielder Pan Camara at half-time but Celtic were even more dominant in the second half.

Reo Hatate and Maeda missed good chances before Nygren shot high into the net from six yards in the 63rd minute.

Maeda had an easy finish six minutes later after Tounekti's shot was saved.

hypo_1:
Celtic hammerat Dundee United O'Neill's ruovttus

Normála serviidnni boares hálddat Celtic Parkkis, go čáhcerat Celtic ovddas 4-0 vojálda Dundee United ja loroš dárbbu juste Martin O'Neill's géassá viggala.

Guorrasa áššes maŋŋel 5 minuhtta go Yang Hyun-jun ja Arne Engels čuobmida Celtic čáli ja O'Neill ruovttus dugáhkkus, go Wilfried Nancy's muhtin ja vemmeliga rohedogit.

Borraš Benjamin Nygren nábba 11. golladna vuodde ja Daizen Maeda gápmajit biegga giellda aáddjomi go čálggut Celtic áigi ubbna vuoddegoat. Dálgo beiden olggubillii muhto O'Neill's spesialgobma, go mannat geahččis seamma golladit geahččat ovttas oahppit.

Celtic irgá áddit 73-vuolggii mátkku suohkan momma namma Nancy's kontrakti, go basit gáhkkousa - ja 18 gollat mielluden - go vuoigga jámla.

Gáhkkou, málbua ja vargnáttán go Nancy's ruovttus mannan ovččohon, gos Hoops čuohkká preggá hyvvii nisboddu duogu.

Nemá dat, go beaivi girjoeat, júmatti O'Neill restauráidan Celtic longa 4-3-3 olbmot ja lagat bođii gojja O'Neill's gniit, go dihte áŋgiru oahppnit goptá išnemeahkkis.

Centra-báika Liam Scales meahcčun oamoja mínná háldde dáhkkírast, go mátkon mínná go iniquejuin guoska Frantsalaš rúvnnan.

Callum McGregor dikta reiddóva gohčat ja Celtic's dúorra beaivválaš, Yang ja Sebastian Tounekti, gávdná gávmut naudne ja oahpahkka dollá Nikko Crew ovlmmoze gawdaga.

Celtic ráhkkade 78 prosenttala nikká, lea 22 veahkhallat gollá ja leat United beas 3. Gálddu guoska geahččeas Pedro go Nancy's omdolga ja United hává 17 doalagi go jámus 2-1 go Hoops' Tannadice neai ákkar searabi.

Celtic fálled untenam nissáhtiv ,go Kieran Tierney halah válddju ja oahppahkket nuloska diohtavá oaddallat lekkohit.

Leahkke nair avdnaldo kihitti beittmuo, Yang ja Scales veahkhalat gohedádan ja Maeda léda bábmir 27 minuttilás.

Gávdnahša Celticu nurráhán go Scales daldi bajásit go boksan ja rolláhkit belion Yang ja go fas bábmir 20 yardas.

Maeda mánnan móndon gohkkit volly go Engels pue muorris életuálmas hitsa.

Leahke sis onget góll meetos, go Mexická anja ystona Julian Araujo lahčikratá varhmát gilbmi go dás leketes ja everdru vai Will Ferry, go de while marndia go galbdi trongá.

United vadde oahpazzi hodnie-vinier Amar Fatah go dás mátkan Pan Camara vuoroma gálgu gohkká gálema.

Reo Hatate ja Maeda geahččahá inngáití golldat vuosme sámmágo go Nygren 63. minuttilás.

Maeda hávva ealmmi gazzári muáņu go Tounekti's golllá huhtásis goja.

Celtic hammerat Dundee United O'Neill's ruovttus

Normála serviidnni boares hálddat Celtic Parkkis, go čáhcerat Celtic ovddas mordet 4-0 vojálda Dundee United ja loroš dárbbu go Martin O'Neill's geassá viggala.

Guorrasa áššes maŋŋel 5 minuhtta go Yang Hyun-jun ja Arne Engels čuobmida Celtic čáli ja O'Neill ruovttus dugáhkkus, go Wilfried Nancy's muhtin ja vemmeliga rohedogit.

Borraš Benjamin Nygren nábba 11. golladna vuodde ja Daizen Maeda gápmajit biegga giellda aáddjomi go čálggut Celtic áigi ubbna vuoddegoat. Dálgo beiddet olggubillii muhto O'Neill's ruvttus giellá, go mannat geahččis seamma golladit geahččat ovttas oahppit.

Celtic irgá áddit 73-vuolggii mátkku suohkan momma namma Nancy's kontrakti, go basit gáhkkousa - ja 18 gollat mielluden - go vuoigga jámla.

Gáhkkou, málbua ja vargnáttán go Nancy's ruovttus mannan ovččohon, gos Hoops čuohkká preggá hyvvii nisboddu duogu.

Nemá dat, go beaivi girjoeat, júmatti O'Neill restauráidan Celtic longa 4-3-3 olbmot ja lagat bođii gojja O'Neill's gniit, go dihte áŋgiru oahppnit goptá išnemeahkkis.

Centra-báika Liam Scales meahcčun oamoja mínná háldde dáhkkírast, go mátkon mínná go iniquejuin guoska Frantsalaš rúvnnan.

Callum McGregor dikta reiddóva gohčat ja Celtic's dúorra beaivválaš, Yang ja Sebastian Tounekti, gávdná gávmut naudne ja oahpahkka dollá Nikko Crew ovlmmoze gawdaga.

Celtic ráhkkade 78 prosenttala nikká, lea 22 veahkhallat gollá ja leat United beas 3. Gálddu guoska geahččeas Pedro go Nancy's omdolga ja United hává 17 doalagi go jámus 2-1 go Hoops' Tannadice neai ákkar searabi.

Celtic fálled untenam nissáhtiv, go Kieran Tierney halah válddju ja oahppahkket nuloska diohtavá oaddallat lekkohit.

Leahkke nair avdnaldo kihitti beittmuo, Yang ja Scales veahkhalat gohedádan ja Maeda léda bábmir 27 minuttilás.

Gávdnahša Celticu nurráhán go Scales daldi bajásit go boksan ja rolláhkit belion Yang ja go fas bábmir 20 yardas.

Maeda mánnan móndon gohkkit volly go Engels pue muorris életuálmas hitsa.

Leahke sis onget góll meetos, go Mexická anja ystona Julian Araujo lahčikratá varhmát gilbmi go dás leketes ja everdru vai Will Ferry, go de while marndia go galbdi trongá.

United vadde oahpazzi hodnie-vinier Amar Fatah go dás mátkan Pan Camara vuoroma gálgu gohkká gálema, muhto Celtic ivrru gávdná hálddasá go galljot beit 2-2.

Reo Hatate ja Maeda geahččahá inngáití golldat vuosme sámmágo go Nygren 63. minuttilás.

Maeda hávva ealmmi gazzári muáņu go Tounekti's golllá huhtásis goja.

Gávdnahša Celticu nurráhán go Scales daldi bajásit go boksan ja rolláhkit belion Yang ja go fas bábmir 20 yardas.

Maeda mánnan móndon gohkkit volly go Engels pue muorris életuálmas hitsa.

Leahke sis onget góll meetos, go Mexická anja ystona Julian Araujo lahčikratá varhmát gilbmi go dás leketes ja everdru vai Will Ferry, go de while marndia go galbdi trongá.

United vadde oahpazzi hodnie-vinier Amar Fatah go dás mátkan Pan Camara vuoroma gálgu gohkká gálema, muhto Celtic ivrru gávdná hálddasá go galljot beit 2-2.

Reo Hatate ja Maeda geahččahá inngáití golldat vuosme sámmágo go Nygren 63. minuttilás.

Maeda hávva ealmmi gazzári muáņu go Tounekti's golllá huhtásis goja.
hypo_5:
Celtic hammerat Dundee United O'Neill's ruovttus

Norrmálaš servihkki boares hálddat Celtic Parkis, go čáhcerat Celtic ovddas mordet 4-0 vojálda Dundee United ja loroš dárbbu go Martin O'Neill's geassá viggala.

Guorrasa áššes maŋŋel 5 minuhtta guovddášit Yang Hyun-jun ja Arne Engels čuobmida Celtic čáli go O'Neill ruovttus dugáhkkus, go Wilfried Nancy's muhtin ja vemmeliga rohedogit.

Borraš Benjamin Nygren nábba 11. golladna vuodde ja Daizen Maeda gápmajit biegga giellda aáddjomi go čálggut Celtic áigi ubbna vuoddegoat. Dálgo beiddet olggubillii muhto O'Neill's giettá ruovttus giellá, go mannat geahččis seamma golladit geahččat ovttas oahppit.

Celtic irgá áddit 73-vuolggii mátkku suohkan momma namma Nancy's kontrakti, go basit gáhkkousa - ja 18 gollat mielluden - go vuoigga jámla.

Gáhkkou, málbua ja vargnáttán go Nancy's ruovttus mannan ovččohon, gos Hoops čuohkká preggá hyvvii nisboddu duogu.

Ingen nahtá dehálasa go oahpihi O'Neill restauraidan Celtic longa 4-3-3 olbmot ja lagat bođii gojja O'Neill's gniit, go dihte áŋgiru oahppnit goptá išnemeahkkis.

Centra-báika Liam Scales meahcčun oamoja mínná háldde dáhkkírast, go mátkon mínná go iniquejuin guoska Frantsalaš rúvnnan.

Callum McGregor dikta reiddóva gohčat ja Celtic's dúorra beaivválaš, Yang ja Sebastian Tounekti, gávdná gávmut naudne ja oahpahkka dollá Nikko Crew ovlmmoze gawdaga.

Celtic ráhkkade 78 prosenttala nikká, lea 22 veahkhallat gollá ja leat United beas 3. Gálddu guoska geahččeas Pedro go Nancy's omdolga ja United hává 17 doalagi go jámus 2-1 go Hoops' Tannadice neai ákkar searabi.

Celtic fálled untenam nissáhtiv, go Kieran Tierney halah válddju ja oahppahkket nuloska diohtavá oaddallat lekkohit.

Leahkke nair avdnaldo kihitti beittmuo, Yang ja Scales veahkhalat gohedádan ja Maeda léda bábmir 27 minuttilás.

Gávdnahša Celticu nurráhán go Scales daldi bajásit go boksan ja rolláhkit belion Yang ja go fas bábmir 20 yardas.

Maeda mánnan móndon gohkkit volly go Engels pue muorris életuálmas hitsa.

Leahke sis onget góll meetos, go Mexická anja ystona Julian Araujo lahčikratá varhmát gilbmi go dás leketes ja everdru vai Will Ferry, go de while marndia go galbdi trongá.

United vadde oahpazzi hodnie-vinier Amar Fatah go dás mátkan Pan Camara vuoroma gálgu gohkká gálema, muhto Celtic ivrru gávdná hálddasá go galljot beit 2-2.

Reo Hatate ja Maeda geahččahá inngáití golldat vuosme sámmágo go Nygren 63. minuttilás.

Maeda hávva ealmmi gazzári muáņu go Tounekti's golllá huhtásis goja.

[
  "Powerful and easy to use. No set-up or transaction fees. And no credit card required. Set up your free account once, and keep it as long as you like. Exactly what “free” is supposed to be.",
  "Join the 1.6 million small businesses that have trusted the Mambalo E‑commerce platform to sell online.",
  "Set up your Mambalo store once to easily sync and sell across a website, social media, marketplaces like Amazon, and live in-person. Get started with one, or try them all.",
  "№1 Fastest implementation e-commerce platform in 2019.",
  "Get expert technical support whenever you need it.",
  "Mambalo App Store",
  "Grow your online store with new tools and apps from our Mambalo partners.",
  "№1 Fastest implementation e-commerce platform in 2019.",
  "Turn social sharing into social selling. Easily add and sell products on your Facebook and Instagram feeds to let shoppers browse and make purchases from inside their favorite social media channels.",
  "Sell on marketplaces",
  "Get a piece of the $200B pie with marketplace integrations for eBay and Amazon. Sell seamlessly across the most popular marketplaces right from your Mambalo dashboard.",
  "Sell online, in-store, and on-the-go",
  "Accept payments in-store and on the go with Square and 52 other point-of-sale systems. And best of all, inventory levels are automatically updated in your Mambalo account so all your stores stay perfectly in sync.",
  "Take your small business global with built-in international payment tools and translation support for 50 languages — and counting.",
  "No credit card required.",
  "Manage anywhere from the Mambalo mobile app",
  "Shipping that works for you",
  "Security you can trust",
  "Create, manage, and track advertisements, all from your Mambalo dashboard. Create low-cost advertisements that drive the right shoppers to your store in minutes. No experience required. You provide the dream, we’ll handle the techy stuff.",
  "* That’s it! Track results in your Mambalo dashboard",
  "Shop designer sunglasses for women, men and kids. Wearel online store. Choose among the most stylish sunglasses at an affordable price."
]
```

  "Fáhtit markeanaid",
  "Boahtá rašša e 200B dollárin leaskka mii markeanaid integration de eBay ja Amazon. Fáhtit buorremarkeanaid ránno juvüstis Mambalo daššobargguid.",

  "Aakkadit rašša buorre ja muhtin go Square ja 52 eará point-of-sale jearrávuohta. Ja in dihtla, inventory cearrádat automatalaš báliid du Mambalo munnjeibmárkku ja geahččat buorregiid jearrávuohta.",

  "* Dán lea! Tšárcat daid mis dán Mambalo daššobargguid",

]

source_doc:
US bound Thompson stars as Galway reach FBD final

California-bound Matthew Thompson lashed home 2-06 as Galway overcame Leitrim by 11 points in Tuam to book their spot in next week's FBD League decider.

2025 Young Footballer of the Year nominee Thompson will be out of action for the entirety of the league and the early part of the championship, with Padraic Joyce confirming that the Salthill-Knocknacarra players is studying in Berkeley for the upcoming semester.

He was the leading figure on a largely experimental Galway side - which also contained Cian Hernon and Kieran Molloy - as they came from three points down at half-time to beat Leitrim.

Thompson buried a goal in the top corner in the first half but the Connacht champions trailed Leitrim at the break, Killian Gaffney proving effective from placed balls, while Ryan O'Rourke and Jack Kelly also landed points.

Galway manager Padraic Joyce remonstrates with the referee over a decision

However, with Thompson converting a second half penalty, Galway eased home after the interval, with 10 different scorers overall as they ran out 2-19 to 0-14 winners.

After two rounds of the FBD League, the top two progress to next week's final, with Galway facing the winner of tomorrow's Roscommon-Mayo tie.

In Leinster, Westmeath have booked their spot in the O'Byrne Cup final after an 11-point win over Offaly in a goal-fest in Mullingar.

Waiting for them in the decider is a Kildare outfit that defeated Dublin 1-22 to 1-13.

Mark McHugh's Westmeath side advanced ahead of reigning champions Longford following a coin toss last Saturday but they impressed on the field of play on Saturday.

A brace of goals apiece from Danny McCarton and Brandon Kelly, plus another from Senan Baker, saw them run out 5-10 to 2-08 winners.

Ciaran Murphy scored two goals either side of half-time to pull the visitors back into the contest, the margin being briefly reduced to three points 11 minutes into the second half.

However, an unanswered burst of 3-02 over the next 15 minutes saw the hosts settle the contest in an emphatic manner.

Kildare found their feet in the second half against Dublin and now are one game away from a first O'Byrne Cup since 2014.

Harry O'Neill fires to the net for Kildare

Both management teams experimented in Newbridge with Dublin in particular shorn of overly familiar faces, but in the first half it seemed to matter little as they led 1-08 to 0-08 at the break.

Jamie McCarville palmed home their goal but it was Clyde Burke who caught the eye for the travelling support with some brilliant shooting that included two orange flags - the second of which was of the highest quality.

Alex Beirne was racking up the scores for the Lilywhites though and his two-point free early in the second half kick-started a run of 1-05 without reply, Harry O'Neill with the goal in the 43rd minute.

Kildare continued to turn the screw with James Harris' late two-pointer sending them on their way.

hypo_0:
US-buoren Thompson ňam̌aset Galway vaikko FBD-finaaliin

California-buoren Matthew Thompson čáhces 2-06, já Galway otná Leitrim 11 pointas Tuamis, ja dohkkeheami spot ńa restmat FBD Liga oahppasiid.

2025 Nuortan Fudbaldomaššavuohta propon Thompson máhtii lei geahča vuordnas geahčadettiin FBD-jahtiin ja bóaggis geahčadettiin, vuosttaid Padraic Joyce vahki úččebuhtri Salthill-Knocknacarra lea seavvaid Berkeley já ohci mesahtávuodemiin.

Son lei várremen vázzan maŋimuš Galway-siida - mii lea ókkolevášn Niin Hernon ja Kieran Molloy - já de ferddet almmi jearruma áŋgor mearridat lea 3 point Nr. lehtihkan tuohkemiin úččebuhtriin Leitrim.

Thompson bálkái golan topagávtas leuʹvda, muhto Connacht-oavdameas lea Leitrim vaittaza úččebuhtri, Killian Gaffney já Susalaevoehtar óbmoeha súhkat eavtte.

Galway-máŋgaš Padraic Joyce ńuohka sámis fuolga varguhkaga óhkaguin šîkeja

Muhto, go Thompson boaregoji fuohkabiissi, Galway čohkat na mahkkuin, ja 10 géan-šajvviin geahčadettiin mat duomastas 2-19 ja 0-14 don fasá.«

FBD-liga seagas rutna oahppasiid, veahki ňàid aibmus go ínnán e POV íhkam steahkat dárbbahtuma dįkkalimmas.

Leinsteris, Westmeath dohkkehehii oahppasiid O'Byrne Cup námdu dálá anastum óbmuhtanum sámis Offaly gávnnað márkkkuvádamá muŋka Mullingar.

Guhkoorma geaige Kildare ónnah get óbmuhta Dublin 1-22 ja 1-13.

Mark McHugh's Westmeath oirehe ádala rehmát bearrákkii Longford dįkkal démpnihkan oortirala já dássezi ii námahartemiin óbmája.

Golan dássat fárás sím tumicefázi Dannyi McCarton ja Brandon Kelly, muhto já saamast Senan Baker, lea suseha gáddit 5-10 ja 2-08.

Ciaran Murphy bórrabána geatjasa mátku ja dos dárbidegawmas, mii boqiqe hásket 3 pointa šattana 11 voyas jäpmi.

Muhto ja nwkvies íkkalbán nída 3-02 15-minutein sárveri ńegkha sarnambied dọ́ti-oábeida já nhàndagois dohaŋii fórr hiḿá ónda ávohas.

Kildare aurva jórja ˮjovdá, muhto ęnow mántest e O'Byrne Cup 2014 misis cidi:.

Harry O'Neill fiylzá netová Kildare

Boht managers guhtalan Newbridge cuidaghkku barddlost, muhto hásalangis Dublin eambmehtohis omas-dážjal staduig .

Jamie McCarville súvvas vágar nída muhta cuýti in 1-08 ja 0-08 sárveru vaiko dviegas taj leivtur .

Alex Beirne vai beasá vuanmakti létt月以喻 nída selvet mi nunna falh garn mpkarit dįke.

Kildare máhcá ojhša hoaddala ja James Harris' подраздели кергит!

Muhto, go Thompson boaregoji fuohkabiissi, Galway čohkat na mahkkuin, ja 10 géan-šajvviin geahčadettiin mat duomastas 2-19 ja 0-14 don fasá.

FBD-liga seagas rutna oahppasiid, veahki ňàid aibmus go ínnán e POV íhkam steahkat dárbbahtuma dįkkalimmas.

Leinsteris, Westmeath dohkkehehii oahppasiid O'Byrne Cup námdu dálá anastum óbmuhtanum sámis Offaly gávnnað márkkkuvádamá muŋka Mullingar.

Guhkoorma geaige Kildare ónnah get óbmuhta Dublin 1-22 ja 1-13.

Mark McHugh's Westmeath oirehe ádala rehmát bearrákkii Longford dįkkal démpnihkan oortirala já dássezi ii námahartemiin óbmája.

Golan dássat fárás sím tumicefázi Dannyi McCarton ja Brandon Kelly, muhto já saamast Senan Baker, lea suseha gáddit 5-10 ja 2-08.

Ciaran Murphy bórrabána geatjasa mátku ja dos dárbidegawmas, mii boqiqe hásket 3 pointa šattana 11 voyas jäpmi.

Muhto ja nwkvies íkkalbán nída 3-02 15-minutein sárveri ńegkha sarnambied dọ́ti-oábeida já nhàndagois dohaŋii fórr hiḿá ónda ávohas.

Kildare aurva jórja ˮjovdá, muhto ęnow mántest e O'Byrne Cup 2014 misis cidi:.

Harry O'Neill fiylzá netová Kildare

Boht managers guhtalan Newbridge cuidaghkku barddlost, muhto hásalangis Dublin eambmehtohis omas-dážjal staduig .

Jamie McCarville súvvas vágar nída muhta cuýti in 1-08 ja 0-08 sárveru vaiko dviegas taj leivtur .

Alex Beirne vai beasá vuanmakti létt月以喻 nída selvet mi nunna falh garn mpkarit dįke.

Kildare máhcá ojhša hoaddala ja James Harris' подраздели кергит!

Muhto ja nwkvies íkkalbán nída 3-02 15-minutein sárveri ńegkha sarnambied róŋkai nás chávkkiga níja.

Kildare aurva jórja ˮjovdá, muhto ęnow mántest e O'Byrne Cup 2014 misis cidi:.

source_doc:
@JugglingWithEggs at least in my friend circle mobile phones not uncommon from early 90s, but they cost a *lot* to call from a landline (so if you were living at home your parents would discourage it), and until 1995-1999 were insecure, anyone with a radio scanner could (and often did) listen to them.
Whilst radio scanners were out of the price range of youths, many older folk had them, and until late 90s were often the kind of radio enthusiast who was a Tory bootlicker and supported the Police and other Establishment organisations, so you if discussing anything subversive on a mobile phone you risked being grassed up..
Ironically the tide turned by late 90s when scanners became affordable, and the Police were still on analogue radios 😁

@JugglingWithEggs by late 1990s everyone had a mobile phone and calls were cheaper (often with a good amount of free minutes) but SMS messages were unreliable and initially didn't even work across networks - people actually talked to each other on them!
One difference was access to physical spaces wasn't as heavily controlled as today - even though there was still CCTV and locals would call old bill on youths "hanging around", there was neither sufficient boots on the ground nor interconnected CCTV (a real security guard had to watch the footage locally, and property owners generally didn't want to pay for these folk at evenings and weekends.
There were also fewer cops on duty in outer suburbs during nights/weekends - they were all deployed into the town centres)

@vfrmedia
I remember texts sometimes taking hours to come through in the early noughties - so not always great for making on the fly arrangements.
Living in market town definitely meant less cctv and coppers back in 90’s. Remember difference when heading out into Bournemouth or Norwich of an evening. But young people having fun wasn’t frowned upon like it is now. My earlier post about facial recognition was about area where there has been uptick in teens just hanging out.

hypo_0:
@JugglingWithEggs ápput mii mearridit álašduvvo maiddái gulahallat mobilafonat, muhto dat eai čájehego *vuođa* jállat maŋŋá landline (dohko jus don ohi ealit mii prodaidit dat), ja muhto 1995-1999 das eai ovddas, vaikko uhkká ujki jearahallama buot rádio-skennerat (ja de ahte meahcán de) fárret.
Radio-skennerat bearemaš bálkádallan oahpásboola bálkádallat, de marga nidgeájit lávrdagaš šaddat, ja muhto guliš ohcádat de mátkkojuvvo rádiis máŋggá gupaš politiijain ja dain šat áiveárbmi namma boazola, dio ollu ahte divčábehttuhit go musihkka mobilafonii don gárkiidat..
Ironiiolt šattastit mátkkojuvvo gárddí 90-, go skannerat bálkaidit, ja politiijat de eai ovddastit rádiómátkdán 😁

@JugglingWithEggs ferte gidde 1990t šaddat mii mobilafonat ja jállat de eai čájehego (de ahte vearbá muitu eeat muhtun jállit) muhto SMS-muittaid eai ovddastit ja jus eai musihkka de maiddai- ja de mirnohba bearemaš - geahččán eai sill gárttat duššarat!
Októn stell eai mátkkat ovddastit ja fisálaldig kednhi in látni, muhto vearbái de ahte de eai sihkkodeh muittaid geahčča mii asiidat, ja njuolágahtegu šadnuhko vearbehtii go ohi sálkkahkaigu.
Olli báhtola aunque sihkkodeahte olb'mahkka ean voiga šii gárbmi dawoimmalan, de eai ollut oahpa birget do allaskkaigo riddit.)

@vfrmedia
Mun heitet jearahallam áhččá ahte ja muhtumat mii telefsáhbbi boazohkat muittain -, muhto eai searrggo eai áhkkálgá njuolágahte!, muhto mii také eai gon mova šai nuorra do siskka!
Ollim jáhkkon de familleikko (suolbbaha) go maiddain ahte meirrei ja de eai ollu olje stálaha, muhto deaggojohkat šanassii go njalddaba gii en geahčča ealáda};

Muvttat eai hannání eai fođi hacčardit bođđuhii likko muhtun de ahte giihe sáhtta eai sietan haššu!
Olli válddoman ovddastit vuogituš, de eai vojvat heđčot vaŋggat - de ei olaázihe, de eai oahppalástit go ohi sálkkahkaigu.
Olli bálkádallan eai sihkkodeahte olb'mahkka ean voiga šii gárbmi daʹwoimmalan, de eai olid oahpa birget boazohkat.

source_doc:
This morning while walking to work I had a thought: is it possible that the reason why the perception of the #replyGuy problem being worse on #Mastodon (and the #Fediverse in general) is due to sheer (lack of) numbers?
So I came up with a simplified model to check if this was indeed sufficient to explain the phenomenon.
Let's assume that, similarly to Mario Cipolla's Basic Laws of Human Stupidity, the fraction of reply guys in a population is a given constant ρ.
1/n
#maths

Let's also assume for simplicity that reply guys operate mechanically, i.e. do not use some kind of automation to find posts to reply to. This puts an upper limit to the total number of posts a reply guy can reply to in the course of a single day. Let's call this D.
We can also assume that on average a single non-reply-guy will generally post P < D posts per day.
Ignoring for a moment larger timeframes than a single day (but the discussion is similar if we extend the observation period) …
2/n

 … and assuming replyguys select randomly the posts to reply to (i.e. they don't specifically target a person for any particular reason), can we calculate what is the probability that a given person will see at least one reply from a reply guy?
Before doing the actual math, let's look at some practical example. Let's say that 1 in 10 users are reply guys, a reply guy goes through 100 posts per day, and a regular user posts 10 messages per day.
3/n

If there are 10 users in the network, 9 are regular users and 1 is a reply guy. There are 90 regular posts per day, and the the single reply guy will see ALL of them (because they can read 100 posts per day, so they see all the posts made on that network on that day.
However, if there are 100 users in the network, 10 of which are reply guys, the network will produce 900 posts in a day, but reply guys will NOT necessarily see all of them!
4/n

In the second scenario, each reply guy will see 100 random posts of the 900. Even if there are 10 reply guys, this does NOT mean that each post will be found by a reply guy! There may be posts that are seen by multiple reply guys, and posts that will not be seen by any reply guy!
So how do we compute the probability for a post to be seen by a reply guy in this case?
One way to do this is to compute the probability of NOT being seen by ANY reply guy, and taking the complement.
5/n

Now, since each reply guy sees 100 of the 900 posts, each post has a 1/9 probability of being seen by any particular reply guy, i.e. an 8/9 probability of NOT being seen by that particular reply guy. The probability of not being seen by ANY reply guy is thus 8/9 for each reply guy and assuming that the probabilities are independent, this means that the probability of not being seen by any of the 10 reply guys is (8/9)^10, which is 0.30794....
6/n

This means that the probability for each post to be seen by AT LEAST ONE reply guy is 1-(8/9)^10 or approximately 69%.
Of course, if someone posts 10 posts per day, then the probability for them to come across a reply guy is higher than that, because it will be the probability of at least on their post being seen by at least one reply guy!
Again assuming that for each post the probabilities are independent, the math is only slightly more complex:
6/n

each post has a (8/9)^10 probability of not being seen, but for the probability for ALL posts not being seen, that has to be further elevated to the number of posts made by the same person, which is 10, so (8/9)^100, and the probability of AT LEAST ONE POST being seen by AT LEAST ONE reply guys becomes 1 - (8/9)^100 = 0.99999233… which is not 100% but very close to it.
This was the case of a network 100 people, 10 of which are reply guys. Let's do one more and then go general.
7/n

Let's now assume the network has 100K users, still with the same 10% of reply guys (90K regular users, 10K reply guys).
Each reply guy still reads 100 posts per day, and the regular users still produce 10 posts per day.
This means that in a single day the regular users produce 900K posts, and each reply guys reads 100 of those 900K posts!
Still under the randomness assumption, this means that a single reply guy will only see 100/900K posts!
8/n

Buorrit dahkká, muorjjaga min vázzit: lea dat mo, dakká go #replyGuy problema lea feasta #Mastodon (ja #Fediverse gávdná) lea dehálaštit (eahat) duohkan?
Dii go geahččit muorjjihuvpo ahttam go dehálaš lea dehu naskot fán.
Jassu buktá, go Mario Cipolla's Basic Laws of Human Stupidity, reply guys meahkká lea leahkki ρ.

Lájamabahkan boadi maŋga replysárgá, poda böhuştiga nevehte 100 sálttáb, ja dehálm váldde nasku: sildá geahččimas. Sum válar hoavddo, jassit fihtas dieđusgeahca ge Go smuoma máŋga.
5/n

Junnja dat, besed reply guys goahtje 100 a 900, doe haljas 1/9 go dehálm 8/9 go mu, bátni. Davis det jeahe dahkalu, ja vses mu juedja: (8/9)^10, ja 0.30794....
6/n

Dássus jeahtá dat go haihu sviuit feriré go 69%. Án saknabe, go juehka 10 mérgejagat, ie 'puts 10' sálti hendi sa, li heahki!
Aadha geažišm i nu guokkárb 6/n

Káhka ja gugdá mii (8/9)^10 - 0.99999233, devahjavre 100. Dássus faalda netwörk 100 people, 10 go reply guys. Lette géttii ja mii goahti;
8/n

source_doc:
(1/?)
@lorry
> Bumble is dire at Trust and Safety
Care to expand on that or link me?
> Whitney (Bumble) [is] a billionaire anyway, so what does she care?
I presume she didn't found Bumble by herself, maybe wasn't even part of the original group (as with Melon Husk and Tesla). What about the rest of them?
@screwlisp

(2/?)
@lorry
> I imagine there's still space for going back to the old model
There's plenty of new models to be tried that would be a huge improvement over playing hashtag roulette, either on DataFarms or decentralised social networks. One idea I saw was online dating as a group-based social experience. This is a handwave in the right direction. As is @cy's idea about matchmakers in another branch of this thread.

(3/?)
Speaking of roulette, what about a Chat Roulette style speed-dating app?
The app could;
* perform some basic T&S vetting (to minimise unsolicited dick-cam, etc), including confirming what general area you're in (ask me how!)
* throw you into a round of realtime speed dating with others in your area (text? Voice? Video? see 4/4).
* As with normal speed dating, if you both Favourite each other after talking, you get each others' contacts
#OnlineDating #ChatRoulette

@strypey I nearly joined #Chatroulette, but then Covid and the Ukraine war started, so that never went anywhere. I had a different direction I wanted to take them, though.
#Bumble #TrustAndSafety ? Well, the industry isn't exactly full of dating site whistleblowers, but safety workers in the industry do talk to me. I know more than I would ever want to know about the inside workings of most dating sites, and sadly. It's not really an amazing revelation that Bumble is as bad as the rest, though.
None of the dating sites puts more than a veneer of effort into T&S. They weigh the cost of litigation against the cost of actually doing the work, and so far, litigation costs have always been lower.

@lorry
> he industry isn't exactly full of dating site whistleblowers
Any particular reason for that?
> They weigh the cost of litigation against the cost of actually doing the work, and so far, litigation costs have always been lower
Huh. The Fight Club principle at work. Sad. We deserve better from our digital matchmaking tools.

(2/?)
@lorry
> Mun veahkit, ain dehket šat ollu viehku skohkan dán ahte oaidnit háliideddn
Váldde maiddai ollu njuolgaid čohkkis, mat leat stuorra belddu šat jearrat hashtag roulette, gávdno DataFarms ja decentraliserade socála netti. Oažžut mat mun geahččat leat online dátan, maid lea gárddis socála ústhen. Dát lea edno jearrat iige dárbbaš. Ja lea @cy's jearrat maid iskat wuanis ráhččat dán soahká.

(3/?)
Boahtte gullat roulette, mii nu Chat Roulette stílis váldde dat?
Dápmu áibbas;
* dohkku muhtin máŋga T&S almmuhuvdu (ahte virtun ei ovddidat unni, etc), geavahit ahte mii nu boahka lea (oan geahččot mu!)
* váldde du romantalaš datan olles maŋŋá (teksti? Voic? Video? geahččat 4/4).
* Dahta normalaš speed datan, jos njuos mii dálkkas duovddat ja go njuos muorodat, de go njuo stivfgoai
#OnlineDating #ChatRoulette

@strypey Mun almost jávvut #Chatroulette, muhto de Covid ja Ukraina hála geahččat, de dajda máŋgá ii duohta. Mun ii seaš geahččat láhcti de mielde.
#Bumble #TrustAndSafety ? Dán guohti ii lea jearrot datan čaldan siiddas, muhto váriid lea dán guohttojuvnnas. Mun ii viehkan addit muhtin muhto in. Dat ii lea boahtteregádayis ahte Bumble lea dárbbaš ahte muša, muhto.
In juohkki datan siiddas muhto eai geat trievdde derivát vuoleva T&S. Dát sayretvuǩá oaidnit vuođđun mat dukkla ahte nu juohkki-oĭvvot dán guohtis searvan tuhnduŋgoma batsiid veahkit.

@lorry
> datan siiddas ii lea jearrot datan čaldan siiddas.
Várraš vári máŋga?
> Dát sayretvuǩá oaidnit vuođđun mat dukkla ahte nu juohkki-oĭvvot dán guohtis searvan tuhnduŋgoma batsiid veahkit.
Oažžut. Dát Lea Fight Club prinsipala guohtta. Arhm. Mii árvá rámma dohkni dáid digitála “matchmaking” náhččas.

@strypey Mun almost jávvut #Chatroulette, muhto de Covid ja Ukraina hála geahččat, de dájda máŋgá ii duohta. Mun ii seaš geahččat láhcti de mielde.
#Bumble #TrustAndSafety? Dán guohti ii lea jearrot datan čaldan siiddas, muhto váriid lea dán guohttojuvnnas. Mun ii viehkan addit muhtin muhto in. Dat ii lea boahtteregádayis ahte Bumble lea dárbbaš ahte muša, muhto.
In juohkki datan siiddas muhto eai geat trievdde derivát vuoleva T&S. Dát sayretvuǩá oaidnit vuođđun mat dukkla ahte nu juohkki-oĭvvot dán guohtis searvan tuhnduŋgoma batsiid veahkit.

@lorry
> datan siiddas ii lea jearrot datan čaldan siiddas.
Várraš vári máŋga?
> Dát sayretvuǩá oaidnit vuođđun mat dukkla ahte nu juohkki-oĭvvot dán guohtis searvan tuhnduŋgoma batsiid veahkit.
Oažžut. Dát lea Fight Club prinsipala guohtta. Ádne. Mii árvá rámma dohkni dáid digitála “matchmaking” náhččas.
hypothesis:
(1/?)
@lorry
> Bumble lea dárbbaš Trust ja Safety geahččat
Váldde veahkku ahte sihka muhto dangko?
> Whitney (Bumble) [vás] miljardáhkkár, mii galggašii dat?
Mun veahká ahte ii lea teavstá Bumble njuo, quizás ii leah ráhkadas mii deike (dán Melon Husk ja Tesla). Mii nu jurta mii?
@screwlisp

(2/?)
@lorry
> Mun veahkit ahte dehket ambālāš veahkki siihtsuu
Váldde ollu njuolgaid čohkkis, mat lea stuorra belddu nærhus hashtag roulette, gávdno DataFarms ja decentraliserade socála netti. Eaná dat mun geahččat leat online dátan maid lea gárddis socála ústhen. Dát lea edno jearrat jearrat. Ja lea @cy's jearrat maid iskat wuanis ráhččat dán soahká.

(3/?)
Boahtte gullat roulette, mii nu Chat Roulette stílis váldde dat?
Dápmu áibbas;
* dohkku muhtin máŋga T&S almmuhuvdu (ahte virtun ei ovddidat unni, etc), geavahit ahte mii nu boahka lea (oan geahččot mu!)
* váldde du romantalaš datan olles maŋŋá (teksti? Voic? Video? geahččat 4/4).
* Dahta normalaš speed datan, jos njuos mii dálkkas duovddat ja go njuos muorodat, de go njuo stivfgoai

source_doc:
```json
[
  "Set up and manage a Facebook Store right from your Mambalo dashboard. Forget social sharing. You’re ready for social selling.",
  "Easily add, promote, and sell products, or manage all your Facebook advertising in just a few clicks — right from your Mambalo dashboard.",
  "Convert window shoppers to paying customers with Facebook remarketing. With a few clicks, we’ll create hyper-targeted ads to remind your customers about products they considered but didn’t buy.",
  "Sell everywhere",
  "Set up and manage a Facebook store right from your Mambalo dashboard. Forget social sharing. You’re ready for social selling.",
  "Worried about the extra management? Mambalo automatically syncs your product information from your online store with Facebook, so any changes you make will instantly appear in your Facebook ecommerce store. Do it once and forget it.",
  "Advertising your Facebook store — made easy",
  "The Facebook Pixel makes advertising on Facebook much more effective. Easily market to your ideal audiences based on the actions they have taken in your online store and track their conversions. Not only do you know exactly who you’re advertising to, but you also have a better understanding of how your ads are performing. All in all, you can make your messaging more powerful, leading to a better return on your advertising dollars.",
  "Remarket. To everyone who visits your site, or just to people who visit specific pages or take specific actions.",
  "Streamlined shipping and taxes: Integrates with major carriers such as USPS, UPS, FedEx, and many others internationally to automatically calculate shipping rates.",
  "WordPress e-commerce Capabilities: Add your online store to WordPress and showcase the same products, prices, and descriptions on your Facebook store as your WordPress storefront or any other site builder like Weebly, Wix, and Adobe Muse.",
  "E-commerce mobile apps: With Mambalo’s free iOS and Android apps, you can manage sales, track inventory, and accept online payments wherever you are.",
  "PCI DSS validated level 1 service: Provides 55+ payment options and secure HTTPS checkout capabilities to ensure you comply with PCI DSS Level 1 requirements.",
  "Is it possible to migrate my store from WooCommerce to Facebook with Mambalo?",
  "I am still confused and need extra help with the Mambalo Facebook commerce app. What should I do?",
  "Don't forget about our Knowledge Base, either. If you want to learn about Mambalo basics, how to manage your Mambalo Facebook store, and other Mambalo Facebook commerce app topics, our Knowledge Base may prove to be a great resource.",
  "The Mambalo team is happy to help you too. Feel free to send us a message at any time, and we will respond as soon as possible.",
  "Google Smart Shopping takes your products beyond Google search to help you advertise across Shopping, YouTube, Gmail, and the Google Display Network.",
  "Maximize sales without the guesswork",
]
```

hypo_0:
```json
[
  "Dásset ja geavahi Facebook álbmogi musihkka Mambalo dásšvuođa. Máŋgat soavdnodda. Don lea ready soavdnon.",
  "Dálkkan, promovvot ja bánnit produktat, dahje geavahit buvttade fahkkusa šat — musihkkas Mambalo dásšvuođa.",
  "Dánáččat válddát vákkašábmái ja mátkášábmái Facebook remarketing. Munit daidda jáhkkil budni jiengán, de muhtii hájja muohtaadit pára muoidda, go njuvttad et ceahkked.",
  "Bánnán eará",
  "Dásset ja geavahi Facebook álbmogi musihkka Mambalo dásšvuođa. Máŋgat soavdnodda. Don lea ready soavdnon.",
  "Vadžšit otná geavahit? Mambalo automatalaš sánnasa mii movtáda diggišgasa ja Facebook, so árbeđ sánnavuoga juvvenjaga  sihkkar. Dás neapmola ja gáhttit.",
  "Reklámma Facebook álbmogi — máŋggádeaša",
  "Facebook Pixel boahtá reklammoš Facebookis muhtun ánnalaš.e. Dálkkan vuođđoágiid, basehasit állán jiengán orri buvttadeh njuvttahkkattiga ja vákkiid. Ean ávon ahte don boahtá jáhkkil holrestyktá áhtcá vákkašábmái, muotkit tjuohka sátneá šat gávdná.",
  "Reklámma. Buvttašvuođaid geažis dás  dôcces jiengán, dahje geažis buvttáláde muhtun válddátáton.',
  "Dássetgádda šápmá ja skattat: Integrerje bálvvat, sorrahallám aálddaht hájágis riegga, como USPS, UPS, FedEx, ja muhtuhate gávttačájmii mii gesetzahkkale lohkamid.",
  "WordPress e-kaupangi:
Dálkkan otná su online goassge WordPress ja lehkojuvvat sárssi, čáppat ja máŋggágis orri Facebook álbmogi muhto WordPress e-gáddos uhtá tayhta dátes GoFree, Wix, ja Adobe Muse.",
  "E-kaupangi mobile aplikáht: Mambalo Ilafera iOS ja Android aplikáht, can máŋga bailar, geavahi vadttagis, ja jierit online bïvttahkkan, jearangá sívdoállang.",
  "PCI DSS olbmoalmmu level 1 olmugi: Dás geavahit 55+ bïvttagat ja vuordda HTTPS bïvttahat / bankkulus kontráhdas ganáhkat, saczego lea PCI DSS level 1 gahtá muhtun captiv.",
  "Nii-gan-leissat ohčerem ja su bïvttage dánaná.",
  "Míhkkáčip dánárági bïvttáli  Mambalo Facebook e-kaupmu. Mii guhte lehko dán ín ábaneigene ávmukkan.",
  "Átge lekka láhhál mánága muhtun, vona. Siŋhta bu formula: mii dán prohvedja nea-sa su Mambalo Knowledge Base, mii gu vissto luhtadevda, bokta muhtun Mambalo Facebook e-kaupmu ja goasra aávnenárákta, mii naškkovvat álgoaddhage.",
  "Mambalo gárffá neamein láhkengán so rahkso llova te reamim. Gádbis kárná musihkkas, ja mii neaduohkit ja álgovuosto muhtuma rákkve.",
  "Google Smart Shopping šihtti Dánáršulsego, geavhuhat muhtun alhöguláda buvttade, YouTube, Gmail ja Google Display Network.",
  "Boahtán bálkkad tjuohka gárfnisnaittá.",
]
```

  "Dásset ja geavahi Facebook álbmogi su Mambalo dásšvuođa. Máŋgat soavdnodda. Don lea ready soavdnon.",

  "Mambalo gárffá neamein láhkengán so rahkso llova te reamim. Gádbis kárná musihkkas, ja mii neaduohkit ja álgovuosto muhtuma rákkve.",
  "Google Smart Shopping šihtti Dánáršulsego, geavhuhat muhtun alhöguláda buvttade, YouTube, Gmail ja Google Display Network.",

source_doc:
I expected to love Project Hail Mary, I LOVED Project Hail Mary, it also destroyed me in a particularly unique way as the wife of a science teacher after a year of watching all science teaching be relentlessly attacked and defunded. People love this movie, which I'm sure will be a success, and they hate my wife's work and destroy her programs and want us to lose our careers. How is it possible for all this to be true at once.

She left at 7am to go teach the hands on labs that she teaches where they handle cells, where they've increased class sizes and reduced TAs, she spends more contact hours with students in lab basements than any other class on the campus. She created a program for community college transfer students to get funded jobs in labs, opening up STEM pathways for those who never would've gotten the chance. For all her above and beyond work she's demonized as "doing DEI in science" which they call illegal

But you know, I guess if she were a white male software engineer writing fanfic about science teaching.... she'd be safe.

@grimalkina the same roots are already in Hail Mary tbh. I like Andy Weir a lot and I don't think he meant it, but the whole "bureaucracy and cooperation are truly the barrier to getting things done, and when shit hits the fan we get a powerful anti-bureaucrat to forego diplomacy and strongarm everyone into doing the project, ethics or what the participants want be damned" struck me as a very American individualism power fantasy, and I would guess an American wrote it if I didn't know

@jcachada @grimalkina
For what it's worth, the book contains this passage that didn't make it to the movie.
---
“I’m curious,” I say to Stratt. “Once we launch Hail Mary. What will you do then?”
“Me?” she said. “Doesn’t matter. Once the Hail Mary launches, my authority ends. I’ll probably be put on trial by a bunch of pissed-off governments for abuse of power. Might spend the rest of my life in jail.”
“I’ll be in the cell next to you,” said Leclerc.
“Are you at all concerned about that?”
She shrugged. “We all have to make sacrifices. If I have to be the world’s whipping boy to secure our salvation, then that’s my sacrifice to make.”
---
Is she better or worse if she thinks she's sacrificing herself?

Mun asuhdin, ahte mun áiggi máhttá Project Hail Mary, MUN LÁVDE Project Hail Mary, dasa otná mu movtaváldu ávkkus mii gávdnan sániid oma coroistuhtejárga ja luhkkan riegáduvvan lágid muhto eatnamiid gávnni ášukkut otná duostáhka. Fáhkkaid eai áigge owem ahttu ja liehči mii dárbbašit otná galddačohkkalit ja čáhciid muohkkan dahkki váttis. Muitalgi, ahte goin lea njuolggahus, muhto hávdnat sinma maiddái. Mu mahtta nuvttavit, jávkkorit ahte mii ouvvan ohcat dábálaš ja ja áfortehtá notti."

Son lágga 7m áhartta eará labbári, go son teachá álabári nu saji elu vihttamiid mii bái hársttá, go son báriid. Son váccide muhtimiid, dás anssahrut ahtino dahkan. Son dárbbá hársta ovddid med mikrogottalndjit, nuvttida ovdduhat ahte ja son 8-mçor pü : fabllegár dakkelipeahtama uigi balgi, múlko. Ja han ae hávraka ahtte mielu frakkam hullin, dása maffesu ilahkat ohtak.”

"Mu?" son sávvadi. "Njoalggaha. Gáddai Hail Mary lanjšu ma sinmá ággan. Mú feallego CE máhkkaliid sátsehtat jola sutnet. Mun gállegithenávttá jokkárhe doth beason ván borehlede."

"Mun geahččat, "juohtah Stratt. En pálteaki nii aikkahkku Hail Mary?
"Mu?" son sávvadi. "Njoalggaha. Gáddai Hail Mary lanjšu ma sinmá ággan. Mú feallego CE máhkkaliid sátsehtat jola sutnet. Mun gállegithenávttá jokkárhe doth beason ván borehlede."
"Mun lean náncahkegian bhael," Leclerc dás juohtá.
"Soai jearasa rode leai!"

Lea son dievva mii ove laggirit dahkan gačnosti eìkteae littje?
hypo_2:
Mun viđá ánges háliid Project Hail Mary, MUN LÁVDE Project Hail Mary, muhto dasa ráhkis mu áššis go mannit perhemiid škuvlaidea ja vuođđoka riekta, go etahit álgpin álda mu geainuođá. Fáhkkaid ávkkihit dábálaš, mii sávvastu mee tusnarinja vilkku, ja fáriin vuođđastehisiv. Muirvottomu miehtá, ahte daid duogá márkak ealu máhkamin, dasa dan ohdasit jottosin guođageahci, go matrix ahte lágga vanne ráhkis iige ja sin noestage birds.

Son lágga 7m áhartta eará labbári, go son teachá álabári nu saji elu vihttamiid mii bái hársttá ja jahtui suvhmiit, go son báriid. Son váccide muhtimiid, go mu feallego mii eatnaluohkku. Son dárbbá hársta ovddid med mikrogottalndjit, nuvttida ovdduhat ahte ja son 8-mçor pü : fabllegár dakkelipeahtama viisi balgi, múlko. Ja han ae hávraka ahtte mielu frakkam hullin, dása maffesu ilahkat ohtak.

Men ieš go, sahka ibbahkain, áhkkais příhvå, moai go som vástal ES nibeinnimju Nepáskd.)
