source_doc:
Arthur Okonkwo's penalty shootout heroics causes FA Cup shock as Wrexham beat Nottingham Forest

Wrexham won an FA Cup third-round thriller in front of Hollywood owner Ryan Reynolds as Nottingham Forest were dumped out of the competition on penalties after a 3-3 draw.

Arthur Okonkwo was the Wrexham hero with stops from Igor Jesus and Omari Hutchinson giving them a 4-3 victory on spot-kicks after Josh Windass, Callum Doyle, George Thomason and Jay Rodriguez had converted from the spot.

First-half goals from Liberato Cacace and Oliver Rathbone gave Wrexham early control and had Reynolds trading high fives and hugs from his vantage point in the main stand.

Jesus cut the deficit before Dominic Hyam's diving header restored Wrexham's two-goal advantage with 16 minutes remaining.

Forest looked dead and buried but substitute Callum Hudson-Odoi produced two outstanding finishes, the equaliser coming in the 89th minute.

Wrexham have won three successive promotions to go from non-league to the Championship, but this was the first time since being taken over by Reynolds and fellow actor Rob Mac nearly five years ago they had met Premier League opposition.

Forest made eight changes after beating West Ham on Tuesday, with goalkeeper Matz Sels, Jesus and Hutchinson remaining and Wales international Neco Williams on a stacked bench at his local club.

Callum Hudson-Odoi came off the bench and scored twice to force the match to penalties (REUTERS)

Kieffer Moore was not risked after injury as Wrexham sought to extend a four-game winning streak that had taken them a point from the Championship play-off places.

Forest started on the front front with Jesus shooting over and Douglas Luiz found the net after 17 minutes.

Referee Paul Tierney initially awarded the goal, but then ruled it out after deciding Luiz had controlled the ball with his arm before volleying home.

Wrexham had been tidy in possession without a cutting edge but that was to change in the final 10 minutes of the first half.

Ollie Rathbone doubled Wrexham's lead after Liberato Cacace's opener (REUTERS)

Sam Smith dragged wide before Cacace took advantage after 37 minutes to drive home his maiden Wrexham goal from 20 yards aided by the faintest of deflections off Morato's heel.

Wrexham smiles were even wider three minutes later as Rathbone broke through Morato's challenge to fire in his third goal in four games.

It should have been three - and possibly contest over - when Smith scampered through the Forest half unchecked but failed to beat Sels" outstretched leg.

Forest boss Sean Dyche made a triple substitution at half-time with Williams, Morgan Gibbs-White and Nicolas Dominguez sent on to salvage the situation.

Okonkwo saved the decisive penalty to deny Omari Hutchinson in the shootout (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

The visitors were instantly more fluid as Okonkwo tipped over Luiz's free-kick and kept out Nicolo Savona's strike.

Sels saved well from Broadhead but Forest were in the ascendancy and struck when Savona set up the leaping Jesus for a header that hit the post and just about crossed the line.

The drama rose as Hyam headed in a superb George Dobson free-kick and Hudson-Odoi swept home 60 seconds later to set up a grandstand finish.

Hudson-Odoi took the tie into extra time in fantastic fashion, taking a touch on his chest and lofting a perfect volley over Okonkwo, but Wrexham were not to be denied their first top-flight FA Cup scalp for 26 years.

Sean Dyche made eight changes to the Forest side and called on his first choice players but couldn't get over the line (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

Elsewhere in the FA Cup, Oxford United advanced to the fourth round with a 4-3 penalty shootout win over MK Dons and Port Vale defeated Fleetwood 1-0.

Wigan Athletic also progressed after a superb display at Deepdale saw the League One side beat Championship play-off chasers Preston North End 1-0 as well.

hypo_0:
Arthur Okonkwo's rangašdagaš dutkat FA Cup'n šokku ja Wrexham'it Nottingham Forest'miid

Wrexham vohti FA Cup'ii beaivvái geažolii Hollywood'in omá Nikola Ryan Reynolds'ii gávnnima, ja Nottingham Forest'ii leat ovttas beaivválaš dušše 3-3 muŧŧa.

Arthur Okonkwo lea Wrexham'ii rangaš juohktos dehkkáldašbuvttáldega naššamibájjálaš Igor Jesus ja Omari Hutchinson, geažolaibma namma 4-3 raššaid dušše girjjai Josh Windass, Callum Doyle, George Thomason ja Jay Rodriguez'ii.

Fiinn-varošibma Liberato Cacace ja Oliver Rathbone vohčá Wrexham'ii álggas geavkváldu, ja Reynolds'ii bolmmái fastui ja muhtusti mainna dehkka earámii guovddáš buvttá.

Jesus dárbba naššamibájjálaš muhtá, go Dominic Hyam'ii čuoruga lutterkaštis vohčá Wrexham'ii guokte-várru nuorte e.pdfiddai 16 minuutta.

Forest lea olkká ii sada ja tavkkal čuarálas Callum Hudson-Odoi saŋŋi dušše geometris draažšan geartagis, ja geažolaibma sárdu maide 89. munu.

Wrexham'ii leat vohtán kolme mánmat gávdnos birra nan dásse ja mánná buvttá, muhto doai seam kilddaiga geomma njuolgitii Reynolds gávdnimaga ja Rob Mac buot geahčalin veahki muhto dihte bihtor mánmii ankkun.

Forest doai vihtta álgodaga mánnaga liibi West Ham mánnaga, muhto gávva sinna Matz Sels, Jesus ja Hutchinson 'ii nuoraš, ja Wales'ii bázzán Neco Williams gávddin níkkongugal islandan.

Callum Hudson-Odoi gávduo muhtaha ja vulges guokta dušše guhká (REUTERS)

Kieffer Moore'ii lea ii riegá, go man Wrexham álge sálku eahpahkkas geađeamáš buvttá eádi 4 beaivváča.

Forest álgá guovlás luovkku giđddes Jesus forši gília ja Douglas Luiz já tim 17 minuutti.

Dálgo Paul Tierney'ii vaddeb guovlanu, muhto mantá 'u čuoruhit ballaga girjju biggeli 'o aatŋii dallas muhtasa.

Wrexham lea ovttas olggReceiver calka programmi buczan guhká muchtasm lungs, muhto dán ođđa muot'tamibájnás muhto vástii čuvarit a 10 minuuttempo ivnext.

Ollie Rathbone làze Wrexham'ii raššá mbuorla 'e Liberato Cacace ohtetmii (REUTERS)

Sam Smith guitin purrantivdu deŋe muhto Cacace mun girjjá jah hana 37 minuutta vekjákhvam uiko mená endai azidek 20 muo˂arif gárda murn'doo murtá.

Wrexham'it dolkku áibit muohtasa guokkura ja áibovatelasu 3 minutta go Rathbone vai Matto's muhto naisku buinná riegá aikkas armi giella muokkava muhin.

Ádá gávddep 3 - ja muhto mánnuga guhká muhto Smith’n heggi familiar dhottaga Forest'ii máŋga liigehtá gálkadev, muhto failde ráššá Sels'ii nánuowski.

Forest'mi ќеdye Sean Dyche lea sata chekë sosial dáyocie mu tneaha, muhto Williams, Morgan Gibbs-White ja Nicolas Dominguez girjjá fasvat geavahippá.

Okonkwo vuhkká seahnivva çaŋŋa riekpeáhkkona dučá Omari Hutchinson'n suddenliva muot sahti (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

Vászššegge gaclota èḿa luovvasa muhto Okonkwo vašashár Vargelui's teritorii ja Savona's rajat muorji.

Sels lea bu čiegan hojbärga muhto Forest xai venkstatew white a uelli muhtasa, go Savona luhkal praivaga Jesus twigha ilgi biyu jepse amphari vaentos-čutsav.

Papege moháni go Hyam jarlaattét pihga Georg Dobson'ii seddás gahtano'doroma kottaga ja Hudson-Odoi veđḗkkin madidí gelevemii geálivé 60 seunthes naassas.

Hudson-Odoi beavvá skema ohtá lukamohirga njun vuhlkká hen dan áibbis ja gavitnans siiba beavva dahalge 26 maide Wrexham'dalkan bore pèan sin.

Sean Dyche lea vihta osmot maš sinedát Forest'mi ja gaggenbennas máŋga kálfi ina muhto mukkon’li (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

Deohta di hárjju FA Cup'ii, Oxford United gávddee su mun deaivuu eáŋgu 4-3 sittávalis MK Dons ja Port Vale vohčái Fleetwood 1-0.

Wigan Athletic nevdnest hárjju dom Nabot as uhta diocie лес arimael on jakta Championship.
hypo_1:
Arthur Okonkwo's rangašdagaš dutkat FA Cup'de šokku, go Wrexham vohčai Nottingham Forest'ii

Wrexham vohčái FA Cup'ii beaivválaččá seajčšäse Hollywood'ii omá Nikola Ryan Reynolds'ii gávnnima, ja Nottingham Forest'ii lea layoffs muhtinbárra mánnaga 3-3 geavvui.

Arthur Okonkwo lea Wrexham'ii rangaš, go Igor Jesus ja Omari Hutchinson njuoldejuvvá rangašbuvttá arkkàkt 4-3 rikosseahka geanjargá Josh Windass, Callum Doyle, George Thomason ja Jay Rodriguez'ii.

Fínn-čoabbbilnávcu Liberato Cacace ja Oliver Rathbone vohčái Wrexham'ii álggas gurgátis ja Reynolds'ii boazás fastui ja muhtusti dehkka guhkopaktome guovttodá.

Jesus dagdalla boazámu, go Dominic Hyam'ii luttnis vohčá Wrexham'ii guokte-nime piargs moai 16 minutti.

Forest lea dadnasa muorjjii, muhto veaghdolle Callum Hudson-Odoi gávdžááddej dušše dolgai guoktat, sárdun vujjenná 89. minuttas.

Wrexham lea vohčiná kolme açtos jekčalima guokte seadas ledu já sárringu lehat keivtele Reynolds'ii ja gaanlago Rob Mac'mi ca\l dásse vávđeno Munjaga.

Forest doarggi gávnnor kälu vihta ođðo'tta West Ham mánnaga, muhto gávva vlakotól Matz Sels, Jesus ja Hutchinson 'i sáhtit muore buohke, ja Wales'ii vahđat Neco Williams maŋggas foron。

Callum Hudson-Odoi gávnigu edasa ja vuoivduatduudji gielge juoroma guokkavije (REUTERS)

Kieffer Moore'ii eatnna, muhto Wrexham álgá sálku gáđada beaŋkki ja gókkingska ugdheráitsu jitta mula njuolgit booalgo.

Forest álgá guovlás su hojjop beálvva Jesús'n girjjá rušttiga ja Douglas Luiz gávnigu hádá yawdangina 17 minuttas.

Dálgo Paul Tierney'ii báhčâ gávnnano, muhto álkoká žeittas go Luiz hálgis ballagas sárvvadá bálvasu a sodame.

Wrexham lea leafladıja ovttas vuoiddá másio juvllál ii inhealthta föršus doalttola 10 minuttas gielli nelkkam.

Ollie Rathbone vohčái Wrexham'ii herpá Liberato Cacace ceahkaidah (REUTERS)

Sam Smith gávnigala cipelf timme Cacace veaggama ja uigiago 37 minuttas torvbbá, ja hása deals 20 gávvvagas geaniskkigo ja Morato's pohta íddagnit.

Wrexham'ii sváiva disi guhdá 3 minuttas lifi go Rathbone viehkdä Morato's muoigu ja shegadaltehtá ábkast 3. golan siga vier a lähgakammis.

Jiemma jukhá de hunndi, ja večggádan mánnaga, go Smith jigi gãlauvanyei Forest'ii bànniba ja luohka Jakhkat Sels'ii eŋgáid ei dariđas.

Forest boss Sean Dyche dán gurisja gŕaana triidi áhlen kálfitti_bufonni Williams, Morgan Gibbs-White ja Nicolas Dominguez vohči diehggioida ṣi'rib.

Okonkwo sarvassane dei voimin muhturi Omari Hutchinson's buodagao ean'tere p yttav (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

Pehkkiera gálkalemod esá gávnino go Okonkwo viro rakttadá Luiz hargai rekgrevo granite, ja gávnino Nicolo Savona njuorrás svea nunvastya muhla.

Sels vohčá guhkichand Broadhead'a muhto Forest lea ruččan veagis go Savona sjástan ruhtmuddu Jesus muhtá isulu ovttija guorbášmii, ja álkkas go tḣan дәречердя биллимуддата dovo.t.

Vīnnā mu professionals Hyam mun kaddas lungku áçöŋke dán George Dobson's survu ja Hudson-Odoi háli viillá 60 seunthes nanu.

Hudson-Odoi vui deńu gualdudan báveldigá áibbam streamloga, gávdadá brachkam boatto gin گئیالser buhka giіðrim on raza ok.

Sean Dyche lein vihta hárha Forest'mi ja gávddoa iddaidot igulstei nie válddžat (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

Dei FA Cup'ii, Oxford United vohtá su raššalet jekčalima 4-3 sitgabede MK Dons og Port Vale hárjijje jeka Fleetwood 1-0.

Wigan Athletic geahci eddo seáddát as drokko geaibi hojjop ákkas muhtam ábravi dánča League One gađi gávdninu Championship play-off gi su feor 1-0 ja.
hypo_2:
Arthur Okonkwo's rangašdagaš dutkat FA Cup'de šokku, go Wrexham vohčai Nottingham Forest'ii

Wrexham vohčái FA Cup'ii beaivválaččá seajčšäse Hollywood'ii omá Nikola Ryan Reynolds'ii gávnnima, ja Nottingham Forest'ii lea layoffs muhtinbárra mánnaga 3-3 geavvui.

Arthur Okonkwo lea Wrexham'ii rangaš, go Igor Jesus ja Omari Hutchinson njuoldejuvvá rangašbuvttá arkkàkt 4-3 rikosseahka geanjargá Josh Windass, Callum Doyle, George Thomason ja Jay Rodriguez'ii.

Fínn-čoabbbilnávcu Liberato Cacace ja Oliver Rathbone vohčái Wrexham'ii álggas gurgátis ja had Reynolds'ii boazás fastui ja muhtusti dehkka guhkopaktome guovttodá.

Jesus dagdalla boazámu, go Dominic Hyam'ii luttnis vohčá Wrexham'ii guokte-nime piargs moai 16 minutti.

Forest lea dadnasa muorjjii, muhto veaghdolle Callum Hudson-Odoi gávdžááddej dušše dolgai guoktat, sárdun vujjenná 89. minuttas.

Wrexham lea vohčiná kolme açtos jekčalima guokte seadas ledu já sárringu lehat keivtele Reynolds'ii ja gaanlago Rob Mac'mi ca\l dásse vávđeno munjaga.

Forest doarggi gávnnor kälu vihta ođðo'tta West Ham mánnaga, muhto gávva vlakotól Matz Sels, Jesus ja Hutchinson 'i sáhtit muore buohke, ja Wales'ii vahđat Neco Williams maŋggas foron.

Callum Hudson-Odoi gávnigu edasa ja vuoivduatduudji gielge juoroma guokkavije (REUTERS)

Kieffer Moore'ii eatnna, muhto Wrexham álgá sálku gáđada beaŋkki ja gókkingska ugdheráitsu jitta mula njuolgit booalgo.

Forest álgá guovlás su hojjop beálvva Jesús'n girjjá rušttiga ja Douglas Luiz gávnigu hádá yawdangina 17 minuttas.

Dálgo Paul Tierney'ii báhčâ gávnnano, muhto álkoká žeittas go Luiz hálgis ballagas sárvvadá bálvasu a sodame.

Wrexham lea leafládija ovttas vuoiddá másio juvllál ii inhealthta föršus doalttola 10 minuttas gielli nelkkam.

Ollie Rathbone vohčái Wrexham'ii herpá Liberato Cacace ceahkaidah (REUTERS)

Sam Smith gávnigala cipelf timme Cacace veaggama ja uigiago 37 minuttas torvbbá, ja hása deals 20 gávvvagas geaniskkigo ja Morato's pohta íddagnit.

Wrexham'ii sváiva disi guhdá 3 minuttas lifi go Rathbone viehkdä Morato's muoigu ja shegadaltehtá ábkast 3. golan siga vier a lähgakammis.

Jiemma jukhá de hunndi, ja večggádan mánnaga, go Smith jigi gãlauvanyei Forest'ii bànniba ja luohka Jakhkat Sels'ii eŋgáid ei dariđas.

Forest boss Sean Dyche dán gurisja gŕaana triidi áhlen kálfitti_bufonni Williams, Morgan Gibbs-White ja Nicolas Dominguez vohči diehggioida ṣi'rib.

Forest lea dadnasa muorjjii, muhto veaghdolle Callum Hudson-Odoi gávdžááddej dušše dolgan, go nettá sárdun sangit 89. minuttas.

Wrexham lea vohčiná kolme açtos jekčalima guokte seadas ledu já sárringu lehat keivtele Reynolds'ii ja gaanlago Rob Mac'mi ca\l dásse vávđeno muhtam moai.

Forest doarggi gávnnor kälu vihta oððo'tta West Ham mánnaga, muhto gávva vlakotól Matz Sels, Jesus ja Hutchinson 'i sáhtit muore buohke, ja Wales'ii vahđat Neco Williams maŋggas foron.

Callum Hudson-Odoi gávnigu edasa ja vuoivduatduudji gielge juoroma guokkavije (REUTERS)

Kieffer Moore'ii eatnna, muhto Wrexham álgá sálku gáđada beaŋkki ja gókkingska muhléya időqa vealtim na.

Forest álgá guovlás su hojjop beálvva Jesús'n girjjá rušttiga ja Douglas Luiz gávnigu hádá yawdangina 17 minuttas.

Dálgo Paul Tierney'ii bähtda gávnnano, muhto álkoká jeittas go Luiz hálgis ballagas sárvvadá bálvasu a sodame.

Wrexham lea leafládija ovttas vuoiddá másio juvllál ii inhealthta föršus doalttola 10 minuttas.

Ollie Rathbone vohčái Wrexham'ii herpá Liberato Cacace ceahkaidah (REUTERS)

Sam Smith gávnigala cipelf timme Cacace veaggama ja uigiago 37 minuttas torvbbá, ja hása deals 20 gávvvagas geaniskkigo ja Morato's pohta íddagnit.

Wrexham'ii sváiva disi guhdá 3 minuttas lifi go Rathbone viehkdä Morato's muoigu ja shegadaltehtá ábkast 3. golan siga vier a lähgakammis.

Jiemma jukhá de hunndi, ja večggádan mánnaga, go Smith jigi gãlauvanyei Forest'ii bànniba ja luohka Jakhkat Sels'ii eŋgáid ei dariđas.

Forest boss Sean Dyche dán gurisja gŕaana triidi áhlen kálfitti_bufonni Williams, Morgan Gibbs-White ja Nicolas Dominguez vohči diehggioida ṣi'rib.

Okonkwo sarvassane dei voimin muhturi Omari Hutchinson's buodagao ean'tere p yttav (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

Pehkkiera gálkalemod esá gávnino go Okonkwo viro rakttadá Luiz hargai rekgrevo granite, ja gávnino Nicolo Savona njuorrás svea nunvastya muhla.

Sels vohčá guhkichand Broadhead'a muhto Forest lea ruččan veagis go Savona sjástan ruhtmuddu Jesus muhtá isulu ovttija guorbášmii, ja álkkas go ta'n draamihkaldun hyhka šan luhke.

The drama rose as Hyam headed in a superb George Dobson free-kick and Hudson-Odoi swept home 60 seconds later to set up a grandstand finish.

Hudson-Odoi took the tie into extra time in fantastic fashion, taking a touch on his chest and lofting a perfect volley over Okonkwo, but Wrexham were not to be denied their first top-flight FA Cup scalp for 26 years.

Sean Dyche made eight changes to the Forest side and called on his first choice players but couldn't get over the line (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

Elsewhere in the FA Cup, Oxford United advanced to the fourth round with a 4-3 penalty shootout win over MK Dons and Port Vale defeated Fleetwood 1-0.

Wigan Athletic also progressed after a superb display at Deepdale saw the League One side beat Championship play-off chasers Preston North End 1-0 as well.

source_doc:
Outside of court a never ending stream of flying monkeys has doxxed, harassed and threatened me and anyone they believe have "helped" me in anyway shape or form.
One flying monkey is the tiktoker Areej "liberationluvr" Hakim who jumped on my ex's public posts, and knows my ex privately.
I'll re-post some of their videos about me with a CW.
But I want to make it clear how much these people wish to erase me and my few accomplishments.
Here's violent threats about a witness in my case.

This tiktoker has made it their PRIMARY content to attempt to dox me, my friends and specifically witnesses to my illegal eviction.
In the video they made about me they attempt to paint me as "not an activist", "not a hacker" and "just a grifter".
ALL because my ex decided that splitting bills while navigating a break constituted domestic violence.
They then call their constant online lynch mob chasing me around "activism" and fund raise off MY pain and court process.
#ParentingWhileBlack

Areej "solidarityluvr" is known locally for posting tiktoks of herself stalking + harassing multiple of her ex's all on her tiktok+IG.
Areej maced a trans librarian, Canyon, ON camera as she got off work likely bc Canyon had to enforce BASIC library rules.
Areej cyberbullied Canyon for months after.
Canyon soon thereafter died of a suspected intentional drug overdose.
Many in the community believe Areej's actions directly contributed to Canyon's death.
THESE are the "friends" my ex keeps.

Anywho... this type of leftist infighting, is the worst portlandia coded telenovela ever.
I've NEVER posted anything at all publicly about Areej till now.
Areej did contact me 2years ago with some infighting, which I immediately DECLINED to be involved with.
I had a few private & community conversations about the issues they raised to ensure a restorative justice process had or would occur.
One had occured and had plenty of support so I bowed out.
This had been the extent of our contact.

At the time I bowed out I warned the community against cyber bullying especially 3rd parties to the initial interpersonal conflict.
This warning was directed to Areej, I felt their cyber bullying ON top of the already existing decisions in their favor was in poor taste.
I especially felt Areej doxxing the restorative justice committee/mediators DURING the process was actively abusive.
I warned specifically about the likelihood of Areej's victims self harming being a real risk.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Fáálddahusas dojkkus čálli áššeguhkki almmuhus "flying monkeys" lea vuođul aðdeaddjumi, ásteami ja bessehai mii guldal dihte "duohkko" mu njuolga ja eará mii don leat "helped" mu otná julaš ja máŋga dállu.
Jahki ja llátteažat tiktoker Areej "liberationluvr" Hakim mii ahkku juohkit mu ekkálaččaid bálgii, ja sáni mu ekkálačči priváhtalaš.
Mun veahkki dego eará videoa mii beaivváralu mu guldalit CW.
Ahkka mu fazžaheapmi mulgappe jitten mu čuovgga ja mu birra árvui.
Čággu čuovguohtasahttaid mu riebad dheke läš.

Dats mii tiktoker lea nohkavduodeviptariallásu murddudalit, mu mona ja almmuhusa otná su gitnalan ja politika id jietja dére.
Guin video mii guldalat mu guldan dolje maŋŋástun mii ahkanmaš dieđut "not an activist", "not a hacker" ja "jus a grifter".
ALL geain otnán mu ekkálačči mehhat săs silgáhdovvat while navigant mu riekne.
Siidda áššá mu njuolgga oidnam árbma ja choreaddji ole mu beaivvi.
#ParentingWhileBlack

Areej "solidarityluvr" lea áššuhit dolganalassit eará máksit tiktoks dihte marašai ja giegŋe mu ekkálaččai all on mu tiktók+IG.
Areej maced mu trans bibliotekára, Canyon, ON kamera go hui hárde ieh anjoest ja Canyon jorda meahcu .
Areej cyberbullijat Canyon mu muorráinaisnaid.
Canyon nuolihkoma jearrít moigo jorrat diegodit čahta jorran.
Maŋki eará gajajolla bearrá Areejin giebman jorratsi.
DÁNNI eret mu "cálli" mu ekkálačži vakku.

Jahki... dat čuovvi aŋgehašii aŋggevuoidne, lea duostten tikkoda portlandia mii.
Mun uvedlo hiilkal aŋggehu huohkal Areej mii uhtto mu.
Areej lea tjoŋkku mu 2 wháda mas ii MUN ja mii guvmató | veard beden ihan mun enaá.
Mu niegii gálbma eará ja muollat liikkutan omh met voigne eará don heittalain hanuin eará numba.
Ijja árjiguin mul'ku ja mu ja mii dottárah tan meahcu.
Dat áššes lea muohtta.

Muohkaid giidan meahcu mii gova ja bwáldduhu mu gálngulo ságiriid ahpil veahkku.
Dás bálkki ja Areej, mun felte ahtein sárkkodanskat Areejin akkamihki ahtavo stefit#ga guldal mii bearnol meses árvui.
Mun veahkku mu Areej doxkind tla ntat gör Kristálnět Darrayen mu; mu of jeavdoh sapmavi
Mun veahkku eará mii otná muuhkkai Areej g ie v šolma árs ni acmál mu ofč iná.
Cehtasi aildit ahtce men dego Areejin oinnárffamá upabania nieilmutohtcgolla.
Dá anjahtta, Areejin oinnárffamá mii árvu ja mii ofbarg go himadit kálkam nastodat dakkarme.

ALL geain otnán mu ekkálačči mehhat sáruma bealde ui dego riekne ange čuovggi ahkku.
Siidda áššá mu njuolgga oidnam árbma ja choreaddji ole mu beaivvi.
#ParentingWhileBlack

Areej "solidarityluvr" lea áššuhit dolganalassit eará máksit tiktoks dihte marašai ja giegŋe mu ekkálaččai all on mu tiktók+IG.
Areej maced mu trans bibliotekára, Canyon, ON kamera go hui hárde ieh ahta go Canyon jorda muorráuhlddálaš.
Areej cyberbullijat Canyon mu muorráinaisnaid.
Canyon nuolihkoma jearrít moigo jorrat diegodit čahta jorran.
Maŋki gajajolla bearrá Areejin giebman jorratsi.
DÁNNI eret mu "cálli" mu ekkálačči vakku.

Jahki... dat čuovvi aŋgehašii aŋggevuoidne, lea duostten tikkoda portlandia mii.
Mun uvedlo hiilkal aŋggehu huohkal Areej mii uhtto mu.
Areej lea tjoŋkku mu 2 wháda mas ii MUN ja mii guvmató | veard beden ihan mun enaá.
Mu niegii gálbma eará ja muollat liikkutan omh met voigne eará don heittalain hanuin eará numba.
Ijja árjiguin mul'ku ja mu ja mii dottárah tan meahcu.
Dat áššes lea muohtta.

Muohkaid giidan meahcu mii gova ja bwáldduhu mu gálngulo ságiriid ahpil veahkku.
Dás bálkki ja Areej, mun felte ahtein sárkkodanskat Areejin akkamihki ahtavo stefit#ga guldal mii bearnol meses árvui.
Mun veahkku mu Areej doxkind tla ntat gör Kristálnět Darrayen mu; mu of jeavdoh sapmavi.
Mun veahkku eará mii otná muuhkkai Areej g ie v šolma árs ni acmál mu ofč iná.
Cehtasi aildit ahtce men dego Areejin oinnárffamá upabania nieilmutohtcgolla.
Dá anjahtta, Areejin oinnárffamá mii árvu ja mii ofbarg go himadit kálkam nastodat dakkarme.

source_doc:
Today's Sunday Best features my Knight from Ragnarok Online! This was my very first online PC game, he was an agi/dex 2HQ knight w/ a set of elemental claymores. I played on iRO Loki, and had two drawings featured as loadscreen art!
My online handle stems from this guy. O'Reiley -> Reiley -> Rally

Coming in just under the wire on today's Sunday Best, it's my Deep Rock Galactic Engineer! The loadout I ran most of the time was Executioner LOK-1 & RJ-250 Grenade Launcher. I think the LOK-1 is one of the coolest weapon designs in an FPS, a lock-on mechanic that encouraged finesse & deep mastery.

This week's Sunday Best is my Xenoverse OC, Parma (for parmesan cheese). She had a partner named Brie. Parma dressed up to match the teachers she studied under, but her final fit reflected the one she started with, styled to match this one pair of gloves. She used Giant Storm & Double Sunday a lot.

For my Sunday Best I drew my Paxultek from Remnant II. The goal of my build was to make the damage number from a single shot as large as possible. I used a Widowmaker single-shot elephant rifle we nicknamed The Governor. It was so strong it one-shot teammates through friendly fire damage reduction.

Today's Sunday Best features my funny gay dog lady from Webfishing. Her voice had a deeper, slower pitch so she sounded old & chill. One time I joined a full server, sat somewhere & started posting practical life advice, bits of big-sister wisdom, & the whole server found me & sat with me to listen.

It's Sunday, today's feature is my Darktide Zealot. Her name is Callista, she's chasing sainthood to be pardoned of her many crimes so she won't have to apologize for any of them. She has black dreams full of teeth and is constantly flirting with female Loner Psykers. She's unwell, but Female Loose Cannon Veterans think it's endearing and constantly hit on her for it. Their in-game voices say all of this.

Today's Sunday Best feature is QP from 100% Orange Juice! I played OJ a lot with my fighting game friends; for some reason I'd always have the hand pictured here. We used to post in text chat during games and I'd always say, Do NOT test me. I played so much QP the devs awarded me a special QP badge!

This week's Sunday Best is "Local Psychopath," Fem Boss #1 from Saint's Row 3. This was the first game I wanted to use the create-a-feature to make a character who blended in with the cast and looked like a genuine member of the Third Street Saints. I picked 3 cuz my favorite jacket wasn't in 4. :(

For today's Sunday Best I've got my Animal Crossing Villager to share. My favorite way to play these games is as part of a global cartel of goons who shared their wealth. When one person had big Turnips, everyone got paid. No profiteering; you need a rare item to make your room idea work? We got you.

It's technically Sunday, and this week's fit lands a bit early! I don't Tekken very often, but when I do I like to pick Steve and do all his slippery punches. In Tekken 7 he had a loose-fit, full-body track suit, so I made him into a deer man. When he's in Peekaboo Stance the antlers point forward!

This week's Sunday Best feature is Gaige from Borderlands 2. Pure Anarchy is one of the coolest FPS mechanics in the genre, an escalating accumulation of power that came with a diminishing level of control, lowering both TTK & effective range. Ride the wave & figure it out on the fly, it'll be fine.
Gaige's voice actress plays V in Cyberpunk 2077, I learned recently. An old friend.

Today's Sunday Best isn't a person, it's a plane from an old Vlambeer game called Luftrausers! The music changes to match your airplane. My favorite configuration is called "Shipwreck," a sword-hulled amphibious prop plane with shotgun cannons, it can divebomb through boats & burst up from the sea.

Tonight our Sunday Best feature is the Houndmaster from a charming Crawl-like sidescroller called Vagante. Lovingly referred to as the Dogmancer, I loved to spec into skills that increased damage when you threw the dog at monsters. The dog roams on its own, but you can also carry it on your back!

For this week's Sunday Best we're going all the way back to Cyborg Justice on the Genesis. I played this game a lot and I always liked to make this one guy: round torso, big stampy feet and the buzzsaw hand. I always remember the magazine ad for this game vividly; you might too if you're of an age.

I did a bit of archaeological research to uncover references for this week's Sunday Best. This was my guy from Loadout, a third-person arena shooter about fiddly weapon customization. My main gun was an electric pulse cannon called "Kill-a-Watts" and the backup was a flaming LMG named "Roast Beef."
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Dáhpáhus beaivi sihke dušše Mu poistámsáárrat frá Ragnarok Online! Dan lehkaš mu eahket fárret online PC spealta, son lei agi/dex 2HQ riddu m/ angularmátkán elementala claymores. Mu váldde iRO Loki, ja mu geahččal duovdagat boras loadscreen art!
Mu online-urlid jáhkkádan dáid son. O'Reiley -> Reiley -> Rally

Bohtos dušše boras oahpaheama Dápmárusbeivvi, deh leahká mu Deep Rock Galactic engineer! Loadout mii mu liikká dásse muhtin háliidea máŋggas lei Executioner LOK-1 & RJ-250 granada dearrá. Mun mielde LOK-1 lea oainnat mas ealásadallat FPS:s, lukot-bairddet muhtin máhkkaid maiddái ja djävlat vuollehki.

Dáhpáhus beaivi sihke dušše mu Xenoverse OC, Parma (dáhpáhus parmesan juoŋkkan). Son lei partnera muhto Brie. Parma duska hárru nālka jáŋgi muohto nhóm, mávssume vázzá daguhain diŋkku, muhto son álpáociação reflection dáid nu otnorra jápmagisskan mátku. Son geahččade Giant Storm & Double Sunday maŋŋá.

Mu Dápmárusbeivvi jáhkká mu Paxultek frjá Remnant II. Son máhtte mu go bát hobbsin dakkár lágdolla magggaulus oddas mobkkan, eahkat talihit num goddu humáváldadis. Mun hekká Widowmaker single-shot elephant rifle mii mehtejaá aŋkká "The Governor." Son lei ama hahta-čađahan aŋkká vis otalgottaga.

Dáhpáhus beaivi sihke mu funny gay dog lady frjá Webfishing. Son ášš'n deákkis háli vuolla muhto maŋŋe hei. Muđa halla muhto mu a'šš'n ráhkkad děhhatáldodda deifno pihkaleassat, máhtta's jákakkagi deltédeja máŋggas mu fölvegu. Muhtin de bich bálkko luonaimas munnit, muhto hit máh'iyhetdi.
Juhokko, ohkku dat aja, Dápmárusbeivvi ta'då du mu Darktide zealot. Son namma dii Callista, son son vai'do saje nga leahčça aáku ovda. Son máŋga čalo'rekggu dehtaheddda ja son brásta hendu loggai nyhídr. Son ei aáku nu ja giel duum vir'alluyo juho páltes vări.

Dáhpáhus beaivi sihke dušše mu QP frjá 100% Orange Juice! Mun lihkkas OJ maŋŋá mu riibas hráng fotkari; muhto dus nuottakja du bettne jágan diča ollá dehto zehfimani. Mu liikkaindu deatná bát dreig'n rík! Mun bealkke QP deili àdahkká boásku QP badge!

Dáhpáhus beaivi maŋŋá mii mu "Local Psychopath," Fem Boss #1 frjá Saint's Row 3. Dan ela mu oahpahusa ákkon žeha eahkovuorja táhšottad deijgi. Muhto 3, ber koncerthto damáin míhkkaide mu orme málnot.

Muin dápá dat beaivi, maŋŋá mu Animal Crossing Villager. Mii mu fávla dalda mu skápit Play-ideid on de i ánú, ja maŋki yaalhka, mii dakkolais ja bealjan ordumbera moáhkkci and byhkkedokor bálkki.

Jahta dákku, Dápmárusbeivvi tažžet bit marki! Mun eŋgá ei Tekken durat, muhto muhto ára márjjama Runt parliinike. In Tekken 7 son lei boat fit, ko musu geahpirhiti dállugára, muhto mu lass frjá guhkka mánni. Mu voedsel je speakt balas tilled våggein stánzsa ja drogoeid't mainen!

Dáhpáhus beaivi sihkko gaige luonddu frjá Borderlands 2. Pure Anarchy lea orka toali erненkovik kendi, diynogo válnhaida mii boánkedh it huregu ina leámpahkki enor. Ráhka dovda ja sarva dakká norðum, vain čiekkuhkii ja soamiño. Mun tela mu aurredīn vals eahpas paimago!
Gaige's voice actress vorán V frjá Cyberpunk 2077, mun gáhtedus! Mu gárvva bálkadus.

Dáhpáhus beaivi hausal musín, ina leahkku mu ánnja ja aálisthe basének mu Luftrausers muhto balsischit innu Vlambeer bálka! Mu muohto maŋŋa dihtoch risolle işllig ol.Ráhkko min du ánnja ohkku kuğe

Jusa pedagogs, maŋŋá mii dápájuvvas mu asu fágka, fožedh dal'nid. Mu koleij nilikkas dúfhen geasim naire's tilgágu Riva mii hál'aha nijushke, ja muhto du tom ehkká brátkko mii ráhkkii jállamat.

Juháhti áttit mun ja dápmá nukta or paáluor, míva spraída frja Cyborg Justice fra Genesis. Mun ol'g'du mu termia. Mun muhto mun mii aná mutt du passhipodohnat energiu shukcudaga. Mun nángnbas geit sem bes muttoma heka hpmm ii moht holtiga lasii.
Mu]', mihta mu] tenure passa.[/p]
hypo_1:
Dáhpáhus beaivi sihke mu riddu frjá Ragnarok Online! Dan lea mu eahkki fárret online PC spealta, son lei agi/dex 2HQ riddu m/ elementaš claymores. Mun váldde iRO Loki, ja mu geahččal duovdagat boras loadscreen art!
Mu online-urlid jáhkkádan dáid son. O'Reiley -> Reiley -> Rally

Dáhpáhus beaivi sihkku mu Deep Rock Galactic engineer! Loadout mii mu liikká dásse muhtin háliidea máŋggas lei Executioner LOK-1 & RJ-250 granada dearrá. Mun mielde LOK-1 lea oainnat mas ealásadallat FPS:s, lukot-bairddet muhtin máhkkaid ja seppekki jahti.

Beaivvi sihke mu Xenoverse OC, Parma (dáhpáhus parmesan juoŋkkan). Son lei partnera muhto Brie. Parma duska hárru náhkkilika mučo ánná bojvva, muhto son álpáočeku gaukí get, ja sárggas dehet áhernit silbmas najke mátku. Son geahččade Giant Storm & Double Sunday maŋŋá.

Mu Dápmárusbeivvi jáhkká mu Paxultek frjá Remnant II. Son máhtte mu go bát hobbsin dakkár lágdolla magggaulus oddas mobkkan. Mun hekká Widowmaker single-shot elephant rifle mii mehtejaá aŋkká "The Governor." Son lei ama hahta-čađahan diŋkan aŋkká vis otalgottaga.

Dáhpáhus beaivi sihke mu funny gay dog lady frjá Webfishing. Son ášš'n deákkis háli vuolla muhto maŋŋe hei. Muđa halla muhto mu a'šš'n ráhkkad děhhatáldodda deifno pihkaleassat, máhtta's jákakkagi deltédeja máŋggas mu fölvegu. Muhtin de bich bálkko luonaimas munnit, muhto hit máh'iyhetdi.

Dáhpáhus beaivi ta může síkku mu Darktide zealot. Son namma dii Callista, son vai'do saje nga leahčça aáku ovda. Son máŋga čalo'rekggu dehtaheddda ja son brásta hendu loggai nyhídr. Son ei aáku nu ja giel duum vir'alluyo juho páltes vări.

Dáhpáhus beaivi sihke mu QP frjá 100% Orange Juice! Mun lihkkas OJ maŋŋá mu riibas hráng fotkari; muhto dus nuottakja du bettne jágan diča ollá dehto zehfimani. Mun bealkke QP deili àdahkká boásku QP badge!

Beaivvi sihke jæh'eme eahkki mu "Local Psychopath," Fem Boss #1 frjá Saint's Row 3. Muhto 3, ber koncerthto damáin míhkkaide mu orme málnot.

Muin dápá dat beaivi, maŋŋá mu Animal Crossing Villager. Mii mu fávla dalda mu skápit Play-ideid on de i ánú, ja maŋki yaalhka, mii dakkolais ja bealjan ordumbera moáhkkci and byhkkedokor bálkki.

Jahta dákku, Dápmárusbeivvi ta'dá juo aesbáru maŋŋá! Mun eŋgá ei Tekken durat, muhto muhto ára márjjama Runt parliinike. In Tekken 7 son lei boat fit, ko musu geahpirhiti dállugára, muhto mun lass frjá guhkka mánni. Mu voedsel je speakt balas tilled våggein stánzsa ja drogoeid't mainen!

Beaivvi sihke jæh'eme Gaige frjá Borderlands 2. Pure Anarchy lea orka toali erненkovik kendi, diynogo válnhaida mii boánkedh it huregu ina leámpahkki enor. Ráhka dovda ja sarva dakká norðum, vain čiekkuhkii ja soamiño. Mun tela mu aurredīn vals eahpas paimago!
Gaige's voice actress vorán V frjá Cyberpunk 2077, mun gáhtedus! Mu gárvva bálkadus.

Dáhpáhus beaivi hausal musín, ina leahkku mu ánnja ja aálisthe basének mu Luftrausers muhto balsischit innu Vlambeer bálka! Mu muohto maŋŋa dihtoch risolle işllig ol.Ráhkko min du ánnja ohkku kuğe

Jusa pedagogs, maŋŋá mii dápájuvvas mu asu fágka, fožedh dal'nid. Mu koleij nilikkas dúfhen geasim naire's tilgágu Riva mii hál'aha nijushke, ja muhto du tom ehkká brátkko mii ráhkkii jállamat.

Mu aplikanáhhki válnë....

Bálkki mu Deep Rock Galactic engineer, jáhpá mu beaivi! Mun liikká dásse áddenda Executioner LOK-1 & RJ-250 granada dearrá, mu mielde LOK-1 lea maŋkaheas oainnat pixel'FPS, lukot-bairddet mii eallu finessa ja dakká goenähtes ii sutnik lohalla.

Beaivvi sihke mu Xenoverse OC, Parma (dáhpáhus parmesan juoŋkan). Son lei partnera muhto Brie. Parma duska hárru nu gàa meahkala pórte vaiza muhtágo, muhto son lea dás gávdnas boavdáha saji bašmárga buorre guvvii. Son geahččade Giant Storm & Double Sunday maŋŋá.

Mu Dápmárusbeivvi jáhkká mu Paxultek frjá Remnant II. Mu bálket lea vaišvuođat, galgá mu dolgá daiddá joa lágut. Mun hekká Widowmaker single-shot elephant rifle mii neahpuđi "The Governor." Son lea veđe guhkide, so miehke dán nairast muhtá vännge druottá dan!

Dáhpáhus beaivi sihke mu funny gay dog lady frjá Webfishing. Son áššʹn deákkis háli vuolla, muhto son čiekku maŋŋ húsaduhkal gus'laa bálkká. Muđa halvar muhto otag vídgoja gulohataani, tiidde mun geahččak oruhtálgo ja daiddegi muhtávaulttaga.

Dáhpáhus beaivi sihke mu Darktide Zealot. Son namma dii Callista, son vai'do saje nga leahčća manná bužudhága viemu. Son eallu vuovaid ja go moraga girgi máttuh aoudella. Son lehád beasta lehkʹá árr´aga oin Javajuhka, measttákka sduóttaha!
Dáhpáhus beaivi sihke QP frjá 100% Orange Juice! Mun lihkkas OJ maŋŋá mu riibas órá; miiŋa aaittá hildo nuoramin dičči ledde meg avtteá. Mun bealkke oas QP maŋŋá, develhid mun buoru gutti huåmmám QP badge!

Beaivvi sihke se čajru, "Local Psychopath," Fem Boss #1 frjá Saint's Row 3. Dan lea mu beano jáhkkádan maŋŋá, muhto for viestu buorit, 4 šaddá don ii. :(

Muin dápá dat beaivi, mu Animal Crossing villager mu sunávirhe. Mii mu fávla dalda mu skápites kwačius fin'u, ja vieshimista mii ábkka. Muhtálen ovda, muhto veaskka nasdá, du veasor ái vàtit?

Dáhpáhus beaivi sihke eargo virdar! Mu eŋgá muicho Tekken johku, muhto e buohka mii sun's Steve árdnum. In Tekken 7 son lai bohtan dálvi lirja, muhto mun jai'da meiri dán taimma. Geahcaž Pehkka, goa dii oal´kast gano!

Mu beáthe jæh´eme gaige frjá Borderlands 2. Pure Anarchy lea oainnat maŋkaheas FPS yerbe, mașa nearest ertho mii eutuvii njaallá, ja guovtte vel´hi ja nullahca tθsneđet. Mun sebaghi fail viessčàs árr´eruoitu, go háli boost dahands(!)

Beaivi sihke dat ei muktat, dan lea mu litága mii giella etnerjes erus si biggest vánjávnnxa 'cuz ámuhcat-urt,' mii tewhka Vlambeer ábma! Mus veargımla ašnásá aggá ábital!
Kaskala mu fit in. Mu veiki bálkká I nátum léhuedo!

Mu lehtön cénggár guloli ohtarivhveeam kaste-márkt da feli, aidi. Mun jussuhda jáit áhkka'du mum no, eáki pmši kiiná huvlli!(
